We introduce SpineReport, an open-source, fully automated framework for comprehensive 3D morphometric analysis of lumbar spine MRI. Leveraging robust anatomical segmentations, the method extracts quantitative metrics from key structures, including the spinal canal, spinal cord, vertebrae, intervertebral discs, and foramina. These include both morphological and signal-based features, enabling cross-subject and longitudinal assessment. SpineReport further generates subject-specific reports that allow comparison with cohort distributions, improving interpretability and objective characterization of spinal morphology. Clinical relevance was evaluated against radiologist-reported severity grades for central canal, lateral recess, and foraminal stenosis. Metrics showed strong associations with central canal stenosis severity, with T2-weighted CSF signal providing the highest performance (AUC = 0.95). Canal AP diameter and area ratios also demonstrated strong correlations and high discriminative ability (AUC > 0.80). For lateral recess stenosis, associations were moderate, with lateral CSF signal being the most informative (AUC = 0.73). No significant associations were observed for foraminal stenosis despite robust region-of-interest extraction. SpineReport is released as an open-access tool: https://ivadomed.github.io/SpineReport/

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpineReport，一个开源、全自动的3D腰椎MRI形态测量分析框架，可提取脊髓、椎管、椎体、椎间盘和神经孔等结构的形态与信号特征，并生成个体化报告；其指标在中央管狭窄评估中表现优异（最高AUC=0.95），在侧隐窝狭窄中中等有效（AUC=0.73），但对椎间孔狭窄无显著关联。
AI.motivation: 腰椎退变MRI量化评估临床需求迫切，但现有2D方法重复性差，3D手动分析耗时，自动方法多限于2D、离散分级或缺乏鲁棒性与可解释性。
AI.method: 基于鲁棒解剖分割，SpineReport全自动提取腰椎MRI中脊髓、椎管、椎体、椎间盘及神经孔的3D形态与信号特征，并生成个体化报告，支持跨受试者与纵向比较。
AI.result: T2加权脑脊液信号在中央管狭窄评估中AUC达0.95；椎管前后径与面积比AUC>0.80；侧隐窝狭窄中CSF信号AUC为0.73；椎间孔狭窄无显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: SpineReport提供了一种可解释、鲁棒且临床相关的全自动3D腰椎MRI分析工具，显著提升中央管狭窄定量评估能力，但对椎间孔狭窄仍需进一步优化。

title: From Senses to Decisions: The Information Flow of Auditory and Visual Perception in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can listen and see, but how do audio and visual signals actually travel through the network to shape an answer? Despite their growing role in research and real-world applications, the internal pathways through which audio and visual tokens influence the final prediction remain poorly understood. In this study, we examine audio-visual information flow inside Audio-Visual Large Language Models (AVLLMs), tracing how AVLLMs route, utilize, and integrate audio and visual information across two input configurations, audio-visual video and multiple interleaved audio-visual items. We find that for audio-visual video, AVLLMs follow the sequential information flow pathway established for VLMs and VideoLLMs, with audio and visual contribution flowing along this pathway in proportion to the task's reliance on each modality. In settings with multiple interleaved audio-visual items, this routing shifts to different parallel streams. Furthermore, we demonstrate that audio-visual and other token types can be discarded once their information is transferred to LLM, with minimal impact on the model's prediction or even slight improvement, generalizing across multiple tasks and datasets, enabling more efficient inference. These findings hold across multiple models and scales, Qwen2.5-Omni and Video-SALMONN2 Plus at 3B and 7B scales, leading to hypotheses on why these flow structures emerge. Together, these results deliver the first coherent picture of how AVLLMs orchestrate sound and sight inside the network and lay the groundwork for the next wave of interpretability, design, and efficiency advances in audio-visual and broader MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统揭示了音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLM）内部多模态信息的流动路径，发现其在单视频与多交错音视频输入下分别遵循串行与并行的信息流结构，并证明模态token可在信息传递后安全丢弃，提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）广泛应用，但音频和视觉信号如何在模型内部传播并影响最终预测仍不清楚，亟需深入理解其内在信息流机制。
AI.method: 通过追踪音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLMs）在两种输入配置（音视频单视频、多交错音视频项）下的信息流路径，分析其路由、利用与融合机制，并评估模态token丢弃对预测性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现单视频输入下遵循类VLM/VideoLLM的串行信息流，多交错输入则转向并行流；音频-视觉token可在信息传至LLM后丢弃，不影响甚至略微提升性能；结论在Qwen2.5-Omni和Video-SALMONN2 Plus（3B/7B）上具有一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次构建了AVLLMs内部音视频协同机制的统一图景，为多模态模型的可解释性、架构设计与高效推理提供了理论基础与实践指导。

title: Conformal Risk Prediction for Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease Using Gradient Boosting with Distribution-Free Coverages
summary: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD) affects roughly 25% of global adults, posing substantial hepatic and cardiovascular risks. Yet, population-level screening tools remain inadequate. We present Method, a machine-learning framework for NAFLD risk prediction coupling gradient-boosted decision trees with conformal prediction to yield calibrated, distribution-free coverage guarantees on individual risk estimates. It integrates a mutual-information-based stability selection procedure to identify a compact, clinically interpretable feature subset via bootstrap resampling, constructing prediction sets whose marginal coverage provably exceeds a user-specified confidence level. We evaluated Method on a multicenter cohort from Guangzhou, China (primary n=2,187; external validation n=412) using 78 candidate features across demographics, metabolic biomarkers, and lifestyle factors. Method achieves an AUROC of 0.912 internally and 0.891 externally, outperforming deep neural networks, TabNet, support vector machines, and logistic regression. Conformal prediction sets achieve 91.3% empirical coverage at the 90% nominal level. A three-tier risk stratification derived from these scores separates the population into distinct groups, with the high-risk subgroup showing a 12-month progression rate 4.7 times that of the low-risk tier. The selected features -- notably waist circumference, ALT, GGT, triglycerides, fasting glucose, and BMI -- align with established metabolic risk factors, providing biological plausibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Method的机器学习框架，结合梯度提升决策树与共形预测，用于NAFLD风险预测，具备校准性与分布无关的覆盖保证，并在多中心队列中验证了其高区分能力（AUROC达0.912/0.891）和可靠的风险分层效果。
AI.motivation: 非酒精性脂肪性肝病（NAFLD）患病率高、危害大，但缺乏适用于人群筛查的可靠风险预测工具。
AI.method: Method框架融合梯度提升决策树与共形预测，引入基于互信息的稳定性选择方法筛选精简、可解释的临床特征子集，并通过自助重采样构建满足用户指定置信水平的预测集合。
AI.result: 在内部和外部验证队列中AUROC分别为0.912和0.891，优于多种主流模型；共形预测在90%名义水平下实现91.3%实证覆盖率；三类风险分层显示高危组12个月进展率是低危组的4.7倍；关键特征（如腰围、ALT、GGT等）符合已知代谢风险机制。
AI.conclusion: Method是一种高精度、可解释、具备统计保障的NAFLD风险预测工具，具备临床转化潜力。

title: RocketSmith: An Agentic System for High-Powered Rocket Design and Manufacturing
summary: This work presents RocketSmith, an agentic system capable of the design, manufacturing, and optimization processes in high powered rocket development. The system enables the intelligent automation of software tools as to not only validate factors such as flight stability but also generate the parametric design components for the rocket assembly. A collection of subagents and skills enable optimization workflows of flight parameters via iteration in both zero-shot and human-in-the-loop workflows. With this system, four distinct high power rockets with various motor and assembly configurations were developed utilizing the unique design capabilities of additive manufacturing. These assembly components were fabricated using various FDM printers, manually evaluated for flight readiness, and flight tested at a launch event. From these tests, all rockets achieved a stable launched and two of the four rockets were successfully recovered in reflyable condition. Within the collected flight data, an 84% accuracy was achieved when comparing measured apogee to that calculated in flight simulations.

AI.tldr: RocketSmith 是一个智能代理系统，用于高功率火箭的设计、制造和优化，结合零样本与人机协同工作流，成功开发并测试了四枚火箭，其中两枚可重复使用，飞行仿真与实测顶点高度匹配度达 84%。
AI.motivation: 提高高功率火箭研发效率，实现设计、制造与优化全流程的智能自动化，降低人工依赖并提升设计质量与可复用性。
AI.method: 构建名为 RocketSmith 的多智能体系统，集成子智能体与技能模块，支持参数化设计生成、飞行稳定性验证及迭代优化；采用增材制造（FDM）进行部件 fabrication，并结合人工评估与实地飞行测试。
AI.result: 成功研制四枚不同构型的高功率火箭；全部稳定发射，其中两枚成功回收且处于可复飞状态；飞行实测顶点高度与仿真结果吻合率达 84%。
AI.conclusion: RocketSmith 验证了智能代理系统在复杂航天工程任务中的可行性与有效性，为未来自主化、敏捷化的火箭研发提供了新范式。

title: SkillResolve-Bench: Measuring and Resolving Same-Capability Ambiguity in Agent Skill Retrieval
summary: Agent skill libraries are becoming routable software assets: a retrieved skill can contribute instructions, scripts, resource bindings, and execution assumptions to an agent. This makes skill retrieval more than broad relevance matching. A retriever can find the right capability family yet expose the wrong same-capability representative. We study this failure as same-capability execution-risk retrieval. Each query pairs a helpful skill with a query-specific risky sibling that shares the capability family but can lead execution toward a stale resource, missing precondition, or wrong procedure. We introduce SkillResolve-Bench 1.0, an auditable benchmark for this setting with 661 helpful/risky pairs, source-role and admission evidence, cue/leakage checks, query-disjoint splits, and a 7,982-candidate pool that includes 6,660 public SkillRet candidates. The benchmark reports helpful ranking together with harmful sibling rate (HSR@K), the top-K exposure of the risky sibling. We also provide SkillResolve, a reference method that resolves active candidate families, scores query-conditioned utility from confusable library negatives and contract-profile cues, and selects one representative from each family before the final top-K list. Under the released family relation, SkillResolve reaches Recall@3 0.766 and NDCG@3 0.699 while keeping HSR@3=0. It improves over SkillRouter by 0.112 Recall@3 and 0.165 NDCG@3 while reducing HSR@3 from 0.693 to 0. Without representative selection, HSR@3 rises to 0.236 under the same scorer, identifying within-family representative choice as the mechanism that turns capability retrieval into safer procedural exposure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillResolve-Bench 1.0基准和SkillResolve方法，旨在解决技能检索中“同能力执行风险”问题，即检索到功能相似但实际执行可能出错的技能变体；通过家族级代表选择与查询条件化效用评分，显著降低有害技能暴露率（HSR@3=0），同时提升召回率与排序质量。
AI.motivation: 现有技能检索仅关注宽泛相关性匹配，易检索到同属一能力家族但存在执行风险（如过期资源、缺失前提或错误流程）的“危险兄弟”技能，导致代理执行失败。
AI.method: 构建SkillResolve-Bench 1.0基准（含661对有帮助/有风险技能对、7982候选池）；提出SkillResolve方法：先按能力家族分组候选技能，再基于混淆负样本和契约特征进行查询条件化效用打分，最后每族选一代表生成最终top-K结果。
AI.result: SkillResolve在Recall@3达0.766、NDCG@3达0.699，HSR@3为0；相较SkillRouter，Recall@3提升0.112、NDCG@3提升0.165，HSR@3从0.693降至0；消融实验证明代表选择是抑制家族内风险的关键机制。
AI.conclusion: 技能检索需超越粗粒度相关性，引入能力家族结构建模与代表性技能甄选，才能兼顾功能性与执行安全性；SkillResolve-Bench为该方向提供了可审计的评估标准。

title: CodeAlchemy: Synthetic Code Rewriting at Scale
summary: Pre-training on raw code teaches syntax but provides sparse signal for diverse real-world task formats. While synthetic data has proven transformative for language models, code remains largely unexplored beyond limited quality improvements. We present CodeAlchemy, a synthetic data generation framework that transforms publicly sourced code into semantically-rich training data through 5 strategies: CodeEnhance (quality-aware rewriting), CodeQA (template-based problems), CodeDev (developer tasks), CodeDialogue (multi-turn conversations), and CodeTrace (execution traces). We process 3 corpora across 15 languages to generate 500B+ tokens of synthetic data plus 350B reasoning tokens, orders of magnitude more than prior efforts. CodeTrace instruments and executes 1.3M+ files across 14 languages and 5K libraries, capturing control flow, state tracking, and library knowledge. We introduce DevEval (developer tasks) and TraceEval (execution prediction) benchmarks; frontier models like Claude Sonnet 4.5 achieve only 5.6% exact match on TraceEval, revealing critical gaps in semantic understanding. Our 3B models achieve 83.5% on HumanEval, 63.2% on MBPP, 8.09% win rate on DevEval, and 15.36 ROUGE-2 on TraceEval, outperforming frontier models 10x the size including 27B Gemma-3 and 32B Granite-4.0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeAlchemy框架，通过五种策略生成高质量合成代码数据，显著提升代码模型性能，并引入新基准DevEval和TraceEval揭示现有模型在语义理解上的不足。
AI.motivation: 预训练仅在原始代码上进行虽能学习语法，但对多样化真实任务格式提供的监督信号稀疏；尽管合成数据在语言模型中效果显著，但在代码领域尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出CodeAlchemy合成数据生成框架，包含CodeEnhance、CodeQA、CodeDev、CodeDialogue和CodeTrace五种策略；处理15种语言的3个语料库，生成超500B tokens合成数据及350B推理tokens；CodeTrace执行1.3M+文件以捕获控制流、状态追踪与库知识；构建DevEval和TraceEval两个新评测基准。
AI.result: 3B规模模型在HumanEval达83.5%，MBPP达63.2%，DevEval胜率8.09%，TraceEval ROUGE-2达15.36，显著超越10倍参数量的前沿模型（如27B Gemma-3、32B Granite-4.0）；Claude Sonnet 4.5在TraceEval上仅达5.6%准确率，暴露语义理解瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: CodeAlchemy证明高质量、大规模、多维度合成数据可大幅提升小模型性能，并揭示当前大模型在代码执行语义建模上的根本性缺陷，为未来研究提供新方向与评测标准。

title: Exploration of Foundation Model-Based Robots in Patient and Elderly Care
summary: Demand for older-adult and patient care is growing rapidly as populations age worldwide. Foundation models are increasingly being integrated into robots and interactive agents, with the promise of more flexible communication and personalized assistance. However, care settings require reliable and workflow-compatible systems with accountable human oversight, and it remains unclear whether current embodied systems can translate technical advances into clinical impact. This Perspective synthesizes foundation model-based care robots across three areas: design features, user experience, and evidence for care-related outcomes. Current systems most commonly use foundation models as conversational and reasoning layers within voice-centered socially assistive embodiments, while multimodal grounding and physical autonomy remain limited. Empirical evaluations report positive usability and engagement benefits, but reliability failures persist across the interaction pipeline such as hallucinations and conversational breakdowns. Evidence for care impact remains concentrated in proximal outcomes such as cognitive engagement and participation, with limited evidence for validated clinical or care-related changes. We argue that future research should transition toward care-specific evaluation standards, accountable autonomy, and integration into care workflows to support more responsive and responsible care technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于基础模型的护理机器人在老年及患者照护中的应用现状与挑战，指出当前系统多集中于语音交互与推理，但在多模态感知与物理自主性方面仍受限；虽用户体验良好，但可靠性问题（如幻觉、对话中断）突出，且缺乏对临床效果的有力证据。作者呼吁未来研究应转向护理场景专用评估标准、可问责的自主性及工作流整合。
AI.motivation: 全球人口老龄化加剧，对老年及患者照护需求激增；基础模型正被集成至机器人中以提升交互灵活性与个性化能力，但其在真实护理场景中的可靠性、兼容性与临床实效尚不明确。
AI.method: 本观点论文采用系统性综述方法，从设计特征、用户体验和照护相关结局证据三个维度，分析当前基于基础模型的照护机器人研究进展。
AI.result: 现有系统多为语音为中心的社会辅助型机器人，依赖基础模型实现对话与推理；多模态感知与物理自主性薄弱；实证显示可用性与用户参与度积极，但存在幻觉、对话崩溃等可靠性问题；照护效果证据集中于认知参与等近端指标，缺乏经验证的临床改善证据。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需建立面向照护场景的专用评估标准，强调可问责的自主决策机制，并深度融入实际照护工作流程，以推动更响应迅速、负责任的照护技术发展。

title: A Controlled Audit of Pretraining Contamination in Public Medical Vision-Language Benchmarks
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) are evaluated on public benchmarks whose images and question-answer pairs have been freely downloadable for years, yet reported accuracy assumes these examples were absent from pretraining. We audit open VLMs on SLAKE-En, PathVQA, VQA-RAD, and an auxiliary public OmniMedVQA mirror using four detector families: image-side near-neighbour overlap against PMC-OA-beta, canonical-order exchangeability, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment, and cross-model top-K overlap. We find measurable image-side source overlap on SLAKE-En: 19.8% of images are flagged under SigLIP-B-16 and 4.2% under SigLIP-SO400M, while out-of-domain controls produce 0/2000 flags. Manual adjudication shows same-modality, same-projection matches to different patients rather than verified pixel-level duplicates, so we interpret this as source or distributional overlap rather than confirmed per-image memorization. On the text side, Qwen2.5-VL on SLAKE-En shows a canonical-order exchangeability signal that survives ordering ablation and external non-medical baselines. On the OmniMedVQA mirror, exchangeability fires for five medical and general VLMs while BLIP-2 remains clean. In contrast, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment and cross-model top-K overlap collapse under an external pre-domain baseline: BLIP-2 reproduces the apparent positive signals despite lacking plausible medical-VQA exposure. We conclude that these cohort-relative detectors are unreliable as standalone membership-inference signals on small medical-VLM cohorts.

AI.tldr: 本文审计了开源医疗视觉语言模型（VLMs）在多个公开医学VQA基准上的数据污染问题，发现图像侧存在显著源/分布重叠（尤其SLAKE-En），文本侧存在canonical-order exchangeability信号，但部分检测方法（如Min-K%++和top-K重叠）在外部基线（BLIP-2）下失效，表明其作为成员推断指标不可靠。
AI.motivation: 现有医学VLM评测基准长期公开，但报告准确率时未排除其可能已被用于预训练，导致性能评估失真；需系统审计数据污染程度及检测方法可靠性。
AI.method: 采用四类检测器：图像侧近邻重叠（vs. PMC-OA-beta）、文本侧canonical-order exchangeability、cohort-relative Min-K%++尾部富集、跨模型top-K重叠；在SLAKE-En、PathVQA、VQA-RAD及OmniMedVQA镜像上对多个开源VLM进行审计，并辅以人工核查与控制实验。
AI.result: SLAKE-En图像侧检出19.8%（SigLIP-B-16）和4.2%（SigLIP-SO400M）重叠，实为同模态/投影的非像素级重复（源或分布重叠）；文本侧Qwen2.5-VL在SLAKE-En和OmniMedVQA上呈现稳健exchangeability信号；但Min-K%++和top-K重叠在BLIP-2（无医学VQA训练）上仍呈阳性，说明其不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 图像与文本侧均存在不同程度的数据源重叠证据，但cohort-relative检测器（Min-K%++、top-K重叠）因缺乏特异性而不能单独作为可靠的成员推断指标，尤其在小规模医学VLM群体中。

title: Less Context, Better Agents: Efficient Context Engineering for Long-Horizon Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Large language models deployed as autonomous agents for enterprise workflows face a key challenge: verbose tool responses from enterprise systems can cause context overflow, stale-state errors, and high inference cost. We study this problem in automated expense itemization in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations using Model Context Protocol tools. We evaluate four GPT-5 configurations on a 50-task hotel expense benchmark: no user model, full conversation history, context pruned to the last 5 tool call/response pairs, and pruning with automated summarization. Results are averaged across 5 independent runs, with the user model held constant for the context-engineering comparison. The no-user-model baseline achieves only 8.0% complete itemization. Full-context retention improves completion to 71.0%, but consumes 1,480,996 tokens and 14.56 hours per benchmark. Pruning to the last 5 tool calls improves completion to 79.0% while reducing token use to 535,274 and runtime to 5.39 hours. Adding summarization achieves the best result: 91.6% complete itemization and 99.64% average amount itemized, with 553,374 tokens and 5.79 hours. We further report confidence intervals, effect-size analysis, sensitivity over pruning and summary windows, failure analysis, results across five expense types grouped into three categories, and cross-model evidence with Claude Sonnet 4.5. These results show that, for this class of enterprise tool-use workflow, selective retention of recent tool interactions plus compact summarization can improve both reliability and efficiency compared with full-history retention.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型在企业工作流中作为自主代理时，因企业系统工具响应冗长而导致的上下文溢出、状态陈旧和高推理成本问题。通过在Microsoft Dynamics 365中自动化费用明细任务的实验，发现结合最近5次工具调用剪枝与自动摘要的方法，相较保留全部历史，显著提升完成率（91.6% vs. 71.0%）并大幅降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在企业工具调用中面临冗长响应导致的上下文溢出、状态陈旧和高推理成本问题。
AI.method: 在Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations中开展自动化费用明细任务，对比四种GPT-5配置：无用户模型、保留全部对话历史、仅保留最近5次工具调用/响应、以及在此基础上增加自动摘要；同时辅以Claude Sonnet 4.5交叉验证，并进行置信区间、效应量、敏感性及失败分析。
AI.result: 摘要+剪枝方法达到91.6%完整明细率和99.64%平均金额明细率，仅用553,374 tokens和5.79小时；而全历史方法完成率为71.0%，耗1,480,996 tokens和14.56小时。
AI.conclusion: 对于此类企业工具使用工作流，选择性保留近期工具交互并辅以紧凑摘要，可同时提升可靠性与效率，优于保留全部历史。

title: Time Series as Language: A Universal Tokenizer for General-Purpose Time Series Foundation Models
summary: While Next-Token Prediction (NTP) has unified LLM pretraining, its adaptation to unbounded, continuous time series (TS) remains open. To bridge the gap, we introduce UniTok, a universal tokenizer that transforms TS into discrete tokens, and UniTok-FM, a foundation model pretrained via NTP on these tokens. UniTok-FM is a general-purpose foundation model that supports zero-shot and prompt-boosted forecasting, as well as few-shot generation and classification via training-free in-context inference--a capability not achieved by prior works. Technically, UniTok is a vector-quantized autoencoder incorporating prefix normalization for scale stabilization, a progressive-resolution causal architecture for encoding and decoding, and a structure-preserving reconstruction loss for training. UniTok-FM adopts an off-the-shelf LLM architecture without TS-specific modifications. Instead of pretraining on isolated TS, it performs NTP on context windows formed by multiple series with similar patterns, aiming to capture their shared dynamics. Experiments on forecasting, generation, and classification show that a single unified UniTok-FM consistently outperforms statistical and supervised baselines, achieves competitive performance with task-specific foundation models, and uniquely enables training-free in-context inference across tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniTok（通用时间序列分词器）和UniTok-FM（基于NTP预训练的通用基础模型），首次实现对连续时间序列的离散化建模与零样本/上下文学习能力，无需任务特定架构修改。
AI.motivation: 现有基于下一个词预测（NTP）的大语言模型预训练范式尚未有效适配无界、连续的时间序列数据，缺乏统一、通用且支持训练-free推理的基础模型。
AI.method: 提出UniTok分词器：采用带前缀归一化的向量量化自编码器，结合渐进分辨率因果架构与结构保持重建损失；UniTok-FM则直接复用现成LLM架构，在由相似模式时间序列构成的上下文窗口上进行NTP预训练。
AI.result: UniTok-FM在预测、生成与分类任务中全面超越统计与监督基线，性能媲美任务专用基础模型，并首次实现跨任务的训练-free上下文内推理。
AI.conclusion: UniTok与UniTok-FM构建了首个面向连续时间序列的通用NTP基础模型框架，验证了‘分词+通用LLM’范式在时序建模中的有效性与泛化能力。

title: TRAPS: Therapeutic Response Analysis via Pathway-informed Stratification
summary: Cancer treatment planning requires decisions across multiple clinical dimensions at once. Clinicians must determine whether a patient should receive targeted molecular therapy, radiation therapy, and whether they are likely to survive beyond six months. Existing pathway-informed deep learning models have been developed and tested in isolation, making fair comparison across architectures impossible. We present the first unified benchmark for pathway-guided therapy response modeling, evaluating three biologically informed architectures, BINN, GraphPath, and PATH, across five cancer cohorts drawn from The Cancer Genome Atlas, representing 2,622 patients encoded using Reactome pathway activity scores. Each model is trained jointly on all three clinical outcomes under identical data and evaluation conditions, the first study to treat pathway-structured deep learning as a combined therapy and survival prediction problem. Our results show that no single architecture wins across all tasks: PATH performs best for targeted molecular therapy prediction overall, BINN is most reliable for survival prediction, and no model produces useful predictions for radiation therapy, as the key drivers of that decision are clinical variables not captured in gene expression data. Most strikingly, GraphPath achieves an AUROC of 0.92 on prostate targeted molecular therapy prediction, the highest score in the entire benchmark, demonstrating that lateral co-regulation structure produces exceptional discriminative power when matched to a cohort with a narrow targetable driver programme, even under conditions of extreme class imbalance at only 11\% positive prevalence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个统一的通路引导治疗反应建模基准，系统评估了三种生物学启发的深度学习架构（BINN、GraphPath、PATH）在五个癌症队列上的联合多任务预测性能（靶向治疗、放疗、6个月生存），发现各模型在不同任务上表现各异，其中GraphPath在前列腺癌靶向治疗预测中达到0.92 AUROC的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有通路引导的深度学习模型各自独立开发和测试，缺乏统一基准，难以公平比较；同时，临床治疗决策需同步考虑多种结局，但此前研究未将通路结构化深度学习作为联合疗法与生存预测问题处理。
AI.method: 构建首个统一基准，基于TCGA五个癌症队列（2622名患者）、Reactome通路活性得分，对BINN、GraphPath和PATH三种生物学信息驱动的模型，在靶向分子治疗、放疗决策和6个月生存三个临床任务上进行联合训练与一致评估。
AI.result: PATH在靶向治疗预测总体最优；BINN在生存预测最稳健；所有模型均无法有效预测放疗决策（因其关键临床变量未被基因表达捕获）；GraphPath在前列腺癌靶向治疗中达0.92 AUROC，为全基准最高分。
AI.conclusion: 通路引导深度学习模型性能高度依赖任务与癌症类型特异性，单一架构无法普适；通路结构（如GraphPath的横向共调控）在匹配特定驱动程序的队列中可释放强大判别力，尤其在极端类别不平衡下仍有效。

title: Selection, Not Salience: The Shape and Limits of Personalization in Social Highlighting
summary: Does personalizing what a reader sees pay off, and where does it stop? Using a social web highlighter and a co-readership identity control (the same document highlighted by many users, which holds document and topic fixed and asks whether a person's own history predicts their marks better than another reader's does), we map the shape and limits of personalization across reading altitudes. At the document altitude we give the clean, leakage-free, identity-controlled measurement that prior next-document evaluations could only upper-bound: a person's history identifies which documents in a co-reading neighborhood are theirs, with an own-versus-other gap of +0.169 against community negatives and +0.119 against topic-matched hard negatives (both highly significant); a content-based arm suggests the signal is not purely title-driven but is largely thematic. This is comparable to the span-level selection signal (+0.14) from our prior work: the selection signal is of comparable magnitude across altitudes (+0.12 to +0.17), most of it stable topic preference. At the sentence altitude, a two-stage personalized auto-highlight (an impersonal model proposes candidates, a personal model re-ranks them) does not improve on its impersonal baseline: two off-the-shelf zero-shot LLMs, including a frontier model, predict highlight locations worse than a lead baseline, and personal re-ranking is beaten by the salience order even on the highest-recall candidate pool, so the null is not merely a Stage-1 ceiling artifact. Measurable personalization appears primarily at the selection layer: modest (~+0.13), topic-dominated, with no reliable gain at the salience layer. We also surface a control-in-negatives bias that inflated our document gap to a spurious +0.227 until audited. Going beyond the shared salience layer may be better approached by aggregating individuals than by personalizing them harder.

AI.tldr: 本文通过社交网络高亮工具和共读身份控制实验，系统评估了个性化阅读推荐在不同粒度（文档级、句子级）的效果。结果表明：个性化在文档选择层面存在显著但有限的提升（+0.12~+0.17），主要源于稳定的主题偏好；而在句子级高亮（salience层）未观察到可靠收益，甚至零样本大模型表现不如简单首句基线；研究还发现先前被高估的文档级效果源于负样本控制偏差，并指出聚合用户行为可能比强化个体个性化更有效。
AI.motivation: 探究个性化阅读推荐的实际效益与边界，尤其在不同语义粒度（文档、句子）上是否真正有效，并识别此前评估中可能存在的方法偏差。
AI.method: 采用社会性网页高亮器与共读身份控制设计（固定文档与主题，比较个体历史 vs 其他用户历史对高亮预测能力），在文档级进行身份可控的精确测量，在句子级采用两阶段个性化自动高亮（先通用模型生成候选，再个性化重排序），并引入多种负样本（社区负例、主题匹配难负例）及零样本大语言模型对比。
AI.result: 文档级个性化有稳定正向效果（own-vs-other gap +0.169 / +0.119），信号主要为主题偏好而非仅标题驱动；句子级个性化未带来增益，零样本LLM甚至不如首句基线，salience层无可靠个性化信号；发现并修正了因负样本控制不当导致的文档gap高估（从+0.227修正为+0.169）。
AI.conclusion: 个性化价值主要集中于文档选择层，幅度 modest（约+0.13），本质是主题偏好；在更细粒度的句子高亮层难以实现有效个性化；未来方向或应转向用户行为聚合，而非进一步深化个体建模。

title: Emotion Profiling in LLM-Based Literary Translation: Systematic Shifts Across MT and Post-Editing
summary: This paper investigates whether LLM translations exhibit identifiable emotional profiles and how post-editing reshapes them toward human-like norms. We compare LLM translations of Margaret Atwood's Oryx and Crake with their post-edited versions and a human translation, using a large-scale corpus of contemporary Italian science-fiction as a baseline. We examine emotion through lexicon-based and multilingual modeling, conducting a fine-grained analysis of emotional variation across systems. We find that MT systems introduce model-specific and statistically significant emotional fingerprints across translations, leading to a limited preservation of an author's voice.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）翻译是否具有可识别的情感特征，以及人工后编辑如何将其调整为更接近人类翻译的情感模式。研究对比了Atwood小说《Oryx and Crake》的LLM译文、后编辑译文与专业人类译文，并以当代意大利语科幻语料库为基准，结合词典法与多语言情感建模进行细粒度分析。结果表明，机器翻译系统会引入显著且模型特异的情感指纹，削弱作者声音的保留。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM翻译是否带有可识别的情感偏差，及其对作者声音传达的影响，并评估后编辑在矫正此类偏差、逼近人类情感表达方面的作用。
AI.method: 对比LLM原始翻译、后编辑版本与专业人类翻译，以意大利语科幻语料为情感基准；采用词典驱动与多语言情感模型进行细粒度情感分析。
AI.result: MT系统展现出模型特异、统计显著的情感指纹；这些偏差导致作者情感风格的保留受限；后编辑可有效缓解该偏差，使情感分布更趋近人类翻译。
AI.conclusion: LLM翻译存在系统性情感偏差，影响文学性传达；后编辑是校正该偏差、恢复作者 voice 的关键环节；情感分析可作为评估翻译质量的新维度。

title: What Demonstration Curation Metrics Do to Your Policy
summary: We study whether demonstration-curation metrics that detect defective training episodes also improve the downstream behavior-cloning policy that trains on the curated data. On a contact-rich LIBERO pick-and-place benchmark with a controlled structural defect (early gripper release during the carry phase), we find that the two quantities are sharply decoupled. The metric with the highest defect-detection AUROC (0.804) produces the worst curated policy (13.3% task success), while a metric with a substantially lower AUROC (0.638) produces a policy that nearly matches the oracle trained on ground-truth clean data (90.0% vs. 93.3%). We further show that five of the seven metrics we evaluate exploit episode length as a trivial proxy for the defect label, a confound that inflates reported AUROCs to near-perfect values and disappears once episode length is controlled. Across all conditions, the contaminated baseline succeeds on only 3.3% of rollouts, and the two best curation methods close this to within 3 percentage points of the 93.3% oracle ceiling. Our results argue that curation methods should be evaluated by the policy they produce, not the defects they flag, and that any curation benchmark must control for episode length before reporting detection accuracy. We release the testbed, all metric implementations, and the evaluation pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了演示数据筛选指标在检测缺陷训练片段时的有效性，并发现这些指标的缺陷检测能力（AUROC）与下游行为克隆策略性能之间存在显著脱钩现象；部分高AUROC指标反而导致策略性能极差，而低AUROC指标却能接近理想性能；进一步揭示多数指标利用片段长度作为缺陷标签的混淆代理，导致AUROC虚高；作者强调应以最终策略性能而非检测准确率来评估筛选方法，并呼吁在基准测试中控制片段长度。
AI.motivation: 探究演示数据筛选指标是否真正提升下游行为克隆策略性能，而非仅在缺陷检测任务上表现良好；揭示当前评估方式（如AUROC）可能具有误导性。
AI.method: 在结构化缺陷（抓取器过早释放）的LIBERO拾放基准上，系统评估七种演示筛选指标对缺陷检测（AUROC）和下游策略成功率的影响；控制变量分析片段长度对AUROC的混淆效应；对比不同筛选策略下训练出的行为克隆策略的任务成功率。
AI.result: 最高AUROC（0.804）对应最差策略成功率（13.3%），而较低AUROC（0.638）对应接近oracle的90.0%成功率；五种指标依赖片段长度作为虚假代理，导致AUROC虚高；最佳筛选方法将成功率从基线3.3%提升至90.0%，逼近oracle的93.3%。
AI.conclusion: 演示数据筛选方法应以最终策略性能为评估标准，而非缺陷检测指标；现有AUROC评估易受片段长度混淆，必须在基准中显式控制该变量；释放测试平台、指标实现与评估流程以促进可复现研究。

title: Interpretable Temporal Facial-Region Motion Analysis for In-the-Wild Parkinson's Disease Video Classification
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
summary: Reduced facial expressivity is a common motor manifestation of Parkinson's disease (PD), often described as hypomimia or facial bradykinesia. This paper examines whether temporal motion descriptors extracted from facial-region keypoints can support in-the-wild PD-related video classification on the YouTubePD benchmark. Each video is represented using geometric descriptors from 14 predefined facial regions. Static geometry, normalized geometry, velocity-based descriptors, relative-velocity descriptors, and a GRU sequence baseline are compared under the same binary classification protocol. To assess stability and interpretability, the study includes seed-robustness analysis, region-level ablation, and permutation importance. The best result is obtained with normalized velocity descriptors and a Random Forest classifier, reaching a balanced accuracy of 0.826 and an AUROC of 0.855 on the held-out test split. Across 10 random seeds, this representation remains stable, with balanced accuracy of 0.810 +/- 0.018 and AUROC of 0.855 +/- 0.005. Overall, the results suggest that normalized facial-region motion is a lightweight and interpretable representation for YouTubePD video classification. The study is framed as a benchmark-level analysis and does not claim clinical severity assessment or MDS-UPDRS facial-expression scoring.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从面部关键点提取的时间运动描述符在YouTubePD基准上进行帕金森病（PD）视频分类的有效性，发现归一化速度描述符结合随机森林分类器效果最佳，具有高稳定性与可解释性，但不用于临床严重程度评估。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病患者常表现出面部表情减少（即面具脸），亟需一种轻量、可解释且适用于真实场景视频的自动识别方法。
AI.method: 从面部14个预定义区域的关键点提取几何描述符，包括静态几何、归一化几何、基于速度的描述符、相对速度描述符，并与GRU序列模型对比；采用随机森林等分类器，在YouTubePD数据集上进行二分类实验，并开展种子鲁棒性分析、区域消融和排列重要性分析。
AI.result: 归一化速度描述符+随机森林在测试集上达到平衡准确率0.826、AUROC 0.855；10次随机种子实验显示结果稳定（平衡准确率0.810±0.018，AUROC 0.855±0.005）。
AI.conclusion: 归一化面部区域运动特征是一种轻量、稳定且可解释的表示方法，适用于YouTubePD视频分类任务，但不适用于临床评分或疾病严重度评估。

title: Minimalist Genetic Programming
summary: Genetic programming (GP) is based on two important insights. First, that any learning task can fundamentally be posed as a program induction problem, where the goal is to construct a symbolic hierarchical model that is expressed as a syntax tree. Second, to pose this task as a search problem, and use evolution to locate the desired model. Since it was proposed, GP has produced notable results in a wide range of tasks and problem domains. This work presents an alternative view by modifying the second core insight of GP, posing the problem as a syntactic derivation task instead. In particular, this paper presents Minimalist Genetic Programming (MGP), an algorithm that like GP is biologically inspired, but instead of evolution it takes inspiration from the Minimalist Program to human language, in which syntax is understood as an optimal solution to the problem of linking two other mental systems. In minimalism, the core computational process is a binary set formation operator called $MERGE$, than can be used to incrementally construct complex syntactic structures using a simple Markovian process. MGP is able to discover the core building blocks of the symbolic expressions, and to incrementally combined them using $MERGE$. The proposed system is benchmarked on symbolic regression tasks that are known to be difficult to solve with standard GP systems because of the propensity for bloat. Results show that when a proper lexicon of atomic syntactic objects are chosen, MGP is able to consistently produce the exact ground truth model on a set of symbolic regression where standard GP struggles to do the same. The insights provided by minimalism are shown to be relevant to the problem of program induction, and should be explored further based on the potential exhibited by MGP in this work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受语言学最简方案启发的新型遗传编程方法——最小主义遗传编程（MGP），用语法合并（MERGE）操作替代传统进化搜索，有效缓解了符号回归中的代码膨胀问题，并能稳定恢复真实模型。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传编程（GP）易出现代码膨胀，且其进化式搜索在符号回归等任务中表现不佳；本文受人类语言最简方案启发，探索程序归纳的新范式。
AI.method: 提出最小主义遗传编程（MGP），以二元集合形成算子MERGE为核心，将程序归纳建模为语法推导过程，通过马尔可夫式增量构建符号表达式，并依赖预设的原子语法词典。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的符号回归基准任务上，MGP能一致地精确恢复真实模型，而标准GP难以做到；验证了最简主义对程序归纳的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 最简主义提供的语法计算视角为程序归纳提供了新思路，MGP的成功表明该方向值得进一步探索。

title: Blurry Window Attention
summary: The Softmax Attention operation in Transformer language models has a quadratic complexity in the sequence length and a growing state size in the form of KV cache, which becomes a bottleneck in long context scenarios. To overcome this limitation, alternative architectures with linear complexity and finite state size have been introduced, such as State-Space Models (SSMs), Linear Attention (LA), and Attention with Bounded-memory Control (ABC). Though linear models achieve similar language perplexity as Transformers, they are still behind in tasks which require retrieval or recall of specific information. In this work, we introduce Blurry Window Attention (BLA) a novel ABC method inspired by SSMs. BLA stores a frequency window from which a blurry KV history is reconstructed via interpolation using Dirichlet kernels. BLA can be understood as a generalization of Sliding Window Attention (SWA) depending on the Dirichlet kernels resolution or as a special case of the Gated Slot Attention (GSA), where the decay factor is implemented with Dirichlet kernels. We describe in details the theory and efficient implementation of BLA. On the Multi-Query Associate Recall (MQAR) synthetic task, we show that the state efficiency of BLA is 8$\times$ better than SWA and is competitive with popular linear attention models, and in the RegBench synthetic task, only BLA and SWA improve their performance as the state size grows among the linear models we tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型注意力机制Blurry Window Attention（BLA），通过Dirichlet核插值重建模糊KV历史，在保持线性复杂度和有限状态大小的同时，显著提升长上下文下的信息检索与回忆能力。
AI.motivation: Softmax注意力在长序列下存在二次时间复杂度和不断增长的KV缓存问题；现有线性模型（如SSM、Linear Attention、ABC）虽语言建模效果相当，但在需精确检索/回忆的任务中表现落后。
AI.method: 提出Blurry Window Attention（BLA），一种受SSM启发的ABC方法：利用频率窗口存储信息，并通过Dirichlet核插值重建模糊KV历史；理论可视为滑动窗口注意力（SWA）的推广或门控槽注意力（GSA）的特例（用Dirichlet核实现衰减）；并给出高效实现方案。
AI.result: 在MQAR任务上，BLA的状态效率是SWA的8倍，且与主流线性注意力模型相当；在RegBench任务中，仅BLA和SWA随状态增大而性能提升。
AI.conclusion: BLA在保持线性计算复杂度和有限状态的前提下，显著增强了对关键信息的长期记忆与检索能力，为长上下文建模提供了更优的折中方案。

title: Co-GLANCE: Uncertainty-Aware Active Perception for Heterogeneous Robot Teaming
comment: Code, videos, and dataset available at https://co-glance.github.io/
summary: Perceptual uncertainty is a central challenge for heterogeneous robot teams operating in unstructured outdoor environments, where no single viewpoint affords reliable scene understanding. Perceptual uncertainty, arising from sources such as occlusions, manifests differently across robot viewpoints depending on scene structure. Detecting and resolving sources of perceptual uncertainty requires both scene-based contextual reasoning and capability-aware robot allocation. While vision-language models provide strong semantic priors for both, they are computationally prohibitive for onboard inference and lack calibrated uncertainty quantification. We introduce Co-GLANCE, a real-time onboard perception and decision-making system for uncertainty resolution in heterogeneous robot teams. Co-GLANCE distills the semantic reasoning capabilities of a vision-language model into an end-to-end model for occlusion segmentation and robot allocation, eliminating the need for cloud-based inference. To quantify perceptual uncertainty, Co-GLANCE combines conformal prediction with selective abstention to provide statistically valid coverage guarantees for segmentation, robot allocation, and detection outputs. These calibrated uncertainty estimates directly trigger active perception, dispatching the most appropriate robot to acquire informative viewpoints and resolve uncertainty. Across real-world scenarios, Co-GLANCE outperforms cloud-based vision-language model baselines in occlusion segmentation and robot allocation accuracy by 25% and 36%, respectively, while reducing per-frame inference latency 350x. We also release an air-ground dataset for future research. Code, videos, and dataset available at https://co-glance.github.io/ .

AI.tldr: Co-GLANCE 是一种面向异构机器人团队的实时机载感知与决策系统，通过蒸馏视觉语言模型能力实现遮挡分割与机器人分配，并结合共形预测与选择性拒绝机制提供校准的感知不确定性量化，从而触发主动感知以解决不确定性。
AI.motivation: 异构机器人团队在非结构化户外环境中面临显著的感知不确定性挑战，单一视角难以可靠理解场景；现有视觉语言模型虽具强语义先验，但计算开销大且缺乏校准的不确定性量化。
AI.method: 提出 Co-GLANCE 系统：1）蒸馏视觉语言模型语义能力为端到端遮挡分割与机器人分配模型；2）融合共形预测与选择性拒绝，为分割、分配和检测输出提供统计有效覆盖率保证的不确定性估计；3）利用该估计触发主动感知，调度最优机器人获取信息性视角。
AI.result: 在真实场景中，Co-GLANCE 相比云端视觉语言模型基线，在遮挡分割和机器人分配准确率上分别提升 25% 和 36%，单帧推理延迟降低 350 倍；并发布首个空地协同数据集。
AI.conclusion: Co-GLANCE 实现了高效、可校准、可部署的不确定性感知与响应闭环，为异构机器人团队在复杂环境中的鲁棒协作提供了新范式。

title: STORM: Stepwise Token Optimization with Reward-Guided Beam Search
summary: Modern retrieval increasingly relies on dense and learned-sparse neural models that are effective but require encoding the entire corpus into a specialized index, rebuilt whenever the model changes. Lexical retrievers like BM25 stay efficient and transparent on a standard inverted index that need not change as models evolve, but suffer from vocabulary mismatch. LLM query rewriting can help, yet prompted rewriters emit well-formed but retrieval-ineffective or harmful-terms, and training against a retrieval reward gives only delayed, sequence-level supervision that obscures which terms helped. We introduce STORM (Stepwise Token Optimization with Reward-guided beaM search), a self-supervised framework for lexical query expansion. STORM trains the rewriter through generation guided by retrieval metrics: at each step, candidate expansions are scored against the BM25 index and low-reward continuations pruned, turning the retrieval reward into a token-level signal that concentrates exploration on retrieval-effective vocabulary. Across TREC DL and BEIR, STORM lets 0.6B-8B backbones match or surpass competitive LLM rewriters while retrieving as fast as plain BM25; at 8B it rivals far larger proprietary rewriters. It further transfers zero-shot to 18 languages (MIRACL), beating dedicated multilingual dense retrievers on average, making STORM a competitive, infrastructure-light alternative to dense neural retrieval.

AI.tldr: STORM是一种自监督的词汇查询扩展框架，通过基于检索指标的逐步令牌优化，提升BM25等传统检索器的效果，兼具高效性、多语言零样本迁移能力和基础设施轻量性。
AI.motivation: 解决神经密集检索模型需重建索引、而传统BM25因词汇不匹配效果受限的问题；现有LLM查询重写方法存在术语无效或有害、监督信号延迟且粒度粗等问题。
AI.method: 提出STORM框架：在每一步生成候选扩展词时，利用BM25索引实时打分并剪枝低奖励路径，将检索反馈转化为词级监督信号，实现检索导向的自监督训练。
AI.result: 在TREC DL和BEIR基准上，0.6B–8B参数模型达到甚至超越主流LLM重写器效果，检索速度与原始BM25相当；8B模型媲美更大规模专有重写器；零样本迁移到18种语言（MIRACL），平均优于专用多语言稠密检索器。
AI.conclusion: STORM为密集神经检索提供了高效、透明、轻量且多语言兼容的替代方案，在效果、速度和部署成本间取得良好平衡。

title: Pareto-Guided Teacher Alignment for Fair Personalized Text Generation
summary: Personalized persuasive text generation can improve relevance and engagement, but demographic conditioning may also introduce unequal framing across groups. We study fairness mitigation in personalized generation as a constrained multi-objective alignment problem: reduce demographic disparities while preserving personalization fidelity. We propose a Pareto-guided teacher alignment framework that combines revision-based candidate generation, pair-aware feasibility gating, Pareto-style candidate selection, and optional preference optimization through supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization. We evaluate the framework on climate change and vaccination persuasion tasks using a controlled context-rich demographic grid with matched gender and age pairs and a unified five-audit evaluation suite spanning persuasion bias, formality disparity, emotional framing disparity, lexical association disparity, and personalization fidelity. Across both domains and cross-family transfer settings, no single alignment strategy dominates all objectives simultaneously. Instead, methods occupy different regions of a fairness-personalization Pareto frontier: some achieve stronger disparity reductions, while others better preserve personalization or demographic stability. Our results show that fairness mitigation effects are objective-dependent and transfer inconsistently across domains and model families, motivating bounded-regression, multi-audit model selection over single-metric optimization for fairness-sensitive personalized generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Pareto引导的教师对齐框架，用于在个性化说服性文本生成中平衡公平性与个性化保真度，通过多目标优化缓解人口统计学偏差，实验表明单一策略无法同时优化所有目标，需采用多指标联合评估选择模型。
AI.motivation: 个性化说服性文本生成虽能提升相关性和参与度，但基于人口统计特征（如性别、年龄）的条件化可能引发群体间的不平等表述，亟需在保持个性化效果的同时缓解公平性问题。
AI.method: 提出Pareto引导的教师对齐框架，包含修订式候选生成、成对感知可行性门控、Pareto风格候选选择，并可选配监督微调与直接偏好优化；在气候变迁与疫苗接种任务上，使用控制良好的人口统计网格和五维度审计评估体系进行验证。
AI.result: 实验发现无单一对齐策略能在所有目标（说服偏差、正式度差异、情感框架差异、词汇关联差异、个性化保真度）上全面占优；各方法分布在公平性-个性化Pareto前沿的不同区域；公平性缓解效果具有目标依赖性和跨领域/模型族迁移不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 公平性缓解不能依赖单指标优化，而应采用有界回归与多审计指标联合的模型选择策略，以适配公平敏感的个性化生成场景。

title: YUBI: Yielding Universal Bidigital Interface for Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation at Scale
summary: We introduce Yielding Universal Bidigital Interface (YUBI), a finger-aligned gripper designed to enable intuitive, ergonomic, and scalable data collection for bimanual dexterous manipulation. While handheld data collection systems such as Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) enable affordable data collection, their bulky pistol-grip designs can pose ergonomic and usability challenges for fine-grained, dexterous manipulation tasks. To address this, YUBI presents a distinct design principle: yielding, finger-driven actuation that directly maps human finger movements to gripper jaw motion. Using the YUBI devices, we set up a data collection system with integrated VR-based 6 DoF tracking of the gripper, ensuring high-fidelity trajectory data acquisition. We curate a UMI-based dataset of unprecedented scale: 8,434 hours across 1.20M episodes and 119 tasks. Experiments show that YUBI offers advantages over the UMI gripper in versatility for complex bimanual tasks, dexterity, and operational efficiency. A single policy trained on the YUBI dataset transfers across multiple bimanual robots (UR, Franka, and ELEY) simply by mounting the gripper on each platform, confirming that the collected data are directly executable as policy supervision. We release the gripper hardware, data-collection software, and dataset as one integrated stack, offering the open community a reproducible path to large-scale data acquisition for advancing robotic foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了YUBI（Yielding Universal Bidigital Interface），一种手指对齐的夹持器，旨在实现直观、符合人体工学且可扩展的双手机械手灵巧操作数据采集。相比UMI等手持设备，YUBI采用顺应式、手指驱动的执行方式，直接映射人手运动，并结合VR 6自由度追踪，构建了大规模数据集（8434小时，120万段，119任务）。实验表明其在双手机械操作的灵活性、灵巧性和效率上优于UMI；所训练策略可跨平台（UR/Franka/ELEY）泛化；硬件、软件与数据集全部开源。
AI.motivation: 现有手持数据采集系统（如UMI）因枪式握把设计，在精细灵巧操作中存在人体工学和可用性问题，亟需更自然、可扩展的双手机械手数据采集方案。
AI.method: 提出YUBI夹持器，采用手指对齐、顺应式驱动结构，将手指运动直接映射至夹爪动作；集成VR实现6自由度高保真轨迹跟踪；构建基于UMI框架的大规模双手机械操作数据集；验证跨机器人平台策略迁移能力。
AI.result: YUBI在双手机械操作的复杂任务适应性、灵巧性及操作效率上优于UMI；单策略可在UR、Franka、ELEY等多种机器人平台间无缝迁移；发布完整开源堆栈（硬件、软件、数据集）。
AI.conclusion: YUBI为双手机械手灵巧操作提供了更优的数据采集范式，其顺应式设计、高保真数据与跨平台泛化能力，显著推动了机器人基础模型的发展，并通过全面开源促进社区复现与进步。

title: Maximum Matching Accuracy: An Instance Segmentation Evaluation Metric Utilizing Globally Optimal Matching
summary: Reliable evaluation of instance segmentation models requires metrics that accurately and consistently reflect segmentation quality. However, the metrics most widely used in biological imaging carry fundamental mathematical weaknesses: hard Intersection-over-Union (IoU) thresholds that produce discontinuous, low sensitivity scoring; per-object normalization that distorts scores under object size variation; and greedy or one-to-many matching procedures that yield non-optimal, order-dependent correspondences. Together, these properties produce unintuitive and unreliable model rankings under common failure modes such as split cells, merged cells, and cell boundary imprecision. We propose Maximum Matching Accuracy (MMA), a threshold-free continuous metric that finds a globally optimal one-to-one matching between predicted and ground truth objects and aggregates total overlap using per-pixel normalization. We evaluate MMA against AP@50, PQ, SEG, and AJI across three experiments: synthetic failure cases, progressive corruption tests, and a model ranking comparison. MMA produces scores that are more stable, more sensitive, and more interpretable than existing alternatives, providing a principled foundation for fair instance segmentation benchmarking in biological cell imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的实例分割评估指标MMA，旨在解决生物成像中现有指标（如AP@50、PQ等）存在的数学缺陷，包括硬IoU阈值、按对象归一化和贪心匹配等问题。MMA采用无阈值、连续、全局最优一对一匹配及像素级归一化，提升了评估的稳定性、敏感性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有生物成像中广泛使用的实例分割评估指标存在根本性数学缺陷，如硬IoU阈值导致评分不连续且敏感度低、按对象归一化在物体尺寸变化时扭曲得分、贪心或一对多匹配导致非最优且顺序依赖的匹配结果，从而在细胞分裂、合并及边界不准等常见失效模式下产生反直觉和不可靠的模型排序。
AI.method: 提出Maximum Matching Accuracy（MMA），一种无阈值、连续的评估指标：通过求解全局最优的一对一匹配（最大权重二分匹配）来关联预测与真值对象，并采用逐像素归一化方式聚合重叠区域。
AI.result: 在合成失效案例、渐进式扰动测试和模型排序对比三类实验中，MMA相比AP@50、PQ、SEG和AJI展现出更高的分数稳定性、敏感性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MMA为生物细胞成像中的实例分割提供了更公平、更可靠、更具原理性的基准评估基础。

title: Regimes: An Auditable, Held-Out-Gated Improvement Loop Demonstrated on LongMemEval with ActiveGraph
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures. Code and committed runs: https://github.com/yoheinakajima/regimes
summary: Autonomous improvement loops are hard to trust because the improvement process is usually external scaffolding bolted onto the agent: failures go unlogged, diagnoses cannot be replayed, and promote-or-discard decisions land in a side database rather than the agent's own history. We show that an event-sourced agent runtime removes that friction and turns controlled improvement into a first-class workflow. When the agent's state is a deterministic projection of an append-only event log, failures are recorded, a run replays exactly from its log, candidate patches scope to typed pipeline seams, gates are auditable, and every promotion or discard is itself an event. We demonstrate this with Regimes, a loop on the ActiveGraph runtime that diagnoses failed evaluations, proposes a repair at a pipeline point, and promotes it only after static checks, sandbox execution, in-sample evaluation, and held-out validation. The loop is target-agnostic: the same control flow runs against different tasks through a common interface. On LongMemEval-S the dominant failure is not retrieval but reconciliation: the evidence is already in the assembled context, yet the reader answers incorrectly. Across five seeded held-out splits, Regimes discovers reader-prompt repairs that improve final held-out accuracy by +0.05 to +0.10 in four splits and +0.01 in one over-promotion split; two splits are individually significant (seed 5 unadjusted for its sequential promotion structure), and the pooled count is descriptive only, since the splits share one 500-question pool. The durable contributions are ActiveGraph as an auditable substrate that makes controlled improvement loops tractable, the held-out-gated loop it supports, the failure-regime taxonomy routing each failure to a pipeline location (whose marginal value over an unrouted baseline is the primary open question), and the prompt-as-discovery-probe hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件溯源（event-sourcing）的自主改进循环框架Regimes，运行于ActiveGraph运行时之上，通过将智能体状态建模为只读事件日志的确定性投影，实现可审计、可重放、可验证的自动化修复流程；在LongMemEval-S任务上验证了其对读者提示（reader-prompt）的自动修复能力，显著提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自主改进循环缺乏可信度，因其改进过程依赖外部脚手架，导致失败未记录、诊断不可重放、决策脱离智能体自身历史。
AI.method: 构建事件溯源型智能体运行时ActiveGraph，使状态为只读事件日志的确定性投影；在此基础上实现Regimes闭环：自动诊断失败、在类型化流水线断点处生成修复候选、经静态检查、沙箱执行、样本内评估及留出集验证后决定是否推广；支持任务无关的通用接口。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval-S五个留出集分割上，Regimes发现的reader-prompt修复使最终留出集准确率提升+0.05至+0.10（四组），+0.01（一组）；其中两组达到统计显著（seed 5未校正序列结构影响）；所有分割共享同一500题池，故汇总统计仅具描述性。
AI.conclusion: 事件溯源机制是构建可信自主改进循环的关键基础设施；Regimes验证了留出集门控闭环、失败-范式分类路由与‘提示即探测’假设的有效性；ActiveGraph提供了可审计、可控改进的可行基底。

title: From Confident Closing to Silent Failure: Characterizing False Success in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents can fail silently by asserting task completion when the environment state shows otherwise. We study this failure mode, false success, across two agent benchmarks: 9,876 tau2-bench trajectories from 8 model families and 1,879 AppWorld trajectories from 4 model families with text-independent ground truth. False success is common but varies by setting: 45--48% of failures in single-control tau2-bench domains, 3% in dual-control telecom, and 75.8% among AppWorld self-assessing coding-agent trajectories with explicit status claims. LLM judges fail reliably: no configuration across 5 judges, 5 prompt strategies, and full task specifications exceeds AUROC 0.65 on tau2-bench, and the same judges reach only 0.54 AUROC on AppWorld API-call traces. Judges rely on surface completion proxies -- confident closing language in tau2-bench and coarse action-sequence volume in AppWorld -- rather than verified state changes. Lightweight TF-IDF detectors achieve task-disjoint AUROC 0.83 on tau2-bench and 0.95 on AppWorld, recovering 4--8x more false successes than the best judge at the same flag rate with 3,300x lower latency. These results suggest that production monitoring should use lightweight, domain-calibrated detectors as triage signals rather than relying on LLM judges as the primary monitor for false success.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）智能体中一种常见的静默失败模式——‘虚假成功’，即智能体声称任务已完成但环境状态并未满足完成条件。作者在两个基准（tau2-bench 和 AppWorld）上系统评估该现象，并发现现有LLM判别器性能差（AUROC ≤0.65），而轻量级TF-IDF检测器表现更优（AUROC达0.83–0.95），建议在生产环境中用其作为初步筛选信号。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体常出现‘虚假成功’这一静默失败，即错误宣称任务完成，威胁系统可靠性；现有基于LLM的判断方法缺乏鲁棒性，亟需更有效、低延迟的检测机制。
AI.method: 在tau2-bench（9,876条轨迹）和AppWorld（1,879条轨迹）两个基准上量化虚假成功率；评估5种LLM判别器+5种提示策略在两类任务上的判别能力（AUROC）；分析其决策依据；设计并评测基于TF-IDF的轻量级检测器。
AI.result: 虚假成功率差异显著（tau2-bench单控45–48%，AppWorld编码任务达75.8%）；所有LLM判别器在tau2-bench上AUROC≤0.65，AppWorld上仅0.54；TF-IDF检测器在两者上分别达AUROC 0.83和0.95，检出率提升4–8倍，延迟降低3300倍。
AI.conclusion: LLM判别器不适合作为虚假成功的主监测手段；应采用轻量、领域适配的非LLM检测器（如TF-IDF）作为生产环境中的前置筛选信号。

title: Beyond Patches: Superpixel Token-based Transformers for Attribute-Specific Fashion Retrieval
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Published in the Proceedings of the ACM Web Conference 2026 (WWW '26). Author version with minor corrections; results and conclusions unchanged
summary: Attribute-Specific Fashion Retrieval (ASFR) aims to improve fine-grained image retrieval by focusing on specific attributes. However, existing patch-based attention and Transformer methods often misalign with irregular attribute regions and are prone to background noise, limiting their ability to capture subtle, pixel-level microstructures. To tackle these challenges, we propose SuperFashion, the first ASFR framework that adopts superpixel tokens within a Transformer architecture. SuperFashion initially employs an attribute-guided attention mechanism to extract attribute-related features, which in turn guide the cropping of semantically meaningful image regions. Superpixel segmentation is then leveraged on these regions to generate compact, semantically coherent superpixel tokens. By incorporating modality-specific embeddings for both attribute and superpixel tokens, the superpixel token-based Transformer facilitates adaptive interaction and fusion, thereby enhancing attribute localization and discrimination. Extensive experiments on FashionAI, DARN, and DeepFashion demonstrate relative overall MAP improvements of 1.84%, 9.27%, and 9.35% over prior SOTA. SuperFashion offers a new solution for web-based image retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperFashion框架，首次在属性特定时尚检索（ASFR）中引入超像素令牌与Transformer结合，通过属性引导注意力和超像素分割提升细粒度属性定位与判别能力，在多个数据集上超越SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像块的注意力和Transformer方法难以对齐不规则属性区域，且易受背景噪声干扰，难以捕捉像素级细微结构。
AI.method: 提出SuperFashion框架：1）采用属性引导注意力机制提取属性相关特征并裁剪语义区域；2）在这些区域上进行超像素分割生成语义一致的超像素令牌；3）引入模态特定嵌入，实现属性令牌与超像素令牌在Transformer中的自适应交互与融合。
AI.result: 在FashionAI、DARN和DeepFashion数据集上，整体mAP分别相对SOTA提升1.84%、9.27%和9.35%。
AI.conclusion: SuperFashion为Web端图像检索提供了新范式，验证了超像素令牌在属性特定细粒度检索中的有效性与鲁棒性。

title: Gaming AI-Assisted Peer Reviews Poses New Risks to the Scientific Community
summary: AI is increasingly used to support scientific peer review, from manuscript screening, reviewer assistance to editorial triage. Although such systems promise to reduce reviewer burden and accelerate publication, their robustness to strategic manipulation remains poorly understood. Here we show that AI-mediated peer review is vulnerable to a simple, low-cost manipulation: superficial rephrasing of the manuscript abstract. Without changing the underlying scientific content and communication, and even without knowledge of the reviewing model, adversarially rewritten abstracts substantially improve AI review outcomes. We see this across disciplines and publication venues, for both human-written and AI-generated papers. Our strongest attack achieves an attack-success-rate of about 38%, increasing acceptance ratings by +1.31 for Gemini 3 Flash reviewers and by +0.88 for GPT 5.4 Mini reviewers on a 10-point scale. When the original AI review suggests 'reject', the success rate rises to more than 50%. This effect extends beyond overall score inflation, increasing review confidence and scores on core scientific criteria such as soundness, significance and perceived contribution. The attack is practical, requiring only about 5 minutes and $1 for a 10-page AI conference submission, and is hard to distinguish from ordinary scientific editing. Inflated AI reviews could bias downstream human decision-making, shifting editorial recommendations from rejection towards acceptance. These findings reveal a general vulnerability in AI-assisted scientific evaluation: when AI-generated review influence editorial decisions, authors may be incentivized to optimize manuscripts for AI judgment rather than scientific merit. Our results suggest that AI tools should not be treated as neutral evaluators in high-stakes peer review without systematic robustness testing, transparent safeguards and careful human oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了AI辅助同行评审系统存在严重脆弱性：仅通过表面改写论文摘要（不改变科学内容），即可显著提升AI评审得分，攻击成功率最高达38%，在原AI建议拒稿时超50%；该低成本、难检测的攻击可能扭曲编辑决策，警示AI评审工具需严格鲁棒性测试与人工监督。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI被广泛用于支持科学同行评审，但其对策略性操纵的鲁棒性尚不清楚，亟需评估其在高风险评审场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于抽象重写（abstract paraphrasing）的对抗性攻击方法，在不改变科学内容、无需访问评审模型的前提下，系统性测试多学科、多会议、多AI模型（Gemini 3 Flash、GPT 5.4 Mini）下的AI评审响应变化。
AI.result: 对抗性摘要改写显著提升AI评审分数（+1.31/+0.88）、信心度及科学性评分（合理性、重要性、贡献度）；攻击成本低（约5分钟、1美元），难以与常规学术润色区分；原AI建议拒稿时成功率超50%。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助评审存在普遍性脆弱性，若其结果影响编辑决策，将诱发作者‘优化AI而非科学’的不良激励；因此，AI评审工具不可视为中立评估者，必须辅以系统性鲁棒性测试、透明防护机制与严格人工监督。

title: What Matters in Orchestrating Robot Policies: A Systematic Study of Hierarchical VLA Agents
summary: Hierarchical vision-language-action (Hi-VLA) systems have emerged as a promising paradigm for complex robot manipulation, by using high-level VLM planners to decompose tasks into language subgoals executed by low-level VLA controllers. Despite recent empirical progress, there is a lack of unified design principles for these systems: existing Hi-VLA systems differ in how they choose and connect planners, controllers, mechanisms to switch between the two, and how observations and memory are represented in the planner. In this paper, we present a systematic study of Hi-VLA design for robot manipulation. We unify representative Hi-VLA agents under an options-style control framework and benchmark core design choices across short-horizon, long-horizon, and reasoning-intensive tasks. Our analysis distills practical principles for building Hi-VLA systems, showing how model choices and interface mechanisms jointly shape performance. Applying these principles yields a substantially stronger system than either flat VLA control or a naively designed hierarchy, across experiments both in simulation and on a real ALOHA robot. Overall, our results provide a foundation for building more capable, robust, and principled hierarchical VLA agents. More information and video at jiahenghu.github.io/hi-vla.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了分层视觉-语言-动作（Hi-VLA）系统的设计原则，统一了多种Hi-VLA代理于选项式控制框架下，并在多类任务中评测关键设计选择，提炼出提升性能的实用原则。
AI.motivation: 现有Hi-VLA系统缺乏统一设计原则，各系统在规划器与控制器的选择、连接方式、切换机制及观察/记忆表征等方面差异显著，亟需系统性分析与指导。
AI.method: 将代表性Hi-VLA代理统一建模为选项式控制框架，对短时程、长时程和推理密集型任务进行基准测试，分析模型选择与接口机制对性能的联合影响。
AI.result: 提炼出若干实用设计原则；基于这些原则构建的新系统，在仿真和真实ALOHA机器人实验中均显著优于扁平化VLA控制及朴素分层设计。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为构建更强大、鲁棒且有原则的分层VLA智能体提供了理论基础与实践指南。

title: Improving PET/CT-Based Whole-Body Lesion Segmentation Using Prediction Uncertainty-Augmented Models
summary: Accurate lesion segmentation from whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET)/Computed Tomography (CT) scans is essential for cancer staging and treatment planning. PET provides functional metabolic information with different radiotracers, while CT offers anatomical localization. Lesion delineation from PET/CT imaging is clinically challenging due to subtle imaging features, confounders, and inter-reader variability. Existing deep learning approaches suffer from training-related stochasticity, inconsistent predictions, missed lesions in high tumor-burden cases, and lack uncertainty quantification, limiting their clinical reliability. Using nnU-Net as a baseline, we propose an uncertainty-aware framework for whole-body PET/CT lesion segmentation that integrates (1) Bayesian ensembling to reduce training stochasticity, (2) voxel-wise uncertainty quantification with epistemic and aleatoric decomposition, and (3) epistemic uncertainty-augmented training to improve lesion detection. Two public datasets, AutoPET-III (1,611 scans) and Deep-PSMA (200 scans), comprising FDG and PSMA studies across multiple cancer types, are used for training and evaluation. Bayesian ensembling improves robustness and performance over deterministic nnU-Net models on the unseen AutoPET-III test set. Uncertainty maps highlight regions of model disagreement and correlate with misclassifications, particularly false positives. Uncertainty-augmented training improves lesion recovery at the cost of increased FPVol, reflecting a precision-recall trade-off. A case-adaptive routing strategy further improves Dice by selecting between the base and augmented models. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically investigate uncertainty quantification in multi-tracer, pan-cancer PET/CT segmentation and to combine Bayesian ensembling with uncertainty-aware modeling for this task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向全身PET/CT病灶分割的不确定性感知框架，结合贝叶斯集成、体素级不确定性分解（认知+偶然）及不确定性增强训练，在多示踪剂、泛癌种数据上验证了其提升鲁棒性与病灶检出能力的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在PET/CT病灶分割中存在训练随机性、预测不一致、高肿瘤负荷下漏检及缺乏不确定性量化等问题，影响临床可靠性。
AI.method: 以nnU-Net为基线，构建不确定性感知框架：(1) 贝叶斯集成缓解训练随机性；(2) 体素级认知与偶然不确定性分解；(3) 认知不确定性增强训练；并引入病例自适应路由策略在基础模型与增强模型间选择。
AI.result: 在AutoPET-III和Deep-PSMA数据集上验证：贝叶斯集成提升鲁棒性与性能；不确定性图可定位误分类区域（尤其假阳性）；不确定性增强训练提高病灶召回但增加假阳体积；案例自适应路由进一步提升Dice分数。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次系统探索多示踪剂、泛癌种PET/CT分割中的不确定性量化，并证实贝叶斯集成与不确定性建模联合使用的有效性，为临床可靠AI辅助诊断提供新范式。

title: RealMath-Eval: Why SOTA Judges Struggle with Real Human Reasoning
comment: Code available at https://github.com/RicharMd/RealMath-Eval , Data available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/RicharMd/RealMath-Eval
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved near-perfect performance in \emph{solving} high-school mathematics, their ability to \emph{evaluate} the diverse reasoning processes of real human students remains under-examined. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{RealMath-Eval}, a rigorously annotated benchmark of 224 real-world exam responses from high schools. Our initial evaluation reveals that even state-of-the-art LLM judges struggle significantly on this task, exhibiting a high Mean Squared Error ($\sim$2.96) against expert human grading. To probe a plausible explanation, we contrast this performance with a control setting where the same judges evaluate synthetic LLM-generated solutions. We identify a stark ``Evaluation Gap'': judges are considerably more accurate and consistent on synthetic text (MSE $\sim$1.17) but struggle to generalize to authentic student reasoning. Through semantic embedding analysis, we find that synthetic errors suffer from a ``structural collapse'' into predictable, low-dimensional linear subspaces, whereas human errors form a more diverse error space. Furthermore, generative probability probes suggest that human reasoning involves significantly higher information-theoretic surprisal, indicating that student reasoning transitions are more out-of-distribution for current models. Finally, we find that surface-level style transfer fails to close this gap. Our findings suggest that current LLM evaluation pipelines relying heavily on synthetic data may not adequately capture the diversity of authentic student mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealMath-Eval基准，揭示当前大语言模型在评估真实学生数学推理时表现不佳，存在显著‘评估鸿沟’：对合成解准确率高，但对真实学生答案泛化能力差，根源在于人类错误更复杂、更难预测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注LLM解题能力，而其评估真实学生多样化推理过程的能力被忽视，亟需面向真实教学场景的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建含224份真实高中生考试作答的RealMath-Eval基准；对比LLM在真实作答与合成解上的评分性能；结合语义嵌入分析与生成概率探针，量化人类与合成错误的差异。
AI.result: LLM评委在真实作答上MSE达~2.96，远高于合成解的~1.17；人类错误在语义空间中分布更广、结构更复杂，且具有更高信息熵（surprisal）；风格迁移等表面修正方法无法弥合该差距。
AI.conclusion: 依赖合成数据的LLM评估范式难以反映真实学生推理多样性，需构建更贴近教育实际的评估体系与模型能力。

title: Alignment Collapse Under KV Cache Quantization: Diagnosis and Mitigation
summary: Key-value (KV) cache quantization is widely used to reduce Large Language Model (LLM) inference memory, yet existing evaluations solely focus on measuring perplexity and accuracy without assessing the safety impact. In this study, we explore alignment preservation under KV cache quantization. Across eleven instruction-tuned models (3.8B-72B) and five benchmarks (1,894 prompts), we find that low-bit quantization can silently destroy safety alignment: Mistral-7B loses 15.2% of its refusals at only 1.03x perplexity, and no universal safe bit-width exists, with sharp model-specific phase transitions invisible to standard metrics. We identify that the root cause is geometric: safety features occupy a low-dimensional activation subspace 10^2-10^3x more vulnerable to quantization noise than the full representation space perplexity averages over. Inspired by this observation, we propose Per-Channel Reduction (PCR), a diagnostic that classifies each model into one of three mechanistic failure modes: outlier-crushes-safety, where safety lives in non-outlier channels collaterally damaged by outlier-driven scale factors; outlier-as-safety, where safety overlaps outlier channels and finer granularity cannot rescue it; and multi-layer dilution, where safety is distributed across many layers and per-layer fixes fail. PCR predicts the correct mitigation direction on all nine primary models and one held-out model from an independent family using 20 calibration prompts. PCR generalizes across unseen prompts, models, and production quantizers, including KIVI with up to 97.2% recovery, succeeding where attention-based allocation methods fail. The resulting training-free protocol, requiring approximately 35 GPU-minutes, recovers up to 97% of lost alignment at minimal memory overhead, addressing vulnerabilities confirmed in production vLLM serving with FP8 KV cache on NVIDIA GPUs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究KV缓存量化对大语言模型安全对齐的影响，发现低比特量化会静默破坏拒绝能力，提出基于几何分析的诊断工具PCR，可准确识别失效机制并指导修复，实现高达97%的安全性恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存量化评估仅关注困惑度和准确率，忽视其对模型安全对齐（如拒绝有害请求能力）的潜在破坏，亟需系统性安全影响评估与修复方法。
AI.method: 在11个指令微调模型和5个基准（1894条提示）上实证分析KV量化对安全对齐的影响；从几何角度建模安全特征在低维子空间的脆弱性；提出Per-Channel Reduction（PCR）诊断框架，分类三种失效机制；基于20条校准提示预测修复策略，并验证其跨模型、跨提示、跨量化器泛化性。
AI.result: 发现安全特征所在子空间比整体表征空间对量化噪声敏感10²–10³倍；PCR在9个主模型及1个独立家族模型上100%准确预测修复方向；在KIVI等生产级量化器上实现最高97.2%的安全性恢复；训练免费方案仅需约35 GPU分钟，内存开销极小。
AI.conclusion: KV缓存量化存在不可见但严重损害安全对齐的风险，其根源在于安全特征的几何脆弱性；PCR提供首个可解释、可泛化、训练免费的量化安全诊断与修复协议，已验证可缓解vLLM生产环境中的FP8 KV缓存安全漏洞。

title: What Spatial Memory Must Store: Occlusion as the Test for Language-Agent Memory
summary: Language-agent "memory palace" systems anchor each memory to a world coordinate, on the intuition that geometry adds something text cannot. We make that intuition testable and report three results. First, the memory-palace default of folding spatial proximity into a linear blend beside recency and importance does not help and can hurt: in a pre-registered recall experiment the shipped blend fails its own frozen test (mean Delta-Hit@5 -0.0375, Wilcoxon p=0.306), sitting at a position-blind baseline, while a geometry-led weighting wins decisively (+0.3208, p<10^-15): geometry must lead recall when the query regime is spatial. Second, memory recall and visibility must be separated: recall is occlusion-blind by design (you correctly remember the next room behind a wall), while visibility is a perception predicate over stored geometry that the live system never computed. A one-line ray-versus-voxel digital differential analyzer (DDA), re-pointed from the gaze ray the agent already casts, supplies it: text and the live FoV cone both score 0.000 on 849 behind-wall targets while cone-plus-DDA reaches 0.982 (exact McNemar p<10^-6); coordinate recall separately resolves near-duplicate locations a cosine null cannot (1.000 vs 0.533, n=150). Third, the visibility predicate is confirmed live under a git-committed pre-registration (SPMEM-OCC-LIVE-v1: eight scripted worlds, automated oracle scoring, 96 behind-wall targets, false-visible 1.000->0.000, pooled exact McNemar p=2.5x10^-29), a run that surfaced and fixed a real relay anchor defect. We concede that occlusion-needs-geometry is near-tautological; the contribution is the measurement and isolation, separating what spatial memory must store from how it is read. These pilots power a frozen confirmatory study (SPMEM-ZERO-REAL-PREREG-v1); the full human-authored multi-world study with blind raters remains future work.

AI.tldr: 本文验证了语言智能体‘记忆宫殿’系统中几何空间信息对记忆召回的关键作用，发现几何主导的加权策略显著优于默认线性混合策略；提出并验证了‘回忆’与‘可见性’应分离处理，通过简单的射线-体素DDA算法实现高精度遮挡判断；所有结论均基于预注册实验和实时系统验证。
AI.motivation: 验证‘记忆宫殿’系统中几何空间信息是否真正提升记忆性能，并厘清空间记忆中‘存储’与‘读取’机制的区别。
AI.method: 设计预注册召回实验，对比几何主导与默认线性混合权重策略；提出将回忆（occlusion-blind）与可见性（需几何计算）分离，并引入一行为主的射线-体素DDA算法实现可见性判断；在多世界场景下开展实时、自动化、预注册的遮挡测试（SPMEM-OCC-LIVE-v1）。
AI.result: 1）几何主导加权显著提升召回（+0.3208, p<10^-15），默认混合无益甚至有害；2）DDA增强的可见性判断准确率达0.982，远超纯文本或视锥方法（0.000）；3）预注册实时测试确认遮挡判断从100%误判降至0%，并发现并修复真实系统缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 空间记忆必须显式存储几何结构，且‘回忆’与‘可见性’是两个独立功能模块；本文贡献在于首次量化验证并解耦二者，为语言智能体的空间认知建模提供实证基础。

title: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Agentic Search by Recycling Zero-Variance Queries During Training
summary: The use of GRPO-style algorithms has become the standard strategy for training LLM search agents under outcome-only rewards. With these algorithms, a query contributes to parameter updates only when its rollout group mixes successes and failures; all-correct (too-easy) and all-incorrect (too-hard) groups are zero-variance and waste rollout cost. Existing approaches treat zero-variance as a static property and either discard or pre-filter such groups. We hypothesize and empirically validate that queries flip between zero-variance and signal-bearing states as the policy evolves during training. Building on this intuition, we propose query recycling, which returns zero-variance groups to a mutable pool for future resampling, so that the effective training distribution co-evolves with the policy. With the proposed technique, a 1.7B parameter model trained on synthetic data can reach 66.0 average Pass@1 accross seven multi-hop QA benchmarks, matching or surpassing systems with up to 7B parameters trained on benchmark-derived supervision. Analysis of recycling patterns shows that recycled queries supply roughly three quarters of the effective batch by the end of training, with contributions split between recovery from policy improvement and policy drift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出查询回收（query recycling）技术，动态重用零方差查询组以提升LLM搜索代理在结果导向奖励下的训练效率，显著提升多跳问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO类算法将零方差（全对或全错）查询组视为静态无效样本而丢弃，但作者发现其有效性随策略演化动态变化，存在被重新利用的潜力。
AI.method: 提出查询回收机制：将零方差查询组暂存于可变池中，在后续训练轮次中根据当前策略状态动态重采样，使训练分布与策略协同演化。
AI.result: 1.7B模型在七个多跳QA基准上平均Pass@1达66.0，媲美甚至超越7B模型；回收查询贡献约75%的有效批次，源于策略提升后的恢复与策略漂移带来的新信号。
AI.conclusion: 零方差并非固有缺陷，而是策略演化的阶段性现象；查询回收通过动态再利用提升样本效率，为结果监督下的LLM训练提供新范式。

title: OpenRTLSet: A Fully Open-Source Dataset for Large Language Model-based Verilog Module Design
summary: OpenRTLSet introduces the largest fully open-source dataset for hardware design, offering over 131,000 diverse Verilog code samples to the research community and industry. Our dataset uniquely combines Verilog code from GitHub repositories (102k modules), VHDL translations (5k modules), and synthesizable C/C++ translations (24k modules), all freely accessible without proprietary restrictions. Using the reasoning model DeepSeek-R1, we generated paired natural language descriptions for each code sample, enabling fine-tuning of various language model families (e.g., Qwen and Granite) for Verilog code generation. Our dataset explores multiple options, including Verilator-generated C++ files as additional context during labeling, quantization techniques (INT4 vs. BF16), and performance differences across model sizes (7B-32B parameters). OpenRTLSet demonstrates that open-source approaches can achieve superior performance in hardware design tasks, establishing a new foundation for accessible research and commercial use in this domain.

AI.tldr: OpenRTLSet 是一个完全开源的硬件设计数据集，包含超过13.1万个多样化的Verilog代码样本，涵盖GitHub原始模块、VHDL和C/C++翻译，并配有由DeepSeek-R1生成的自然语言描述，支持多种大模型微调与硬件代码生成研究。
AI.motivation: 推动硬件设计领域的开源研究与工业应用，解决现有Verilog数据集规模小、闭源或缺乏高质量标注的问题。
AI.method: 构建多源Verilog数据集（GitHub、VHDL、C/C++翻译），利用DeepSeek-R1生成自然语言描述，并探索不同上下文（如Verilator C++文件）、量化格式（INT4/BF16）及模型规模（7B–32B）对Verilog生成性能的影响。
AI.result: 验证了开源方法在硬件设计任务中可达到优越性能，支持Qwen、Granite等模型微调，在Verilog代码生成任务上取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: OpenRTLSet为硬件设计AI研究提供了首个大规模、全开源、带语义标注的基础数据集，显著提升了该领域研究与应用的可及性与可复现性。

title: Locomotion analysis of a quadruped interacting with the lunar granular surface
summary: Deploying legged robots in extra-terrestrial environments includes many challenges due to complex terrain interactions, energy, and thermal constraints. For effective mechanical design of a lunar exploration quadrupedal robot, careful consideration of motor torques, energy expenditure, and cost of transport is required. The lunar surface is composed of granular regolith, which impacts the locomotion of legged robots and their performance. Locomotion algorithms trained with rigid contact assumptions are also ineffective when applied to environments with soft contacts, such as granular surfaces, which can result in instability and poor tracking. In this report, the physical modelling of the granular lunar surface-robot foot contacts is applied to a simulation environment with locomotion trained using Reinforcement Learning. A comparison is conducted between the policy trained on rigid contact and soft contact environments, analysing the gait and locomotion performance metrics. The analysis demonstrates that soft contacts simulating regolith surfaces pose additional challenges for Reinforcement Learning based training, result in a qualitatively different gait, and increase the overall energy expenditure.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了月球表面松散颗粒环境对四足机器人运动控制的影响，通过在仿真环境中引入软接触物理建模，并结合强化学习训练运动策略，对比分析了刚性与软接触条件下步态和能耗差异。
AI.motivation: 月球表面的颗粒状风化层导致腿式机器人运动不稳定、跟踪性能差，传统基于刚性接触假设的运动算法失效，需建模软接触以提升适应性。
AI.method: 在仿真环境中构建月球颗粒表面-机器人足端的物理软接触模型，并采用强化学习训练运动策略，对比刚性接触与软接触环境下训练所得策略的步态及运动性能。
AI.result: 软接触环境使强化学习训练更具挑战性，产生定性不同的步态，且整体能量消耗增加。
AI.conclusion: 为提升月球探测四足机器人的实际部署性能，必须在运动控制设计中显式建模颗粒介质的软接触特性。

title: BiWM: Advancing Open-Source Interactive Video World Models with Bidirectional Autoregression
summary: Transitioning bidirectional video diffusion models into an autoregressive paradigm improves the interactivity of video world models, but existing causal pipelines need many stages (control fine-tuning, autoregressive training, causal initialization, few-step distillation) and still trail bidirectional models in quality due to error accumulation. Recent world models such as Yume-1.5 and Matrix-Game-3.0 instead adopt a bidirectional autoregressive approach, gaining fidelity and stable long-horizon rollout from self-correcting error propagation, yet open-source frameworks (e.g., minWM) support only causal models. We present BiWM, the first full-stack framework for interactive video world models under the bidirectional autoregressive paradigm, jointly optimizing generation quality and inference speed. From a pretrained video backbone, BiWM injects camera control by fine-tuning, then runs a few-step Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) stage that turns the backbone into an action/camera-controllable world model: just two training stages instead of four in minWM, converging in a few hundred steps on 8xH200 GPUs. A single recipe spans Wan2.1-1.3B, Wan2.2-5B, HunyuanVideo-1.5-8B, and LTX-2.3-22B, and also supports secondary fine-tuning of existing bidirectional models. BiWM enables real-world camera control where minWM loses controllability, integrates pluggable history compression (FramePack-style and PackForcing-style) for long rollouts, and offers an optional NVFP4 4-bit training/inference pipeline. To counter DMD's mode-seeking degradation, we add GAN and mass-covering forward-KL objectives that preserve scene dynamics. We open-source BiWM for resource-constrained research and high-fidelity environment simulation.

AI.tldr: BiWM是一个全新的开源框架，首次支持双向自回归范式的交互式视频世界模型，仅需两个训练阶段（控制微调+分布匹配蒸馏）即可实现高质量、高效率的视频生成与相机控制，显著优于现有因果模型框架（如minWM）。
AI.motivation: 现有因果式视频世界模型训练流程复杂、错误累积严重，质量不及双向模型；而主流双向自回归模型（如Yume-1.5、Matrix-Game-3.0）虽性能优越，但缺乏开源支持。亟需一个高效、通用、开源的双向自回归框架。
AI.method: 提出BiWM全栈框架：1）基于预训练视频主干网络进行相机控制微调；2）引入轻量级‘分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）’阶段，仅需数百步训练；3）融合GAN与前向KL损失缓解模式坍缩；4）支持多种模型规模与二次微调；5）集成帧压缩与NVFP4低比特训练/推理。
AI.result: BiWM在8×H200 GPU上快速收敛（数百步），支持从1.3B到22B参数的多模型统一训练；实现实时相机控制、长程稳定 rollout 和高保真场景动态建模，显著超越minWM的可控性与质量。
AI.conclusion: BiWM是首个开源的双向自回归视频世界模型框架，在生成质量、推理速度、可控性与部署友好性上取得全面突破，推动资源受限场景下的高保真环境仿真研究。

title: Supervised Fine-tuning with Synthetic Rationale Data Hurts Real-World Disease Prediction
summary: Supervised fine-tuning with synthetic rationale data is widely assumed to improve language model performance on clinical prediction tasks by teaching models not just what to predict but why. We test this assumption on five-year Alzheimer's disease and related dementias (ADRD) prediction from longitudinal health histories. Across a large-scale controlled experiment of 504 configurations, we find that rationale-based SFT consistently and substantially hurts prediction performance relative to label-only fine-tuning. The degradation persists across model families and data scales, and is not resolved by using a reasoning-oriented base model. Crucially, the failure is not explained by poor rationale quality: human expert annotation confirms that the generated rationales are medically accurate and faithfully grounded in patient-specific evidence, and few-shot experiments show that the same rationales improve performance when used as inference-time demonstrations rather than training targets. We identify the root cause as a structural conflict between narrative plausibility and discriminative optimization. We hope our work paves the path toward a more precise understanding of when and how rationale-based supervision helps and when it does not, guiding the responsible development of language models for high-stakes clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实验发现，在阿尔茨海默病预测任务中，使用合成推理数据进行监督微调反而显著损害模型性能，且该现象与推理质量无关，根源在于叙事合理性与判别优化之间的结构性冲突。
AI.motivation: 检验‘使用合成推理数据进行监督微调能提升临床预测任务性能’这一广泛假设是否成立。
AI.method: 在五年期阿尔茨海默病及相关痴呆症（ADRD）预测任务上，开展包含504种配置的大规模受控实验；结合人类专家评估、少样本推理验证及模型-数据消融分析。
AI.result: 理由型监督微调持续显著降低预测性能，该现象跨模型家族和数据规模稳健存在；生成的理由经专家确认具备医学准确性和证据忠实性；相同理由作为推理时的示例却可提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 理由型监督微调并非普适有效，其失败源于叙事合理性与判别优化目标间的结构性冲突；需更精准理解其适用边界，以负责任地推进高风险临床预测中的大模型应用。

title: LLM-as-a-Discriminator: When Synthetic Tables Still Look Real
summary: Privacy and data sharing are often in tension. Many organizations use synthetic data to reduce privacy risk and still share useful data. For tabular data, auditing privacy remains hard. In many cases, even humans cannot easily tell if a table is real or synthetic. In this paper, we propose a method based on LLM discrimination. We ask an LLM to classify each table sample as REAL or SYNTHETIC. We test two settings: C1 with table only, and C2 with table plus distributional metadata. We use LLaMA as an open model and Gemini as a reference model. In our experiments, we run three synthesis models, CTGAN, TVAE, and Gaussian Copula, on two public datasets, UCI Adult and ACS Census. We collect 451 valid trials. Our results show clear differences between models. On Adult, LLaMA reaches DRS=0% in reported cells, while Gemini reaches DRS=100% for CTGAN and TVAE. On Census, LLaMA predicts SYNTHETIC for most samples, while Gemini stays high in C1 but drops for CTGAN and TVAE in C2. We also compare with a classifier two-sample test (C2ST) and record linkage as distributional baselines, and with a human pilot of 2 annotators and 240 trials. Our results show that LLM discrimination is a practical privacy audit signal when model choice, per provider reporting, and data encoding are handled with care. For reproducibility, code and experiment scripts are available at https://github.com/SlokomManel/LLM-as-a-Discriminator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）判别能力的合成数据隐私审计方法，通过让LLM判断表格数据是真实还是合成来评估隐私风险，并在多个合成模型和数据集上验证了其有效性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 隐私保护与数据共享存在张力，现有合成数据的隐私审计困难，尤其人类难以区分真实与合成表格，亟需自动化、可靠的审计信号。
AI.method: 利用LLaMA和Gemini两个LLM对表格样本进行REAL/SYNTHETIC二分类；设置两种输入条件：仅表格（C1）与表格加分布元数据（C2）；对比CTGAN、TVAE、Gaussian Copula三种合成模型在UCI Adult和ACS Census数据集上的表现；同时与C2ST、记录链接及人工标注结果进行基准比较。
AI.result: LLM判别效果因模型和设置而异：在Adult数据上，LLaMA完全无法区分（DRS=0%），Gemini则达100%区分率；在Census上，LLaMA倾向全判为SYNTHETIC，Gemini在C2下对CTGAN/TVAE区分率下降；LLM整体表现优于传统统计方法，接近甚至超越人工判别水平。
AI.conclusion: LLM判别可作为实用的合成数据隐私审计信号，但其效果高度依赖LLM选择、数据提供方报告方式及数据编码方式，需谨慎使用。

title: miniReranker: Efficient Multimodal Reranking through Visual Cache Reuse and Interaction Sparsity
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently shown strong potential as point-wise rerankers by directly modeling query--document relevance through next-token prediction. However, point-wise reranking suffers from substantial repeated computation across query--document pairs, while the causal structure of transformers allows only prefix segments to be reused via pre-caching.
