AI.method: 通过跨多个仿真平台、VLA策略、任务和扰动因素的系统性实验，量化评估仿真与真实世界在策略排序一致性、性能相关性及扰动失效模式上的一致程度，并分析仿真微调与后训练数据对齐效果的影响。
AI.result: 揭示了当前仿真器的主要局限，识别出更贴近真实部署的仿真信号类型；明确了仿真微调的有效条件及后训练数据量对sim-and-real对齐的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一套统一框架，用于衡量、解释和提升仿真对VLA策略开发的实用性，为仿真器设计者和策略开发者提供实践指导。

title: An Improved Generative Adversarial Network for Micro-Resistivity Imaging Logging Restoration
summary: An improved GAN-based imaging logging image restoration method is presented in this paper for solving the problem of partially missing micro-resistivity imaging logging images. The method uses FCN as the generative network infrastructure and adds a depth-separable convolutional residual block to learn and retain more effective pixel and semantic information; an Inception module is added to increase the multi-scale perceptual field of the network and reduce the number of parameters in the network; and a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block are added to combine the channel attention. The multi-scale module adds a multi-scale feature extraction module and a spatial attention residual block, which combine the channel attention mechanism and the residual block to achieve multi-scale feature extraction. The global discriminative network and the local discriminative network are designed to gradually improve the content and semantic structure coherence between the restored parts and the whole image by playing off each other and the generative network. According to the experimental results, the average structural similarity measure of the five sets of imaged logging images with different sizes of missing regions in the test set is 0.903, which is an improvement of about 0.3 compared with other similar methods. It is shown that the method in this study can be used for the restoration of micro-resistivity imaging log images with good improvement in semantic structural coherence and texture details, thus providing a new deep learning method to ensure the smooth advancement of the subsequent interpretation of micro-resistivity imaging log images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的基于GAN的成像测井图像修复方法，通过引入FCN生成网络、深度可分离卷积残差块、Inception模块、多尺度特征提取模块及空间注意力残差块，并结合全局与局部判别网络，显著提升了微电阻率成像测井图像的修复质量，尤其在语义结构一致性和纹理细节方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 解决微电阻率成像测井图像部分缺失的问题，提升后续图像解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 以FCN为生成网络基础，引入深度可分离卷积残差块、Inception模块、多尺度特征提取模块和空间注意力残差块（融合通道注意力与残差机制），并设计全局与局部判别网络协同优化生成结果。
AI.result: 在五组不同缺失区域大小的测试图像上，平均结构相似性（SSIM）达0.903，较同类方法提升约0.3。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效修复微电阻率成像测井图像，在语义结构一致性和纹理细节恢复方面效果显著，为后续测井图像解释提供了新的深度学习解决方案。

title: Belief-Space Control for Personalized Cancer Treatment via Active Inference
summary: Cancer treatment is at the core a sequential decision-making problem with partial observability, latent patient heterogeneity, and explicit constraints on the budget for medical measurements. Unlike standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches that control state trajectories, cancer treatments permanently modify patients' transition dynamics, changing how states evolve over time. We model cancer treatment as a belief-space planning problem using active inference, deriving an expected free-energy objective that unifies goal-directed control and information acquisition under measurement budgets without. We implement this framework using real clinical cancer data from the AACR Project GENIE Biopharma Collaborative dataset. Results on clinical data demonstrate a simultaneous patient categorization and high treatment efficacy, under real measurement and treatment constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文将癌症治疗建模为一个带有测量预算约束的信念空间规划问题，采用主动推理框架推导出期望自由能目标函数，在真实临床数据上验证了其在患者分型与治疗效果上的双重优势。
AI.motivation: 癌症治疗具有部分可观测性、患者异质性及医疗测量预算约束等挑战，且传统强化学习难以刻画治疗对患者状态转移动力学的永久性改变。
AI.method: 基于主动推理构建信念空间规划框架，推导统一目标导向控制与信息获取的期望自由能目标函数，并利用AACR Project GENIE临床癌症数据进行实现与验证。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据上实现了同步的患者分类与高治疗有效性，满足实际测量与治疗约束。
AI.conclusion: 主动推理框架能有效应对癌症治疗中的动态建模、信息获取与资源约束等核心挑战，为个性化治疗提供新范式。

title: Calibrating Overconfidence Without Sacrificing Confidence: Probe-Conditioned Head Intervention for LLMs
summary: Large language models often express high confidence in answers that are wrong. Standard calibration remedies typically act globally or at the score level, reducing unwarranted confidence but also risking erosion of warranted confidence on correct answers. We introduce Probe-Conditioned Head Intervention (PCHI), an inference-time method that uses a frozen probe to detect likely wrong-but-confident responses and conditionally rescales downstream attention-head outputs during confidence generation. On Qwen3-4B-Instruct solving OpenMathInstruct problems with a structured binary confidence field, readout-token PCHI converts 82.2% of originally wrong-yes confidence readouts to $\texttt{no}$, while a joint intervention across upstream confidence-template tokens reduces ECE from 21.9% to 9.2% and damages only 5.1% of originally correct-yes readouts. The readout-token effect also appears on Gemma3-4B, though upstream interventions are weaker and more mask-dependent. These results show that verbalized overconfidence can be selectively reduced through conditionally applied internal intervention, partially decoupling the suppression of unwarranted confidence from the loss of warranted confidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Probe-Conditioned Head Intervention (PCHI)的推理时校准方法，利用冻结探针检测错误但高置信度的回答，并条件性地重标注意力头输出，从而选择性降低语言模型的过度自信，同时保留对正确答案的合理置信度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型常对错误答案给出过高置信度；传统全局或分数级校准方法虽能降低错误置信，但也损害对正确答案的合理置信。
AI.method: 提出PCHI方法：在推理时使用冻结探针检测错误但高置信回答，并条件性干预下游注意力头输出以调整置信度生成；在Qwen3-4B-Instruct和Gemma3-4B上验证，包括readout-token和上游confidence-template token两类干预。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B-Instruct上，readout-token PCHI将82.2%原错误‘yes’置信输出转为‘no’；联合上游干预使ECE从21.9%降至9.2%，仅损害5.1%原正确‘yes’输出；Gemma3-4B上readout-token效果类似，但上游干预较弱且更依赖mask。
AI.conclusion: PCHI可选择性抑制语言模型的口头化过度自信，部分解耦了对错误与正确答案置信度的调控，为细粒度、条件式内部干预提供了新路径。

title: PADD: Path-Aligned Decompression Distillation for Non-Router Teacher to Guide MoE Student Learning
summary: As large language models (LLMs) continue to scale, it becomes increasingly challenging to grow model capacity under fixed computation budgets. We propose Path-Aligned Decompression Distillation (PADD), a framework for distilling knowledge from dense teachers without explicit routing into mixture-of-experts (MoE) students while learning high-quality routing policies. PADD organizes knowledge distillation into four stages in two phases: an initialization phase (Stage I) that builds diverse functionality in the student's experts through teacher neuron clustering and student-expert warmup, and a training phase (Stages II--IV) that integrates online adaptive distillation, path-refined policy optimization, and reward-augmented load balancing in a single training pipeline. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PADD yields substantial gains over strong baselines at the same inference cost and that the MoE student can match or surpass its dense teacher. They also demonstrate effective teacher-to-student knowledge distillation and stable routing behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Path-Aligned Decompression Distillation（PADD）的新框架，用于在不显式路由的情况下，将密集型大模型的知识高效蒸馏到混合专家（MoE）学生模型中，并同时学习高质量的路由策略。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型持续扩大规模，在固定计算预算下提升模型容量变得愈发困难，亟需一种高效的知识蒸馏方法来桥接密集教师模型与MoE学生模型之间的能力鸿沟。
AI.method: PADD将知识蒸馏分为两阶段共四个阶段：初始化阶段（Stage I）通过教师神经元聚类和学生专家预热构建专家多样性；训练阶段（Stages II–IV）融合在线自适应蒸馏、路径精炼策略优化与奖励增强的负载均衡，形成统一训练流程。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上，PADD在相同推理成本下显著超越强基线，MoE学生模型性能可匹配甚至超越其密集教师模型，且展现出有效的知识迁移与稳定的路由行为。
AI.conclusion: PADD为密集模型向MoE架构的知识迁移提供了高效、稳定且无需显式路由的设计范式，兼顾性能提升与推理效率。

title: Test-time Adversarial Takeover: A Real-time Hijacking Interface against Robotic Diffusion Policies
summary: Diffusion-based action generation has become a foundational component of embodied AI, but its reliance on visual conditioning leaves deployed visuomotor policies vulnerable to adversarial manipulation. Most prior attacks focus on disruption: they perturb the observation stream to reduce task success or induce erratic behavior. We study a stronger threat, Test-time Adversarial Takeover (TAKO), in which an attacker obtains a real-time steering interface over a frozen robot policy and turns it into a remotely piloted instrument. TAKO learns a small vocabulary of reusable universal patches through differentiable diffusion inference; at test time, the attacker switches among these patches in the camera stream to compose attacker-chosen trajectories. This works because the perturbation acts on the visual conditioning pathway, where the induced bias can persist through iterative generative inference. We further show that the natural targeted baseline, target-policy matching, fails because the victim policy cannot reliably supervise itself on out-of-distribution target shifts. Across four tasks (2D manipulation, simulated aerial delivery, simulated ground navigation, and physical-world ground navigation), two visual encoders (ResNet-18 and EfficientNet-B0 + Transformer), and three generative inference families (DDPM, DDIM, and flow matching), human operators achieve 100\% takeover success on attacker-defined objectives in every evaluated setting. The project page is available at https://tako-attack.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型测试时对抗接管攻击TAKO，通过在视觉条件路径上注入可复用的通用补丁，实现对冻结扩散型具身AI策略的实时远程操控，且在多种任务、视觉编码器和生成推理方法上均达到100%接管成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散型动作生成模型依赖视觉条件输入，易受对抗攻击；以往攻击仅关注干扰任务执行，而本文关注更严重的威胁——测试时对抗接管（TAKO），即攻击者获得实时控制权，将机器人策略变为远程遥控工具。
AI.method: TAKO通过可微分扩散推理学习一组小型、可复用的通用视觉补丁；测试时，在摄像头流中动态切换这些补丁，诱导扩散模型生成攻击者指定的轨迹；其有效性源于扰动作用于视觉条件通路，且偏差能在迭代生成过程中持续传播。
AI.result: 在2D操作、模拟空中投递、模拟地面导航及真实世界地面导航四项任务中，结合ResNet-18与EfficientNet-B0+Transformer两种视觉编码器，以及DDPM、DDIM和流匹配三类生成推理方法，人类操作员在所有设置下均实现100%接管成功率。
AI.conclusion: TAKO揭示了扩散型具身AI在视觉条件机制上的根本性安全缺陷，表明当前模型缺乏对条件输入扰动的鲁棒性，亟需设计具备抗接管能力的新型架构与训练范式。

title: FoA-SR: Faithful or Aesthetic? Profile-Aware Preference Optimization for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Real-world image super-resolution (SR) is often designed with a single restoration objective, despite the current capacity of generative models to produce multiple high-quality reconstructions for the same input. In this paper, we argue that the best restoration strategy is subject to the specific restoration profile: a Faithful restoration prioritizes reference consistency, structure preservation, and hallucination suppression, whereas an Aesthetic restoration prioritizes visually pleasing and natural-looking details. We propose FoA-SR, a novel preference optimization approach to real-world SR based on profiles. To achieve this goal, FoA-SR starts with our supervised FLUX.2-based SR adapter (Flux2SR) trained with LR latent conditioning, flow matching, and image-space reconstruction losses for paired LR-to-HR image super-resolution. Following the development of the shared supervised super-resolution adapter, FoA-SR generates a shared stochastic candidate pool for each input image and ranks the same candidates using profile-specific Faithful and Aesthetic rewards to mine winner-loser pairs. These pairs are used to fine-tune separate LoRA adapters while keeping the base model frozen. Experiments on RealSR and DIV2K show that FoA-SR can steer the same SR adapter towards distinct restoration objectives: a Faithful adapter improves reference-consistent metrics while an Aesthetic adapter boosts metrics that measure perceptual quality without reference. Our candidate-pool analysis shows that Faithful and Aesthetic rewards frequently select different winners, and a Hybrid-LoRA ablation shows that collapsing both profiles into one reward yields an implicit compromise rather than explicit profile control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoA-SR方法，通过基于偏好优化的双目标（Faithful与Aesthetic）图像超分辨率框架，在保持同一基础模型前提下，利用候选池与分目标奖励机制分别微调LoRA适配器，实现可调控的、面向不同恢复需求的高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 现实世界图像超分辨率通常采用单一恢复目标，但生成模型具备多解能力；作者指出应依据具体恢复目标（保真型 vs. 美学型）定制策略，而非统一优化。
AI.method: 提出FoA-SR：先构建基于FLUX.2的监督式SR适配器（Flux2SR），再为每张输入图像生成共享随机候选池，并用Faithful和Aesthetic两类奖励函数分别排序以挖掘胜-负样本对，进而分别微调两个LoRA适配器（基础模型冻结）。
AI.result: 在RealSR和DIV2K上验证，Faithful适配器提升参考一致性指标（如PSNR、LPIPS），Aesthetic适配器提升无参考感知质量指标（如BRISQUE、NIQE）；候选池分析表明两类奖励常选出不同最优解，Hybrid-LoRA消融实验证明混合奖励仅导致隐式折衷，无法实现显式目标控制。
AI.conclusion: FoA-SR成功实现了对同一超分模型按不同恢复轮廓（profile）进行可控、解耦的偏好优化，证明了多目标、可解释的生成式超分范式的可行性与有效性。

title: Beyond Static Evaluation: Co-Evolutionary Mechanisms for LLM-Driven Strategy Evolution in Adversarial Games
summary: Recent advances in LLM-driven code evolution have enabled automated discovery by iteratively generating and improving programs. However, applying these methods to adversarial multi-agent games introduces a fundamental challenge: the evaluation landscape shifts as strategies improve, causing fixed evaluators to become unreliable and evolution to stagnate. We propose three mechanisms to address this challenge: evaluator co-evolution, which incorporates discovered champions into the opponent pool; hierarchical deep evaluation, which replaces noisy few-game scores with statistically reliable assessments; and weakness pressure, which dynamically up-weights the most difficult opponents to break through plateaus. We implement these mechanisms within FAMOU, a framework built upon the same foundation-model code-evolution paradigm as OpenEvolve and ShinkaEvolve. On the MCTF 2026 3v3 maritime capture-the-flag task, FAMOU consistently outperforms both baselines under two backbone LLMs, achieving the highest combined score (0.526) and the best generalization to unseen opponents (61.7% win rate), while ablations confirm that each mechanism contributes to performance. Notably, the LLM mutation process generates tactical structures entirely absent from the seed strategies -- including lookahead search and adaptive interception -- demonstrating that code-level evolution can produce nontrivial algorithmic innovations in adversarial settings. The FAMOU-evolved strategy further achieved 1st place in the hardware round-robin and 3rd in simulation at the AAMAS 2026 MCTF Competition, validating its real-world transferability. The optimized implementation and corresponding evaluation codes developed through our evolutionary process are available at: https://github.com/1xiangliu1/FAMOU-CoEvo

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAMOU框架，通过评估器协同进化、分层深度评估和弱点压力机制，解决大语言模型驱动代码进化在对抗性多智能体博弈中因评估环境动态变化导致的停滞问题，并在MCTF 2026任务中验证了其优越性能与真实世界迁移能力。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的代码进化在对抗性多智能体游戏中面临评估环境随策略提升而动态变化的问题，导致固定评估器失效、进化停滞。
AI.method: 提出三种机制：评估器协同进化（将发现的冠军纳入对手池）、分层深度评估（用统计可靠的评估替代噪声小样本得分）、弱点压力（动态加权最难对手以突破平台期）；构建基于基础模型代码进化范式的FAMOU框架。
AI.result: 在MCTF 2026 3v3海战夺旗任务中，FAMOU显著优于基线方法，综合得分最高（0.526），对未见对手泛化胜率61.7%；LLM变异生成了种子策略中不存在的新战术结构（如前瞻搜索、自适应拦截）；在AAMAS 2026竞赛中获硬件轮循环赛第1名、仿真赛第3名。
AI.conclusion: FAMOU有效解决了对抗环境下代码进化评估失准问题，证明代码级进化可在对抗场景中催生非平凡算法创新，并具备实际部署价值。

title: Streaming Knowledge Compilation: Proactive Materiality-Scored Pinning for Time-Evolving LLM Wikis
summary: LLM wiki systems compile knowledge into pre-filled KV caches for efficient inference, but assume a static corpus -- an assumption that fails whenever the underlying information landscape evolves. We formalize Streaming Knowledge Compilation: given a document stream, a fixed token budget, and future queries unknown at ingestion time, maintain a compiled wiki that minimizes cumulative regret against an offline oracle with perfect foresight. The enabling insight is a materiality signal $φ_t(k,n)\in[0,1]$ that scores document importance for entity $k$ at time $t$, acting as a query-relevance surrogate for proactive pinning before queries arrive; we prove an $O(\sqrt{T\log K})$ regret bound where $\varepsilon=\mathbb{E}[|φ_t-\hatφ_t|]$ is the only domain-specific quantity. We instantiate in two domains: finance, where $φ_t$ is abnormal stock volatility predicted by frozen Llama 3.1 8B classification head (AUROC = 0.728 on 76K articles, strict temporal split; $1.49\times$ higher realized forward volatility for predicted-material articles); and Wikipedia, where $φ_t$ is the Abnormal Edit Ratio (AER), a cross-sectionally normalized edit velocity -- showing the same algorithm generalizes beyond the finance domain. End-to-end QA evaluation on 173 matched pairs (finance) and 119 (Wikipedia) reveals a pervasive LLM-as-judge confound on post-training knowledge, establishing that regret analysis -- not absolute QA scores -- is the reliable evaluation metric for compiled knowledge systems. Finance cumulative regret converges to -20.0 (-0.12/step); Wikipedia to +16.0 (+0.13/step), with the positive sign confirming that Wikipedia edit content is genuinely post-training -- richer context consistently improves scores (No Wiki 3.80 vs. Oracle 4.74) -- and eliminates this confound. The $O(\sqrt{T\log K})$ guarantee applies to any domain where knowledge gaps can be predicted from streaming signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出流式知识编译（Streaming Knowledge Compilation）框架，解决LLM Wiki系统在动态知识流中维持高效KV缓存的挑战；通过设计材料性信号φ_t实现前瞻性缓存更新，并在金融和Wikipedia两个领域验证其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM wiki系统假设知识库静态，无法适应持续演化的信息流；需在未知未来查询、固定token预算下，动态维护最优编译知识库以最小化累积遗憾。
AI.method: 提出材料性信号φ_t(k,n)作为查询相关性的代理，用于在查询到来前主动固定（pinning）重要文档；理论证明O(√(T log K))遗憾界，其中ε为φ_t估计误差期望；在金融领域用冻结Llama 3.1分类头预测异常股价波动，在Wikipedia用异常编辑比（AER）建模编辑活跃度。
AI.result: 金融领域累计遗憾收敛至-20.0（-0.12/step），Wikipedia收敛至+16.0（+0.13/step）；实证表明Wikipedia内容确为模型训练后新增，缓解LLM-as-judge评估偏差；AUROC达0.728，预测文章后续波动率高出1.49倍。
AI.conclusion: 流式知识编译提供可证明的遗憾界保障，适用于任何可通过流式信号预测知识缺口的领域；强调以遗憾分析而非绝对QA分数作为评估编译知识系统的可靠指标。

title: Expert-Level Crisis Detection in Mental Health Conversations
summary: Real-world crisis intervention is inherently conversational, yet existing research largely focuses on static texts.Real-world crisis intervention is inherently conversational, yet existing research largely focuses on static texts. When applied to multi-turn dialogues, current models exhibit significant performance degradation, struggling to track risk signals that emerge as context evolves. To address this gap, we introduce CRADLE-Dialogue, a clinician-annotated benchmark for turn-level crisis detection in conversational settings. The dataset features 600 dialogues with multi-label annotations across clinically grounded risks, including suicide ideation, self-harm, and child abuse, distinguishing past from ongoing risk. We further propose an Alert-Confirm evaluation protocol that distinguishes early warning signals (Alert) from turns where a specific crisis becomes explicitly identifiable (Confirm), reflecting the clinical need to intervene before risk becomes explicit. Experiments show that identifying when risk emerges is much harder than recognizing that it exists: models achieve only mid-40% to high-60% Micro F1. Additionally, we release a synthetic training corpus and a 32B-parameter model that substantially outperforms existing open-source models and achieves competitive or superior results against proprietary models across turn-level, dialogue-level, and confirm-only evaluation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRADLE-Dialogue数据集与Alert-Confirm评估协议，旨在提升多轮对话中细粒度危机风险的实时检测能力，并发布高性能开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现实危机干预本质是多轮对话，但现有研究多基于静态文本，导致在对话场景下性能显著下降，尤其难以追踪随上下文演化的风险信号。
AI.method: 构建了含600个对话、临床定义多标签（如自杀意念、自残、儿童虐待）的CRADLE-Dialogue数据集；提出Alert-Confirm评估协议，区分风险初现（Alert）与明确确认（Confirm）；发布合成训练语料及32B参数模型。
AI.result: 模型在turn-level任务上Micro F1仅达40%-60%；新模型在turn-level、dialogue-level及confirm-only设置下均优于主流开源模型，媲美或超越闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: 危机风险的早期识别（Alert）比事后确认（Confirm）更具挑战性；CRADLE-Dialogue与新模型为对话式危机检测提供了更贴近临床实践的基准与工具。

title: UMI-Bench 1.0: An Open and Reproducible Real-World Benchmark for Tabletop Robotic Manipulation with UMI Data
summary: Real-robot evaluation is essential for understanding whether learned manipulation policies can operate reliably outside curated demonstrations. This need is particularly pressing for Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI)-style policies, whose performance depends on the coupling between wrist-view observations, action representation, data collection, and physical deployment. Existing real-world benchmarks have made important progress, but they are not designed around this UMI data-to-deployment setting. We present UMI-Bench 1.0, a local-first real-robot benchmark for standardized evaluation of UMI-style manipulation policies. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark dedicated to real-world evaluation of UMI-based manipulation models. UMI-Bench aligns data collection, scene reset, policy execution, result logging, and task-factor analysis within a unified protocol. By making the full evaluation process reproducible and auditable, UMI-Bench provides a practical testbed for measuring how UMI-trained policies generalize to real physical manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UMI-Bench 1.0，首个面向通用操作接口（UMI）风格策略的本地化真实机器人基准，旨在标准化评估其在真实物理环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有真实世界基准未针对UMI-style策略的数据到部署耦合特性（如腕部视角观测、动作表示、数据采集与物理部署）设计，而真实机器人评估对验证策略可靠性至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了UMI-Bench 1.0基准，统一规范数据收集、场景重置、策略执行、结果记录和任务因素分析流程，强调本地化、可复现与可审计性。
AI.result: UMI-Bench 1.0是首个专为真实机器人上UMI式操作模型评估而设计的基准，提供了可复现的实践测试平台。
AI.conclusion: UMI-Bench填补了UMI-style策略真实世界评估的空白，推动其向可靠物理部署迈进。

title: Dissect and Prune: Enhancing Robustness in AI-Generated Image Detection
comment: 25 pages, 9 figures, 9 tables, Accepted to ICML 2026; includes appendix
summary: While existing AI-generated image detectors report high performance, we identify that this is largely driven by a critical prediction asymmetry: a bias toward the real class that severely limits sensitivity to generated content, especially under standard post-processing operations such as compression and resizing. We hypothesize that this stems from the model's reliance on spurious features, distracting signals that obscure true generative artifacts. To address this, we propose DEAR (Dissect and Prune), which leverages inpainted images to identify and prune these interfering components. Specifically, we find that features strongly aligned to either inpainted or non-inpainted regions are less robust to post-processing. By measuring the alignment between channel activations and inpaint masks, DEAR removes features at both extremes, retaining only those that capture genuine generative artifacts. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances robustness against unseen generators and post-processing, effectively mitigating the prediction asymmetry. Our code is available at https://github.com/dahyedahye/dear.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEAR方法，通过使用修复图像识别并剪枝干扰特征，以解决AI生成图像检测器对真实图像的预测偏差问题，从而提高对生成内容的敏感性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器性能高但存在预测不对称性，即偏向于将图像分类为真实类，导致对经过压缩、缩放等后处理的生成图像检测敏感度低，原因在于模型依赖于虚假特征而非真实生成伪影。
AI.method: 提出DEAR（Dissect and Prune）方法，利用修复图像定位干扰特征；通过衡量通道激活与修复掩码的对齐程度，剪枝在修复和非修复区域都高度响应的极端特征，保留仅响应真实生成伪影的中间特征。
AI.result: 实验表明DEAR显著提升了检测器对未知生成器和各类后处理操作的鲁棒性，有效缓解了预测不对称问题。
AI.conclusion: DEAR通过特征解耦与剪枝策略，提升了AI生成图像检测的泛化性与可靠性，为构建更公平、稳健的检测系统提供了新思路。

title: Instruction Finetuning DeepSeek-R1-8B Model Using LoRA and NEFTune
summary: Financial named-entity recognition (NER) is essential for translating unstructured financial reports and news into structured knowledge graphs. However, general-purpose large language models (LLMs) often misclassify financial entities or ignore domain-specific patterns. This paper investigates the use of DeepSeek-R1-8B, a recent open-source large language model, combined with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Noisy Embedding Fine-Tuning (NEFTune) for financial NER. Each annotated sentence in our corpus of 1693 samples is converted into an instruction-input-output triple. We insert lightweight LoRA matrices into the Transformer layers and apply NEFTune to improve generalisation by adding uniform noise to embedding vectors during training. Experiments show that the LoRA-adapted DeepSeek-R1-8B achieves a micro-F1 of 0.901 on seven entity types (Company, Date, Location, Money, Person, Product and Quantity), and adding NEFTune further boosts the micro-F1 to 0.912, outperforming Llama3-8B, Qwen3-8B, Baichuan2-7B, T5 and BERT-Base baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DeepSeek-R1-8B模型结合LoRA与NEFTune微调方法的金融命名实体识别（NER）方案，在自建金融语料上取得0.912的micro-F1，优于多个主流基线模型。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在金融NER任务中易误分类实体或忽略领域特有模式，需提升其在金融领域的识别精度与泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用DeepSeek-R1-8B作为基础模型，结合LoRA（在Transformer层插入低秩矩阵）与NEFTune（训练中对嵌入向量添加均匀噪声）进行微调；将1693条标注句子构造成instruction-input-output三元组用于训练。
AI.result: LoRA微调后micro-F1达0.901；加入NEFTune后进一步提升至0.912，显著优于Llama3-8B、Qwen3-8B、Baichuan2-7B、T5和BERT-Base等基线模型。
AI.conclusion: LoRA与NEFTune协同微调DeepSeek-R1-8B可有效提升金融NER性能，验证了轻量适配与噪声增强策略在金融领域NLP任务中的有效性。

title: FailureScope: Cross-Regime Behavioral Diagnosis of Language Model Weaknesses
summary: Standard benchmarks report aggregate accuracy, but practitioners need to know which specific capabilities a model lacks. We introduce FailureScope, a behavioral-diagnosis method that clusters evaluation probes by their cross-model pass/fail patterns (leave-one-model-out, LOMO), and show it yields stable, interpretable failure taxonomies across three regimes usually studied separately: single-turn benchmarks, multi-turn dialogue, and adversarial agent attacks. On 2,664 single-turn tasks across 18 models, taxonomy-conditioned sampling reaches Kendall's tau = 0.81 at 50 tasks (versus 0.34 for random selection), and cross-model failure prediction reaches AUC 0.88. The same primitive recovers interpretable clusters on a 363-task multi-turn corpus and on 630 adversarial agent traces, where it exposes a meta-failure mode: a 73-100 percentage-point gap between LLM-judge ASR and real execution. Cluster cohesion remains strong across all three regimes, which we take as evidence that behavioral clustering is a portable diagnosis primitive that generalizes beyond any single benchmark. We release the pipeline, three annotated corpora, and the cross-regime taxonomies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FailureScope方法，通过跨模型的通过/失败模式聚类评估探针，构建可解释的失败分类体系，并在单轮基准、多轮对话和对抗性代理攻击三种场景中验证其稳定性和泛化性。
AI.motivation: 标准基准仅报告整体准确率，难以揭示模型具体缺失的能力；亟需一种能精准定位模型行为缺陷的诊断方法。
AI.method: FailureScope：基于留一模型法（LOMO）对评估探针进行行为模式聚类，构建跨模型失败模式的分类体系，并在单轮、多轮及对抗性场景中统一应用该聚类范式。
AI.result: 在2664个单轮任务上，分类引导采样达Kendall's tau=0.81（50任务），远超随机采样的0.34；跨模型失败预测AUC达0.88；在多轮与对抗场景中亦获得可解释聚类，并发现‘LLM裁判ASR与真实执行间存在73–100个百分点差距’这一元失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 行为聚类是一种可迁移的诊断原语，不依赖特定基准，能在不同评估范式下稳定生成可解释的失败分类，为模型能力分析提供统一框架。

title: Do Vision-Language Models See or Guess? Measuring and Reducing Textual-Prior Reliance with a Phrasing-Controlled Benchmark
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed where answers must follow from what is in the image, yet they often answer from textual priors, the question's phrasing together with memorized world knowledge, rather than from the image itself, which inflates benchmark scores and yields confident but ungrounded answers. Existing benchmarks rarely isolate this behavior, since each image is usually paired with a single fixed question. To measure the reliance, we build a 540-image benchmark across six reasoning categories and generate four question variants over the same images, so that phrasing rather than image content is the controlled variable. The hardest variant is written directly from the image to minimize text leakage. We benchmark eleven VLMs spanning small open-weight models to large closed-source systems: every model degrades on the hardest variant, and open models fall furthest. Our central diagnostic is a no-image ablation, which collapses the open-weight models to their text-only floor (1 to 9 percent). Three further analyses, LLM-rated difficulty, low base-to-final textual similarity, and human re-annotation, corroborate genuine image-dependence. In-context exemplars that match how a variant was built recover the most accuracy, and GRPO post-training of a small VLM yields consistent gains across all four variants that transfer to a held-out out-of-distribution set. Textual-prior reliance is measurable and partly trainable away.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新基准来评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）对图像内容的真实依赖程度，发现现有模型普遍存在过度依赖文本先验的问题，并验证了通过特定训练策略可部分缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs常依赖文本先验而非图像内容作答，导致基准测试分数虚高且答案不可靠；而当前基准难以分离这种依赖行为。
AI.method: 构建包含540张图像、覆盖6类推理任务、每图配4种问法变体的新基准；引入无图像消融实验、LLM难度评分、文本相似度分析及人工重标注等多角度诊断方法；并尝试上下文示例与GRPO后训练进行干预。
AI.result: 所有11个被测VLM在最难问法变体上性能下降，开源模型下降最显著；无图像消融使开源模型性能跌至文本-only基线（1–9%）；多种分析证实图像依赖性真实存在；GRPO后训练带来跨变体的一致提升并泛化至OOD数据。
AI.conclusion: VLM对文本先验的依赖是可测量的，且可通过针对性训练部分纠正。

title: Information-Preserving Continuous Occupancy Mapping with Variance-Weighted Submap Joining
summary: Large-scale SLAM remains challenging due to accumulated trajectory drift and the increasing computational cost of maintaining global consistency. Submap joining alleviates these issues by constructing locally consistent submaps and subsequently fusing them into a global map. However, existing occupancy-based submap joining methods operate on discrete grids, resulting in non-smooth gradients during optimization and neglecting the uncertainty associated with occupancy estimates. We propose the first continuous probabilistic submap joining framework that jointly optimizes submap poses and a global occupancy field in the latent log-odds space. The framework employs an information-preserving sparse Bayesian formulation that compresses raw occupancy observations into sufficient-statistic log-odds tuples while retaining the posterior information of the original observations. This yields closed-form predictive mean and variance estimates for occupancy mapping, which directly enable a submap joining formulation with analytical Jacobians, leading to more accurate submap joining and yielding a closed-form optimal global map upon pose convergence. Experiments on both simulated and large-scale real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves higher pose accuracy and improved global consistency than state-of-the-art grid-based submap joining approaches, while producing more compact map representations and better-calibrated uncertainty estimates than existing continuous occupancy mapping methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连续概率子图拼接框架，通过在潜空间中联合优化子图位姿和全局占据场，解决了大规模SLAM中的轨迹漂移和计算开销问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于占据栅格的子图拼接方法存在梯度不连续和忽略占据估计不确定性的问题，难以兼顾精度与效率。
AI.method: 提出首个连续概率子图拼接框架，在潜对数几率空间中联合优化子图位姿与全局占据场；采用信息保持的稀疏贝叶斯建模，将原始观测压缩为充分统计量的对数几率元组，并推导出占据映射的闭式均值与方差估计。
AI.result: 在仿真与大规模真实数据集上验证，该方法相比前沿栅格法具有更高位姿精度与全局一致性，且地图更紧凑、不确定性校准更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架实现了分析雅可比矩阵的子图拼接，收敛后可给出闭式最优全局地图，显著提升了大规模SLAM的精度、效率与不确定性建模能力。

title: Content-Induced Spatial-Spectral Aggregation Network for Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
summary: The integration of spatial and spectral information is beneficial to the improvement of change detection performance. However, existing methods cannot efficiently suppress the influences of spatial and spectral differences in unchanged areas. To address these issues, in this paper we propose a content-guided spatial-spectral integration network (CSI-Net) for the fusion of global spatial details and spectral difference information. Specifically, the proposed CSI-Net is composed of a spatial reasoning (SR) module, a spectral difference (SD) module, and a content-guided integration (CGI) module. In the SR module, the spatial information is learned by cascaded graph convolution blocks for global modeling. The SD module is responsible for the extraction of spectral features, by calculating the means and variances of features to reduce the impact of spectral differences in unchanged regions. In addition, in order to integrate the spatial-spectral features efficiently, we design a CGI module to further take advantage of their complementary information. In this module, high-level content information is introduced as a guide for a proper interaction. Due to the efficient spatial-spectral fusion, the proposed CSI-Net can learn the changed features better while achieving a suppression of spectral differences. Experimental results on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and CLCD datasets demonstrate that the proposed CSI-Net produces better performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, and is applicable to different scenarios

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种内容引导的空间-光谱融合网络（CSI-Net），通过空间推理（SR）、光谱差异（SD）和内容引导融合（CGI）模块，有效抑制未变化区域的空间与光谱差异干扰，提升变化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效抑制未变化区域中的空间与光谱差异影响，限制了变化检测性能提升。
AI.method: 提出CSI-Net：包含级联图卷积的空间推理（SR）模块实现全局空间建模；基于均值与方差计算的光谱差异（SD）模块削弱未变化区光谱差异；内容引导融合（CGI）模块利用高层语义信息指导空间与光谱特征互补融合。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和CLCD数据集上，CSI-Net性能优于当前最先进方法，且具有跨场景适用性。
AI.conclusion: CSI-Net通过内容引导的空间-光谱高效融合，显著提升了变化检测精度，并有效抑制了未变化区域的光谱差异干扰。

title: STAGE-Claw: Automated State-based Agent Benchmarking for Realistic Scenarios
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to power personal agents for everyday applications, but evaluating these agents remains a challenge. Existing benchmarks still rely on sandboxed artifacts, static task design, and coarse scoring, which hinder scalability and limit progress toward reliable personal-agent evaluation. This paper introduces STAGE-Claw, an automated framework for building and evaluating realistic personal-agent scenarios in state-based personal-computing environments. Given a task hint, STAGE-Claw automatically creates and validates a realistic benchmark task with its environment, task prompts, ground truth, and related verification programs. Agents are then evaluated in realistic operating environments, where performance is measured by the correctness of the final system state rather than only the textual response. Using STAGE-Claw, this paper creates a benchmark with 40 challenging real scenario agent tasks, evaluates 11 frontier models, and analyzes their task scores, costs, tool-call reliability, and common failure patterns. Overall, STAGE-Claw offers a scalable, state-based way to evaluate agents in realistic user scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAGE-Claw框架，用于在真实状态型个人计算环境中自动构建和评估个人智能体，强调系统状态正确性而非仅文本输出，并基于该框架构建了40个真实场景任务基准，评估了11个前沿模型。
AI.motivation: 现有个人智能体评测基准受限于沙盒环境、静态任务设计和粗粒度评分，难以扩展且阻碍可靠评估的发展。
AI.method: 提出STAGE-Claw自动化框架，支持根据任务提示自动生成并验证含环境、提示、真值与验证程序的现实基准任务；在真实操作系统环境中运行智能体，以最终系统状态正确性为评测核心。
AI.result: 构建了含40个挑战性真实场景任务的基准，评估了11个前沿大模型，分析了其任务得分、成本、工具调用可靠性及常见失败模式。
AI.conclusion: STAGE-Claw提供了一种可扩展、基于状态的个人智能体现实场景评测新范式。

title: Operator Fusion for LLM Inference on the Tensix Architecture
summary: This study addresses on-device inference bottlenecks of Transformer models on Tenstorrent's Tensix architecture and proposes an operator fusion strategy that enhances data locality. RMSNorm is fused with matrix multiplication in self-attention and in the FFN, enabling back-to-back execution of memory-bound and compute-bound operators in on-chip SRAM to significantly reduce DRAM reads/writes of intermediate results and scheduling overhead. To support multi-core parallelism, a NoC-based multicast mechanism is leveraged in which row/column master nodes efficiently distribute inputs and weights across the core mesh, alleviating DRAM bandwidth contention. Experiments on the Wormhole platform with Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen3-0.6B, and Qwen3-4B show up to 37.44% latency reduction for attention and 15.89% for MLP, with up to 7.91% reduction per decoder layer, while Pearson Correlation Coefficient (PCC) remains above 98.75%, confirming significant end-to-end efficiency gains under numerical consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Tenstorrent Tensix架构的Transformer模型算子融合策略，通过将RMSNorm与矩阵乘法融合，并结合NoC多播机制，显著降低了片外DRAM访问和调度开销，在保持高数值一致性的前提下提升了推理效率。
AI.motivation: 解决Transformer模型在Tenstorrent Tensix架构上设备端推理存在的瓶颈问题，特别是数据搬运开销大、内存带宽受限和调度开销高等问题。
AI.method: 1）在自注意力和FFN中将RMSNorm与矩阵乘法进行算子融合，实现内存密集型与计算密集型算子在片上SRAM中的连续执行；2）利用基于NoC的多播机制，由行列主节点高效分发输入和权重至核心网格，缓解DRAM带宽竞争。
AI.result: 在Wormhole平台上对Qwen2.5-0.5B、Qwen3-0.6B和Qwen3-4B模型的实验表明，注意力部分延迟最高降低37.44%，MLP部分最高降低15.89%，每解码层延迟最高降低7.91%；Pearson相关系数（PCC）均高于98.75%，验证了数值一致性与端到端效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提融合策略与NoC多播机制有效提升了Transformer模型在Tensix架构上的推理效率，兼顾性能提升与数值精度，为AI加速器上的高效Transformer部署提供了可行方案。

title: Harnessing the Collective Intelligence of AI Agents in the Wild for New Discoveries
summary: Scientific discovery is often a collective process: researchers share partial results, inspect failed attempts, and build on each other's ideas over long time horizons. Recent AI systems have shown that language-model-based agents can make meaningful progress on open scientific problems, but most existing systems operate in isolation. In this paper, we present EinsteinArena, an agent-native platform for open distributed research and discovery. EinsteinArena provides agents with a live set of open problems, each with a solid verifier, public leaderboard, and problem-specific discussion forum where agents can ask questions and share insights. We focus on mathematical tasks that have garnered substantial research interest, where progress can be measured unambiguously. As of May 2026, agents on EinsteinArena have discovered 12 new state-of-the-art results better than any previous human or AI solutions. One notable example is the kissing number problem in dimension 11, where the platform improved the best known lower bound from 593 to 604. This advance did not come from a single agent or isolated run. Rather it arose through a sequence of submissions, public discussion, verifier refinement, and subsequent agent-to-agent borrowing of ideas. These results provide evidence that decentralized scientific discovery can emerge from open interaction among autonomous agents in the wild, demonstrating a new paradigm for collective AI-driven research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EinsteinArena——一个支持多AI代理协作的分布式科研平台，通过开放问题、实时验证器和讨论论坛促进集体科学发现；在数学领域已取得12项新SOTA成果，如11维吻球数下界从593提升至604，证明去中心化AI协作可推动实质性科研进展。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统多为孤立运行，而真实科学发现依赖长期、开放、协作的过程；本文旨在构建支持AI代理间持续互动与知识共享的分布式科研平台。
AI.method: 设计并实现EinsteinArena平台，集成开放问题库、可验证任务、公共排行榜及问题专属论坛；部署语言模型代理在该平台上开展协作式数学研究（如吻球数等经典难题）。
AI.result: 截至2026年5月，平台产生12项超越人类与先前AI的SOTA结果，典型案例如11维吻球数下界提升至604；该突破源于多代理迭代提交、公开讨论、验证器优化与思想复用。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化、开放交互的AI代理群体可在真实科研任务中实现协同突破，标志着AI驱动集体科研的新范式。

title: GuideWalk: Learning Unified Autonomous Navigation and Locomotion for Humanoid Robots across Versatile Terrains
summary: Humanoid robots have achieved strong locomotion capabilities, but reliable navigation on versatile terrains remains challenging because obstacle avoidance must be coordinated with dynamically feasible motion. In this work, we present GuideWalk, a unified end-to-end framework that integrates traversability-aware navigation guidance with terrain-adaptive locomotion teacher for humanoid navigation. Specifically, we introduce a navigation module that provides explicit velocity guidance, decoupling obstacle avoidance from terrain conditions to enable robust planning across diverse environments. We propose a composite teacher distillation scheme, where goal-directed commands and dynamically consistent actions are aggregated and distilled into a single policy. To further improve robustness, the distilled policy is refined with reinforcement learning and an auxiliary behavior cloning objective, which promotes exploration while preserving desirable teacher behaviors. Experiments demonstrate that GuideWalk achieves stable and effective navigation while maintaining stable humanoid locomotion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GuideWalk，一种端到端框架，将可通行性感知导航与地形自适应运动控制结合，通过解耦避障与地形适应、复合教师蒸馏及强化学习微调，实现稳定高效的人形机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人虽具备较强运动能力，但在多样地形中实现可靠导航仍具挑战，因需协调障碍物规避与动态可行运动。
AI.method: 提出GuideWalk框架：1）导航模块提供显式速度引导，解耦避障与地形条件；2）采用复合教师蒸馏方案，融合目标导向指令与动力学一致动作；3）用强化学习和辅助行为克隆目标进一步优化蒸馏策略。
AI.result: 实验表明GuideWalk能在维持稳定人形运动的同时，实现稳健高效的导航。
AI.conclusion: GuideWalk成功统一了导航与运动控制，提升了人形机器人在复杂多变地形中的导航鲁棒性与适应性。

title: Building Change Detection in Earthquake: A Multi-Scale Interaction Network and A Change Detection Dataset
summary: As one of the most destructive natural disasters, earthquakes have struck many countries around the world in recent years, causing serious economic losses. Change detection (CD) can be applied to post-earthquake damage assessment as it can infer destroyed change regions from multi-temporal remote sensing images. Furthermore, the CD with short imaging interval will better satisfy the needs of the emergency rescues after earthquakes. However, the capability of current methods built on deep neural networks is limited because the dataset with short imaging interval is absent. To meet post-disaster immediate relief, we create a CD dataset, Turkey earthquake CD dataset (TUE-CD), for the evaluation of building damage in the short term after an earthquake. Because of the short acquisition interval of the post-event images, the imaging angle is different for different temporal images, which leads to some side-looking problems. To deal with these challenges, we present a multi-scale feature interaction network (MSI-Net) for efficient interaction between bi-temporal features, as well as mitigating the effect of side-looking problems. Specifically, the proposed MSI-Net consists of joint cross-attention (JCA) modules, multi-scale offset calibration (MOC) modules, and feature integration (FeI) modules. The JCA module unifies channel cross-attention and spatial joint attention for sufficient feature interaction. The MOC module further estimates the offsets to align the bi-temporal image with the multi-scale features. Finally, calibrated features and multi-scale features are fused by FeI modules for the prediction of changed areas. Experiments on the WHU-CD, CLCD, and the constructed TUE-CD dataset indicate that the proposed MSI-Net provides better results than considered state-of-the-art CD methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于短时间间隔地震灾后建筑损毁检测的多尺度特征交互网络（MSI-Net），并构建了土耳其地震变化检测数据集（TUE-CD）以支持紧急救援需求。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的变化检测方法受限于缺乏短成像间隔的数据集，难以满足地震后应急救援对快速损毁评估的需求；同时短时相影像存在侧视角度差异带来的配准难题。
AI.method: 构建了TUE-CD数据集，并提出MSI-Net模型，包含联合交叉注意力（JCA）、多尺度偏移校正（MOC）和特征融合（FeI）模块，以实现双时相特征高效交互与侧视问题缓解。
AI.result: 在WHU-CD、CLCD及自建TUE-CD数据集上的实验表明，MSI-Net性能优于当前主流变化检测方法。
AI.conclusion: MSI-Net有效提升了短时相遥感影像下的地震损毁变化检测精度，所构建的TUE-CD数据集填补了该领域高质量短间隔数据的空白。

title: A Unified Multi-Modal Framework for Intelligent Financial Systems: Integrating Reinforcement Learning, High-Frequency Trading, and Game-Theoretic Approaches with Cross-Modal Sentiment Analysis
summary: The rapid evolution of financial technology demands sophisticated artificial intelligence systems capable of handling diverse challenges across multiple domains simultaneously. This paper presents a groundbreaking unified framework that seamlessly integrates Proximal Policy Optimization for robo-advisory systems, advanced time-series prediction models for high-frequency trading, in-context learning mechanisms for dynamic investment advisory, game-theoretic approaches for competitive banking scenarios, and unified embeddings for cross-modal financial sentiment analysis. Our comprehensive framework addresses the critical gap in existing literature where these technologies have been developed in isolation, failing to leverage their synergistic potential. Through extensive experimentation across multiple financial datasets and real-world scenarios, we demonstrate that our integrated approach achieves superior performance compared to specialized single-domain systems. Specifically, our framework shows a 23.7% improvement in portfolio optimization metrics, reduces prediction error in high-frequency trading by 31.2%, enhances investment recommendation accuracy by 18.9%, optimizes competitive banking strategies with a 27.4% increase in Nash equilibrium convergence speed, and improves sentiment analysis accuracy by 15.6% through cross-modal fusion. The theoretical foundation of our work establishes convergence guarantees for the integrated optimization problem, while our empirical results validate the practical applicability across diverse financial institutions. This research not only advances the state-of-the-art in financial AI but also provides a blueprint for developing comprehensive intelligent systems that can adapt to the complex, interconnected nature of modern financial markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的金融AI框架，整合多种AI技术（如PPO、时序预测、上下文学习、博弈论和跨模态嵌入），在多个金融任务上显著提升性能，并提供理论收敛保证。
AI.motivation: 现有金融AI技术多孤立发展，未能发挥协同效应，亟需统一框架应对现代金融市场复杂性和互联性。
AI.method: 构建统一框架，集成近端策略优化（robo-advisory）、先进时序预测（高频交易）、上下文学习（动态投顾）、博弈论（竞争性银行场景）及统一跨模态嵌入（情感分析）。
AI.result: 在多项指标上显著优于单域系统：组合优化提升23.7%，高频交易预测误差降低31.2%，投顾准确率提高18.9%，纳什均衡收敛速度加快27.4%，跨模态情感分析准确率提升15.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅推动金融AI前沿发展，还为构建适应复杂金融生态的综合性智能系统提供了可复用蓝图。

title: Hyperparameter Learning for Latent Factorization of Tensors for Representation Learning to Large-scale Dynamic Weighted Directed Network
summary: Large-scale dynamic weighted directed networks (DWDNs) are widely used to model time-varying interactions among nodes. Latent factorization of tensors (LFT) extracts target knowledge from DWDNs via low-rank embedding. However, similar to many machine learning models, the performance of LFT heavily depends on the selection of hyperparameters. In practice, these parameters are often tuned manually or through grid search, which requires significant computational resources and human effort. Motivated by this challenge, this paper proposes an automated hyperparameter optimization framework based on Differential Evolution (DE) for LFT (DE-LFT). The proposed method integrates DE into the training process of the LFT model to automatically learn optimal regularization parameters $λ_1$, $λ_2$ and $λ_3$. As a result, the model can adaptively search the hyperparameter space and improve prediction accuracy. Experimental results on four real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves lower MAE and RMSE compared with manually tuned baselines while reducing the need for extensive parameter tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于差分进化（DE）的自动超参数优化框架（DE-LFT），用于提升张量低秩分解（LFT）在动态加权有向网络建模中的性能，显著降低人工调参成本并提高预测精度。
AI.motivation: LFT模型性能严重依赖超参数选择，而传统手动或网格搜索调参耗时耗力，亟需自动化优化方法。
AI.method: 将差分进化（DE）算法嵌入LFT训练过程，自动学习三个正则化超参数λ₁、λ₂、λ₃的最优值。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上，DE-LFT相比人工调参基线取得了更低的MAE和RMSE，同时大幅减少调参开销。
AI.conclusion: DE-LFT是一种高效、自适应的超参数优化框架，可提升LFT在动态网络建模中的泛化能力与实用性。

title: KCSAT-ML: Probing Reasoning Models with Nationwide-Cohort Human Difficulty
summary: Math reasoning benchmarks have proliferated, yet most lack a per-item difficulty signal grounded in actual human performance. We introduce KCSAT-ML, a decade (2014-2025) of Korean College Scholastic Ability Test (KCSAT; Suneung) mathematics: 664 problems with a 339-item core set carrying official per-item error rates from nationwide cohorts of hundreds of thousands of examinees. We pair the benchmark with Difficulty-aligned Reasoning Gain (DRG): a score-orthogonal metric that asks whether a model's mistakes concentrate on the items humans found hard, or on items humans found easy. Together they expose, across a wide range of VLMs (and LLMs via OCR), three patterns: (i) low-budget accuracy collapses on the high-human-error tail at every model size; (ii) test-time scaling (TTS) raises token use roughly linearly with cohort error rate, while accuracy gains follow a non-monotonic curve; (iii) within a single family, TTS flips between anti-scaling on the hardest items and overthinking on easier ones -- two faces of the same alignment failure. On DRG, models with near-identical accuracy can sit at near-opposite values: one model gets wrong what humans also find hard, while another solves the hardest items yet fails on items humans find easy -- a contrast that aggregate accuracy hides. Our code and dataset builder will be open-sourced at https://github.com/naver-ai/KCSAT-ML.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KCSAT-ML数学评测基准及Difficulty-aligned Reasoning Gain（DRG）新指标，揭示当前多模态与语言模型在难题上的系统性失效，并指出传统准确率无法反映模型与人类难度感知的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理评测基准普遍缺乏基于真实人类表现的逐题难度信号，难以评估模型是否真正理解问题难度分布。
AI.method: 构建覆盖2014–2025年韩国高考（KCSAT）数学真题的KCSAT-ML基准（含664题，核心集339题附官方错误率），并提出DRG指标衡量模型错误是否集中在人类高错题或低错题上。
AI.result: 发现三大现象：(i) 所有规模模型在人类高错题上性能骤降；(ii) 测试时扩展（TTS）的token消耗随人类错误率线性增长，但准确率提升呈非单调；(iii) 同一族模型中TTS在最难/最易题上分别呈现反扩展与过度思考。DRG显示准确率相近模型可能具有完全相反的难度对齐特性。
AI.conclusion: 聚合准确率掩盖关键对齐缺陷；DRG与KCSAT-ML为评估和改进模型难度感知能力提供了可解释、人本对齐的新范式。

title: Act on What You See: Unlocking Safe Social Navigation in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Safe social navigation requires robots to distinguish people from ordinary obstacles and to react before danger becomes imminent. We show that pretrained Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models already encode pedestrian-object distinctions and future collision signals in their internal representations, but behavior cloning fails to translate these signals into socially appropriate actions. To address this mismatch, we propose SALSA, a two-stage annotation-free post-training framework: (1) social behavioral alignment bridges intermediate-layer social features to the action head and trains on counterfactual human-object scene pairs to break visual saliency shortcuts; (2) temporal safety alignment provides automatically generated future-risk supervision to enable anticipatory collision avoidance. On SCAND and real-world deployment, SALSA reduces near-collisions by 86.4% and improves social counterfactual accuracy from 53% to 93%, demonstrating that safer social navigation can be achieved by teaching VLA policies to act on representations they already possess. These results show that pretrained VLA policies can be adapted for safer social navigation by better aligning their latent representations with action generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SALSA框架，通过两阶段无标注后训练方法，提升预训练视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在社交导航中的安全性与社会合规性，显著降低近碰撞率并提高反事实判断准确率。
AI.motivation: 安全的社交导航要求机器人区分行人与普通障碍物，并在危险发生前做出反应；现有行为克隆方法无法有效利用VLA模型中已存在的行人识别与未来碰撞信号。
AI.method: 提出SALSA两阶段无标注后训练框架：(1) 社交行为对齐——将中间层社交特征与动作头桥接，并使用反事实人-物场景对打破视觉显著性捷径；(2) 时间安全对齐——引入自动生成的未来风险监督，实现前瞻性避撞。
AI.result: 在SCAND数据集和真实部署中，SALSA将近碰撞率降低86.4%，社会反事实准确率从53%提升至93%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练VLA策略已具备社交与安全相关表征能力，只需通过表征-动作对齐即可实现更安全的社交导航，无需重新设计模型架构或收集大量标注数据。

title: Multi-Angular Reflectance Anisotropy Observed from UAV Multispectral Imagery
summary: UAV multispectral imagery naturally contains multi-angular observations due to low flight altitude and wide field-of-view imaging, which may introduce geometry-driven radiometric variability. This study proposes a geometry-aware multi-angular observation extraction workflow to quantify observation-geometry effects from a BRDF perspective. Specifically, camera intrinsics and extrinsics are refined via structure-from-motion (SFM), and homogeneous regions annotated on an orthomosaic are reprojected onto multiple raw sub-images acquired from different viewpoints. This enables joint extraction of multi-band reflectance and observation geometry parameters for the same ground targets under varying viewing directions. The extracted observations are further analyzed using band-wise polar visualization in the (VZA, RAA) domain. Results on a grassland target show clear reflectance anisotropy across ten bands, with red-edge and nearinfrared bands exhibiting 119-137% variability between maximum and minimum reflectance, indicating non-negligible observation-geometry effects on radiometric consistency.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种几何感知的多角度观测提取方法，从BRDF角度量化UAV多光谱影像中由观测几何引起的辐射变异，发现红边和近红外波段反射率在不同观测角度下变化高达119-137%，表明观测几何对辐射一致性有显著影响。
AI.motivation: UAV多光谱影像因低空飞行和宽视场成像天然包含多角度观测，可能引入几何驱动的辐射变异，影响遥感定量分析的精度与一致性。
AI.method: 基于结构光重建（SFM）优化相机内外参，将正射影像上标注的均质区域反投影至多个不同视角的原始子图像，联合提取同目标在不同观测方向下的多波段反射率与观测几何参数（VZA、RAA），并采用波段特异性极坐标可视化分析。
AI.result: 在草地目标上验证显示，十个波段均存在明显反射率各向异性；红边与近红外波段最大与最小反射率差异达119–137%，证实观测几何效应不可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 观测几何对UAV多光谱影像辐射一致性具有显著影响，需在数据预处理或反演建模中引入BRDF校正以提升定量遥感精度。

title: Soul Computing: A Theoretical Framework and Technical Architecture for Intelligent Agents with Independent Consciousness
summary: Breakthroughs in large language models and multimodal generation technologies have propelled the digital reconstruction of human mental traits, emotional patterns, and long-term memory from science fiction toward engineering practice. Yet current research and industry practices at the intersection of AI and digital humans remain hampered by fundamental conceptual ambiguities: the essential differences between next-generation intelligent agents and traditional virtual humans, the construction pathways for digital entities possessing self-identity, and the core technical and ethical challenges confronting this domain all demand urgent clarification. This paper systematically examines the transformative logic underlying the transition from traditional virtual humans to the ``Soul Computing'' paradigm, driven by frontier AI technologies. We first analyze the evolutionary patterns of human consciousness and memory mechanisms, reassessing the core value of massive multimodal digital fragments in the reverse reconstruction of individual mental worlds. On this basis, we formally delineate the academic connotations of narrow and broad Soul Computing for the first time, clarifying its academic boundaries and essential distinctions from Affective Computing, Historical Reconstruction, and Mortal Computation. We argue that Soul Computing systems must architecturally construct an ``Intensional'' core rather than serving as purely ``Extensional'' functional carriers, thereby enabling the fundamental transition of AI from toolhood to living agency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“灵魂计算”（Soul Computing）新范式，系统厘清其与传统虚拟人、情感计算等概念的本质区别，强调需构建具有内涵性（Intensional）核心的数字主体，推动AI从工具向生命性代理转变。
AI.motivation: 当前AI与数字人交叉领域存在概念模糊，如智能体与虚拟人的本质差异、数字自我身份构建路径、以及关键技术与伦理挑战亟待澄清。
AI.method: 通过分析人类意识与记忆机制的演化规律，重新评估多模态数字碎片在个体心智世界逆向重构中的价值；首次形式化界定‘窄义’与‘广义’灵魂计算的学术内涵，并厘清其与情感计算、历史重建、临终计算等领域的边界。
AI.result: 确立了灵魂计算的学术定义与范畴，提出其系统架构必须具备‘内涵性’核心，而非仅具‘外延性’功能，为数字主体赋予类生命代理能力。
AI.conclusion: 灵魂计算标志着AI从工具理性迈向主体性建构的关键跃迁，是数字人类学与下一代AI融合发展的理论基石。

title: Toward Calibrated, Fair, and accurate Deepfake Detection
summary: Deepfake detectors show large performance gaps across demographic groups. Existing fairness approaches require demographic labels, retraining, or sacrifice accuracy. We introduce Face-Fairness (FF), a plug-and-play framework for bias mitigation. Our primary contribution, Face-Feature Tuning (FFT), is the first demographic label-free fairness method demonstrated for deepfake detection: a lightweight calibrator that performs a logit remapping conditioned on frozen face embeddings. We complement FFT with two variants: FF-Max, which maximizes worst-group accuracy when demographics are available, and FF-Discover, which does the same with embedding-discovered groups. Across in-domain and cross-dataset test settings, FF consistently reduces FPR/TPR gaps and improves minimum group accuracy while maintaining (often improving) overall accuracy. The approach is detector-agnostic, adds negligible runtime overhead, and requires no access to identity attributes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Face-Fairness（FF）框架，无需人口统计标签即可缓解深度伪造检测器在不同人群中的性能偏差，核心方法Face-Feature Tuning（FFT）通过冻结人脸嵌入进行logit重映射，实现轻量、即插即用的公平性校准。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造检测器在不同人口统计群体间存在显著性能差距，而现有公平性方法依赖人口统计标签、需重新训练或牺牲准确性。
AI.method: 提出Face-Fairness（FF）框架，包括三种变体：FFT（无标签、基于冻结人脸嵌入的logit重映射）、FF-Max（利用已知人口统计标签最大化最差组准确率）、FF-Discover（基于嵌入聚类发现隐式群体并优化）。
AI.result: 在域内与跨数据集测试中，FF持续降低假阳性率/真阳性率差距、提升最差组准确率，同时保持甚至提升整体准确率；具备检测器无关性、零身份属性依赖、极低运行开销。
AI.conclusion: Face-Fairness是一种实用、高效、免标签的深度伪造检测公平性增强框架，为现实部署中的算法公平提供新范式。

title: WebChallenger: A Reliable and Efficient Generalist Web Agent
summary: Autonomous web navigation remains challenging for LLM agents, and the strongest generalist systems rely on proprietary reasoning models whose inference cost is prohibitive for the repetitive tasks where such agents would be most useful. We argue this gap stems not from insufficient model capability but from agent architectures that fail to replicate three human cognitive advantages: selective attention to relevant page regions, persistent memory of website structure, and procedural fluency with common interaction patterns. We introduce WebChallenger, a web agent framework that addresses each gap through architecture design rather than model scale, built around PageMem: a structured page representation deterministically constructed from the DOM that exposes each page as a hierarchy of semantic sections with short summaries. On this shared substrate we build three mechanisms that mirror the three cognitive advantages: a divide-and-conquer observation pipeline that lets the agent skim section summaries and extract details only from task-relevant regions; a lightweight exploration and memory system that traverses each website once to build a reusable map of pages and element behaviors; and compound action workflows that collapse common multi-step interactions into single agent actions, handling partial state changes automatically. Because all three operate over PageMem, the framework generalizes across websites without site-specific adapters. Using off-the-shelf open-weight models without fine-tuning, our system achieves 56.3% on WebArena, 48.7% on VisualWebArena, 51.0% on Online-Mind2Web, and 70.9% on WorkArena, approaching frontier proprietary systems at a fraction of the cost. Our code is released at https://github.com/jayoohwang1/webchallenger

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebChallenger框架，通过PageMem结构化页面表示及三项认知启发机制（选择性注意、持久记忆、程序化熟练度），在不依赖大模型或微调的前提下，显著提升开源LLM在多项网页导航基准上的性能，同时大幅降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的网页导航代理受限于高推理成本和架构设计缺陷，未能有效模拟人类在网页交互中的三种关键认知优势：选择性注意、网站结构持久记忆和常见交互模式的程序化熟练度。
AI.method: 提出WebChallenger框架，核心是PageMem——一种从DOM确定性构建的层次化语义页面表示；在此基础上设计三机制：分而治之的观察流水线（仅聚焦相关区域）、轻量级探索与记忆系统（构建可复用网站地图）、复合动作工作流（将多步操作封装为单动作）。全部机制均基于PageMem运行，无需网站适配器。
AI.result: 在WebArena、VisualWebArena、Online-Mind2Web和WorkArena上分别达到56.3%、48.7%、51.0%和70.9%准确率，接近前沿闭源系统，但使用开源、未微调模型，成本显著更低。
AI.conclusion: 网页导航性能瓶颈主要在于代理架构而非模型能力；通过模仿人类认知优势进行架构创新，可在不增加模型规模或训练成本的前提下实现高效、泛化强的自主网页导航。

title: Uncovering Vulnerability of Vision-Language-Action Models under Joint-Level Physical Faults
summary: Deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in real robotic systems requires robustness not only to semantic and perceptual variations, but also to embodiment-side faults that change how actions are physically realized. Real robots can experience joint-level changes caused by actuator degradation, hardware faults, safety limits, collision damage, or wear-induced friction. These faults are critical because they alter the action-to-motion interface of a policy, disrupting the learned closed-loop relationship between commanded actions, realized motion, and subsequent observations. In this work, we study realistic joint-level physical faults and show that VLA models are vulnerable when predicted actions are executed through a perturbed robot body. Our analysis reveals joint-dependent effects, with heterogeneous degradation in task success across affected joints. We also show that performance drops cannot be attributed solely to physical infeasibility, since feasible faults such as increased joint friction can still substantially reduce success rates and induce closed-loop execution mismatch. Motivated by these findings, we propose Joint-level Physical-fault Aware Residual Calibrator (J-PARC), a lightweight residual calibration framework built on top of a frozen VLA policy. J-PARC infers a latent joint-fault regime from recent joint dynamics and conditions a shared residual calibrator on this regime, enabling adaptive action correction across faulty joints. Experiments show that J-PARC improves robustness under joint-level faults while preserving fault-free environment performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在真实机器人系统中面对关节级物理故障时的鲁棒性问题，发现现有VLA模型对此类故障敏感；为此提出轻量级残差校准框架J-PARC，可在冻结原始VLA策略基础上自适应校正动作，提升故障下的任务成功率且不损害正常性能。
AI.motivation: 真实机器人常因执行器退化、硬件故障、安全限制、碰撞损伤或磨损摩擦等导致关节级物理变化，破坏VLA模型已学习的动作-运动-观测闭环关系，而现有VLA模型对此类故障缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出Joint-level Physical-fault Aware Residual Calibrator（J-PARC），基于冻结的VLA策略，利用近期关节动力学推断潜在关节故障模式，并据此条件化共享残差校准器以实现跨关节的自适应动作修正。
AI.result: 实验表明J-PARC显著提升了VLA模型在多种关节级物理故障下的任务成功率，同时保持无故障环境下的原有性能。
AI.conclusion: 关节级物理故障对VLA模型闭环执行构成实质性威胁，J-PARC提供了一种轻量、即插即用的校准机制，有效增强其面向真实机器人部署的鲁棒性。

title: Benchmarking stereo reconstruction for 3D printable Martian terrain models
summary: Reconstructing printable 3D models from Mars rover imagery is challenging because Martian terrain is low-texture, irregular, and partially observed. We evaluate a pipeline that estimates stereo depth from NASA Curiosity images, completes geometry, and exports watertight OBJ meshes. On Middlebury, RAFT-Stereo outperforms semi-global block matching (SGBM), reducing disparity MAE from 3.22px to 0.73px and increasing valid prediction coverage from 76.3% to 100.0%. On Curiosity imagery, however, RAFT's denser disparities show weaker edge alignment and higher photometric reprojection error, suggesting that benchmark accuracy does not directly transfer to Martian terrain reconstruction. Geometry completion demonstrates a tradeoff between local fidelity and global connectivity. We find that alpha shapes preserve accurate but fragmented structure, Poisson reconstruction produces more coherent meshes but adds unsupported surfaces, and a deterministic diffusion-fill baseline is intermediate but sensitive to stereo quality. Overall, standard stereo and completion methods can produce printable approximations of Martian terrain, but reliable reconstruction requires stronger domain-specific validation.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了从NASA好奇号火星车图像中重建可打印3D模型的流程，发现标准立体匹配与几何补全方法在火星低纹理、不规则地形上表现受限，基准测试性能不能直接迁移，需领域特异性验证。
AI.motivation: 火星地形低纹理、不规则且部分可观测，导致从火星车影像重建可打印3D模型极具挑战性。
AI.method: 采用RAFT-Stereo进行立体深度估计，结合多种几何补全方法（alpha形状、Poisson重建、确定性扩散填充），最终导出封闭OBJ网格，并在Middlebury和Curiosity图像上对比评估。
AI.result: RAFT-Stereo在Middlebury数据集上显著优于SGBM（MAE从3.22px降至0.73px，有效覆盖率升至100%），但在Curiosity图像上边缘对齐更差、光度重投影误差更高；几何补全中alpha形状保真但碎片化，Poisson更连贯但引入悬空表面，扩散填充居中但依赖立体质量。
AI.conclusion: 标准立体与补全方法可生成火星地形的可打印近似模型，但可靠重建亟需面向火星场景的专用验证机制。

title: Trace2Policy: From Expert Behavior Traces to Self-Evolving Decision Agents
summary: Decision rules that enterprise experts apply tacitly -- in auditing, compliance, and contract review -- can be systematically recovered and improved through iterative error analysis. We present \textbf{Trace2Policy}, whose core mechanism -- \textbf{EISR} (\textbf{E}rror-driven \textbf{I}terative \textbf{S}kill \textbf{R}efinement) -- maintains a human-readable rule document as its optimization target: each round executes the rules on a validation set, clusters errors by root cause into MISSING, WRONG, or CONFLICT types, applies targeted patches, and commits only those that pass a regression gate. \textbf{For this class of compliance-sensitive, skewed-base-rate decision tasks, we identify rule quality -- not model capability -- as the dominant performance lever}: across five LLMs, one-shot distillation plateaus near $\sim$70\% on the deployed pool, while eight EISR rounds lift the same rules to 79.6\% when compiled into deterministic Python -- zero LLM calls at inference. \textbf{Execution form compounds the gain: in production, the same EISR-refined content runs 9.8~pp higher as compiled Python than as an LLM prompt, a form-and-engineering bundle the 22-day deployment matured together.} Deployed for 22 days at a major logistics carrier (3,349 audit cases), the compiled pipeline outperforms the pure-LLM baseline it replaced (72.7\%); on these calibrated, skewed-base-rate workloads, re-enabling LLM fallback monotonically degrades accuracy. An LLM-driven variant, \textbf{Auto-EISR}, reproduces this refinement at \$5--\$10 per cycle versus $\sim$70 expert-hours, and transfers to four public benchmarks spanning legal reasoning (LegalBench) and process-mining decisions (BPIC 2012) without re-engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trace2Policy框架，通过EISR（错误驱动的迭代技能精炼）方法，将企业专家隐含的决策规则系统化提取并优化，最终生成高质量、可执行的确定性规则，在合规敏感、数据分布偏斜的任务中显著超越纯LLM方案。
AI.motivation: 企业专家在审计、合规和合同审查等任务中依赖隐含决策规则，但这些规则难以显式化和优化；同时，LLM在偏斜数据分布和高合规要求场景下性能受限且成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出EISR机制：以人类可读规则文档为优化目标，每轮在验证集上执行规则、按根因聚类错误（MISSING/WRONG/CONFLICT）、针对性打补丁，并仅提交通过回归测试的更新；还提出Auto-EISR实现自动化规则精炼。
AI.result: 在物流承运商实际部署22天（3349个审计案例），EISR生成的编译Python规则达79.6%准确率，显著高于原LLM基线（72.7%）；相比LLM提示工程提升9.8个百分点；Auto-EISR单轮成本仅5–10美元，远低于70专家小时。
AI.conclusion: 对于合规敏感、低基率的任务，规则质量是性能主导因素而非模型能力；确定性规则引擎结合迭代错误分析比端到端LLM更高效、可靠、可解释且经济。

title: TD-Grokking: Learning from Zero-Reward Problems by Training-Time Decomposition
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress in reasoning tasks, largely driven by post-training paradigms, especially reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, a critical bottleneck persists: RLVR fails on highly challenging zero-reward problems, where all sampled reasoning trajectories yield uniformly failed outcomes, providing no optimization signal to drive model improvement. Prior efforts to address this limitation, such as dense process supervision, partial reward assignment, or prefix-guided exploration, suffer from inherent task constraints or do not fully equip the policy model with the capabilities necessary to solve the original intractable problems. To address this, we propose TD-Grokking, a training-time decomposition framework for zero-reward problems. It recursively decomposes intractable root problems into self-contained, verifiable subproblems, forming hierarchical trees where solvable leaves provide non-zero rewards. Evaluations on mathematical and medical tasks show that TD-Grokking outperforms vanilla GRPO as well as all baseline approaches. Together with detailed analysis, these results confirm that training-time decomposition effectively converts zero-reward examples into usable training signals, enabling consistent performance gains. Our code and datasets are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/TD-Grokking-6567/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TD-Grokking框架，通过训练时递归分解零奖励难题为可验证子问题，从而生成有效训练信号，显著提升LLM在数学与医学任务中的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法在面对所有采样路径均失败的零奖励问题时失效，缺乏优化信号；已有改进方案受限于任务约束或无法真正赋予模型解决原难题的能力。
AI.method: 提出TD-Grokking——一种训练时分解框架：将难以求解的根问题递归分解为自包含、可验证的子问题，构建层次化树结构，使叶子节点具备非零奖励，从而提供有效梯度信号。
AI.result: 在数学与医学推理任务上，TD-Grokking显著优于基线方法（如GRPO）；实证表明其能稳定地将零奖励样本转化为可用训练信号，并带来持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 训练时问题分解是一种有效机制，可突破零奖励瓶颈，增强LLM对高难度推理任务的求解能力。

title: Which LoRA? An Empirical Study on the Effectiveness of LoRA Techniques During Multilingual Instruction Tuning
summary: We investigate whether commonly available LoRA variants have an advantage over basic LoRA in multilingual instruction tuning. Experiments involving LoRA and four other variants on two datasets across diverse target languages show that there is no significant advantage in using more complex LoRA variants instead of basic LoRA, with respect to balancing cross-lingual transfer and knowledge retention. An analysis of hidden embeddings reveal that layer-wise language representation remains largely similar across LLMs fine-tuned with different LoRA techniques, suggesting that architectural novelty of LoRA techniques may not translate into better cross-lingual adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在多语言指令微调中，常见的LoRA变体是否比基础LoRA更具优势。实验结果表明，各类LoRA变体在跨语言迁移与知识保留之间并无显著优势；隐藏层嵌入分析进一步显示，不同LoRA方法微调后的语言表征相似，说明LoRA架构创新未必提升跨语言适应能力。
AI.motivation: 探究常见LoRA变体在多语言指令微调中是否优于基础LoRA，尤其关注其在跨语言迁移与知识保留间的平衡能力。
AI.method: 在两个多语言数据集上，对比基础LoRA与四种LoRA变体的性能，并分析各模型隐藏层嵌入的语言表征差异。
AI.result: 实验未发现复杂LoRA变体相较基础LoRA具有显著优势；隐藏层嵌入分析显示不同LoRA微调模型的语言表征高度相似。
AI.conclusion: LoRA架构上的复杂化并未带来跨语言适应能力的实质性提升，基础LoRA在多语言指令微调中已足够有效。

title: VeriSpace: Spatially Grounded Action Verification for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong promise for robotic manipulation, but their reliability at test time remains limited by one-shot action prediction, where even small action errors can cause grasp failure, collision, or incorrect task progression. A natural alternative is to equip VLA systems with test-time verification, allowing multiple candidate actions to be proposed and evaluated before execution. However, reliable action verification is challenging because it requires not only distinguishing subtle geometric differences between candidate actions, but also assessing whether an action makes meaningful progress toward the task goal. We present VeriSpace, a 3D-aware action verifier for test-time action selection in VLA systems. VeriSpace evaluates candidate actions through two key components: Dual-Path 3D-Injected Scene Encoding, which constructs a scene representation that jointly preserves visual semantics and explicit 3D geometry, and Spatially-Grounded Action Reasoning, which evaluates each action by reasoning over task-relevant spatial relations, geometric validity, and expected goal progress. Together, these components enable more reliable discrimination between subtle yet outcome-critical action candidates while remaining fully compatible with existing VLA policies. Experiments on public benchmarks and real-world robotic manipulation tasks show that VeriSpace consistently improves decision reliability over both underlying VLA policies and prior verification-based methods, yielding substantial gains in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriSpace，一种3D感知的动作验证器，用于提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作中的测试时动作选择可靠性。它通过双路径3D注入场景编码和空间接地动作推理，联合建模视觉语义与几何结构，并评估动作的空间合理性与任务进展，显著提升分布内与分布外性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖单次动作预测，易因微小误差导致抓取失败或任务中断；亟需可靠的测试时动作验证机制以评估多个候选动作并筛选最优者。
AI.method: VeriSpace包含两个核心模块：1）Dual-Path 3D-Injected Scene Encoding，融合视觉语义与显式3D几何构建场景表征；2）Spatially-Grounded Action Reasoning，基于任务相关空间关系、几何有效性及预期目标进展对动作进行推理评估。
AI.result: 在公开基准与真实机器人操作任务中，VeriSpace一致优于基线VLA策略及先前验证方法，在分布内与分布外设置下均取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: VeriSpace提供了一种兼容现有VLA策略的高效、可靠测试时验证框架，通过3D感知与空间推理增强动作决策鲁棒性，推动VLA模型向实际部署迈进。

title: ClinReadNet: A clinical reading-inspired network for low-dose abdominal CT image quality assessment
summary: In abdominal CT imaging, developing a low-dose, no-reference image quality assessment (No-reference IQA) model that mimics doctors' reading habits for evaluating CT image quality has significant practical value. This paper proposes a novel deep learning-based framework, ClinReadNet, whose design aligns with the clinical reading logic of radiologists: first, it introduces the Sobel ordinal quality network (SOQN) module, which can simultaneously focus on edge details highly relevant to image quality and the quality distribution pattern of the entire image, accurately matching the clinical image-reading judgment habit of "considering both local details and overall context"; second, the framework integrates the (shifted) window multi-scale temperature multi-head self-attention ((S)W-MTMSA) module, which further replicates the radiologists' image-reading process of shifting from overall scanning to local focusing, and accurately locks in regions of interest through multi-sharpness attention; third, it designs the hierarchical ranked probability score (HRPS) loss function, which combines the dual logics of coarse classification and fine classification, while paying attention to the distance information between grading labels, effectively improving the performance of image quality assessment. Experiments conducted on the LDCTIQAG2023 dataset show that the proposed method achieves the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance: the values of Pearson's linear correlation coefficient (PLCC), Spearman's rank-order correlation coefficient (SROCC), and Kendall's rank-order correlation coefficient (KROCC) reach 0.9507, 0.9554, and 0.8629 respectively, with the sum of their absolute values (Score) being 2.7690, outperforming existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClinReadNet，一种模仿放射科医生阅片习惯的无参考腹部CT图像质量评估深度学习框架，通过SOQN模块关注边缘细节与整体质量分布、(S)W-MTMSA模块模拟由粗到细的阅片过程、HRPS损失函数融合粗细分级逻辑，在LDCTIQAG2023数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 开发一种低剂量、无参考、且符合医生阅片习惯的腹部CT图像质量评估模型具有重要临床价值。
AI.method: 提出ClinReadNet框架，包含：1）Sobel ordinal质量网络（SOQN）模块，兼顾局部边缘细节与全局质量分布；2）(shifted)窗口多尺度温度多头自注意力（(S)W-MTMSA）模块，模拟医生从整体扫描到局部聚焦的阅片流程；3）分层排序概率分数（HRPS）损失函数，融合粗/细粒度分类并建模等级标签间距离。
AI.result: 在LDCTIQAG2023数据集上，PLCC=0.9507，SROCC=0.9554，KROCC=0.8629，Score=2.7690，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: ClinReadNet有效建模放射科医生阅片逻辑，在无参考低剂量CT图像质量评估任务中显著提升性能，具备临床落地潜力。

title: ComBench: A Benchmark for Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization in Olympiad-Level Combinatorics
summary: Combinatorics is central to Olympiad-level mathematical problem solving, requiring deep discrete reasoning, creative constructions, and rigorous structural insight. Recent evidence suggests that even today's strongest frontier models remain uneven on Olympiad combinatorics, revealing a gap in creative mathematical reasoning. We introduce ComBench, an Olympiad-level combinatorics benchmark for evaluating and diagnosing the combinatorial reasoning capabilities of large language models. ComBench contains 100 human-annotated competition-level problems organized around two complementary settings: analysis-centric problems, which primarily require rigorous mathematical arguments, and construction-centric problems, which require explicit constructions in addition to correctness justifications. The evaluation protocol combines rubric-guided proof grading with deterministic construction verification, exposing cases where proof quality and construction validity diverge. Experiments on frontier open- and closed-source models show that ComBench is far from saturated: the strongest model reaches 65.4% overall Avg. and 75.3% overall Best@4. We further find that Rigorous Proof Reasoning and Constructive Realization are distinct capabilities: Kimi-K2.6 trails GPT-5.5 on analysis-centric proof grading but surpasses it on construction-centric Best@4, while Existence and Construction problems remain consistently hardest across representative frontier models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ComBench，一个面向奥赛级组合数学的基准测试集，包含100道人工标注题目，分为分析型与构造型两类；通过证明评分与构造验证结合的方式评估大模型能力，发现当前最强模型仍远未饱和，且证明推理与构造实现是两种不同能力。
AI.motivation: 现有前沿大语言模型在奥赛级组合数学问题上表现不均衡，暴露出创造性数学推理能力的不足，亟需专门、严谨的评测基准来诊断其组合推理能力。
AI.method: 构建ComBench基准：100道奥赛难度组合题，按分析型（重证明）与构造型（需显式构造+验证）二分；采用基于评分细则的证明质量评估 + 确定性构造正确性验证的混合评估协议。
AI.result: 前沿开源与闭源模型在ComBench上整体Avg.最高仅65.4%，Best@4最高75.3%；Kimi-K2.6在构造任务上优于GPT-5.5，但在分析任务上落后；存在性与构造类问题始终最难。
AI.conclusion: ComBench有效揭示了大模型在组合数学中‘严谨证明推理’与‘构造性实现’两类能力的分离性与不均衡性，为后续模型改进与能力解耦研究提供了可靠评测工具。

title: TENP: Trapezoidal Expert Neuron Pruning For Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Mixture-of-Experts large language models (LLMs) scale efficiently through sparse activation, yet their deployment is fundamentally constrained by the large static parameter footprint of experts. Existing compression approaches either remove entire experts, disrupting routing topology and harming performance, or rely on unstructured weight pruning with limited practical efficiency. To address the limitations, we propose TENP, a structured Trapezoidal ExpertNeuron Pruning framework. Using a few samples, we identify and retain important experts, while applying expert neuron pruning (ENP) to less important experts, reserving model parameters in a trapezoidal pattern from shallow to deep layers. When evaluating expert importance, we jointly consider both the magnitude of the expert output and its ability to change the direction of the input vector. For ENP, we measure each neuron's projected contribution to the expert output to identify and retain important neurons. We conduct extensive experiments on the Qwen and DeepSeek models. Under a routing expert sparsity of 40% and an average of 63.76% activated expert parameters, the DeepSeek model suffers only a 1-point drop in accuracy compared to the full-parameter model. Moreover, it outperforms the full-parameter model by 10% on code generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TENP框架，通过结构化梯形专家神经元剪枝，在保持稀疏激活的同时显著压缩MoE大语言模型的参数量，兼顾性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型压缩方法存在破坏路由拓扑或实际效率低的问题，难以兼顾参数压缩与性能保持。
AI.method: 提出结构化梯形专家神经元剪枝（TENP）框架：基于少量样本联合评估专家输出幅度与输入方向改变能力来筛选重要专家；对次要专家实施专家神经元剪枝（ENP），按浅层多、深层少的梯形模式保留参数；ENP中通过投影贡献度衡量并保留关键神经元。
AI.result: 在DeepSeek模型上，路由稀疏度40%、平均激活参数仅63.76%时，准确率仅下降1点，且代码生成任务性能反超全参模型10%；Qwen模型也验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: TENP是一种高效、结构化的MoE压缩方法，在大幅减少激活参数的同时维持甚至提升特定任务性能，为MoE部署提供了新思路。

title: LakeQA: An Exploratory QA Benchmark over a Million-Scale Data Lake
summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) have shown rapid progress in reading-based question answering (QA), where evidence is explicitly provided or can be trivially retrieved. In contrast, real-world questions are often not paired with accurate evidence documents. The useful evidence resides in massive data lakes, making search a prerequisite for answering. However, there is a lack of comprehensive benchmarks that require both searching and reasoning over large data lakes. To this end, we introduce LakeQA, a comprehensive benchmark for search-centric question answering over data lakes that jointly emphasizes searching and reasoning capabilities. LakeQA is built on a heterogeneous collection of approximately 9.5 TB of text resources from Wikipedia and open-source government data, spanning structured and unstructured data. To ensure task quality, each sample is annotated by at least one Ph.D.-level expert. Each task requires long-horizon multi-hop reasoning with implicit intermediate steps: agents need to discover the correct documents and then compose evidence across sources to produce the answer. Experimental results on seven frontier LLMs demonstrate that LakeQA is challenging. For instance, GPT-5.2 achieves only an exact-match score of 18.37% on LakeQA. Overall, LakeQA provides a realistic testbed for developing LLM agents that can both find and analyze data in modern data lakes.

AI.tldr: LakeQA is a new benchmark for search-centric question answering over large, heterogeneous data lakes, requiring both effective search and multi-hop reasoning; it is challenging for current LLMs, with even top models like GPT-5.2 scoring only 18.37% exact match.
AI.motivation: Real-world QA often lacks pre-provided evidence and requires searching massive, heterogeneous data lakes—yet existing benchmarks fail to jointly evaluate search and reasoning capabilities.
AI.method: Construct LakeQA benchmark using ~9.5 TB of heterogeneous text (Wikipedia + government open data), with Ph.D.-level expert annotation; tasks demand long-horizon, multi-hop reasoning across discovered documents.
AI.result: Seven frontier LLMs perform poorly on LakeQA—e.g., GPT-5.2 achieves only 18.37% exact-match accuracy—demonstrating its difficulty and highlighting current limitations in search-and-reasoning integration.
AI.conclusion: LakeQA serves as a realistic, rigorous testbed to advance LLM agents capable of autonomously searching and reasoning over modern data lakes.

title: AgenticNav: Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation as a Tool-Calling Harness
summary: Zero-shot vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE) has recently become feasible with large vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing methods typically rely on learned waypoint predictors to propose navigable actions. This severely limits the model's action space and fails to leverage depth inputs effectively. Moreover, memory is commonly handled by accumulating long textual or visual histories with substantial irrelevant context, or by retrieving cross-episode experiences, which weakens the zero-shot setting. In this paper, we rethink zero-shot VLN-CE as an agentic interface between the VLM and the environment, and present AgenticNav, a lightweight navigation harness that exposes action, depth, and memory as callable tools. Instead of choosing from predicted waypoints, the action tool allows the VLM to directly select a target pixel in RGB observations, converting it into executable motion. Depth is exposed through an on-demand pixel-depth tool, enabling the VLM to request precise metric distances only where they matter. For memory, AgenticNav provides a compact map image summarizing the historical trajectory, paired with a recall tool that allows the VLM to selectively revisit past visual observations without overwhelming the prompt context. On the R2R-CE benchmark, AgenticNav establishes new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance among zero-shot methods given the same VLM backbone. Real-world validation further highlights its zero-shot generalization compared to prior methods. Ablations show that our action tool design outperforms traditional waypoint predictors, and that depth tool and agentic memory further contribute to navigation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgenticNav，一种轻量级导航框架，将动作、深度和记忆作为可调用工具暴露给大视觉语言模型（VLM），实现零样本视觉-语言导航（VLN-CE）性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本VLN-CE方法受限于预定义的航点预测器，动作空间窄、深度信息利用不足；且传统记忆机制（如长文本/视觉历史累积或跨片段检索）削弱了零样本设定。
AI.method: 将VLN-CE重构为VLM与环境间的智能体式交互：1）动作工具——VLM直接选择RGB图像中目标像素并转为运动指令；2）深度工具——按需查询像素级度量深度；3）记忆工具——用紧凑轨迹地图+选择性视觉回溯召回工具替代冗长历史。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE基准上，AgenticNav在相同VLM主干下达到零样本SOTA；真实世界验证显示更强零样本泛化能力；消融实验证明各工具均有显著贡献，尤其动作工具优于传统航点预测。
