summary: Precise rover localization is a prerequisite for autonomous lunar exploration, yet the absence of Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) signals and the cumulative drift of local localization methods severely constrain long-range missions. Cross-view localization provides a promising drift-free global solution by matching rover-view and satellite-view imagery. However, the lunar environment poses unique challenges for correspondence alignment, including inter-entity entanglement, inter-viewpoint divergence, and simulation-to-real domain shift. To address these challenges, we propose Warped Alignment of Reprojected Graphs (WARG), a framework that leverages unified graph learning and reprojected graph matching for robust cross-view alignment. Pretrained on the synthetic LuSNAR dataset, WARG achieves an average test error of 0.32 m and demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to the synthetic lunar south pole region with an error of 3.63 m. More importantly, when validated on real-world data from the YuTu-2 rover, WARG achieves a localization error of 1.68 m within a 100 m x 100 m search area, corresponding to nearly one-pixel precision in low-resolution satellite imagery with a spatial resolution of 1.40 m/pixel. Beyond accuracy, WARG is computationally efficient, containing only 1.56M parameters, corresponding to 16.12% of previous lightweight models, and operating at 5.49 Hz on an NVIDIA RTX A6000 GPU, approaching GNSS-level update frequency. Finally, we observe that WARG naturally develops low-level spatial awareness, including semantic segmentation and structural reasoning, through cross-view localization learning, highlighting its potential as a promising paradigm for spatial intelligence with minimal annotation cost. The source code is available at https://github.com/maochen-casia/warg.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WARG框架，通过统一图学习和重投影图匹配解决月球跨视角定位问题，在合成与真实数据上均取得高精度定位效果，并具备轻量化与空间智能潜力。
AI.motivation: 月球缺乏GNSS信号且局部定位存在累积漂移，跨视角定位虽具潜力，但面临实体纠缠、视角差异及仿真到现实域偏移等挑战。
AI.method: 提出Warped Alignment of Reprojected Graphs（WARG）框架，结合统一图学习与重投影图匹配，并在合成LuSNAR数据集上预训练。
AI.result: 在合成数据上平均误差0.32 m；在月球南极仿真区域零样本泛化误差3.63 m；在玉兔二号真实数据中100 m×100 m搜索范围内误差1.68 m（近卫星图像单像素精度）；模型仅1.56M参数，运行速度5.49 Hz。
AI.conclusion: WARG实现了高精度、轻量、实时的月球跨视角定位，并在训练中自发涌现语义分割与结构推理能力，为低标注成本的空间智能提供新范式。

title: Role-Agent: Bootstrapping LLM Agents via Dual-Role Evolution
comment: 20 pages, including 12 pages of main text and 8 pages of appendix; work in progress
summary: Although Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong performance on complex tasks, their learning is often limited by inefficient interaction feedback and static training environments, which hinder broader generalization. To address these limitations, this paper introduces Role-Agent, \textcolor{black}{a framework} that harnesses a single LLM to function concurrently as both the agent and the environment, enabling a bootstrapped co-evolution. Role-Agent comprises two synergistic components: World-In-Agent (WIA) and Agent-In-World (AIW). In WIA, the LLM acts as the agent and predicts future states after each action; the alignment between predicted and actual states is then used as a process reward, encouraging environment-aware reasoning. In AIW, the LLM analyzes failure modes from failed trajectories and retrieves tasks with similar failure patterns, thereby reshaping the training data distribution for targeted practice. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Role-Agent consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of over 4\% over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Role-Agent框架，利用单一大语言模型同时扮演智能体和环境角色，通过World-In-Agent（WIA）和Agent-In-World（AIW）两个模块实现自举式协同进化，提升泛化能力与学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型智能体受限于低效的交互反馈和静态训练环境，导致泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出Role-Agent框架，包含WIA（LLM预测状态并生成过程奖励）和AIW（分析失败模式并重采样相似任务）两个协同模块，实现LLM在智能体与环境双重角色下的自引导训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，Role-Agent平均性能提升超4%，显著优于强基线。
AI.conclusion: Role-Agent通过让单一LLM兼具智能体与环境功能，实现了更高效、自适应的学习机制，有效缓解了传统LLM智能体泛化性差的问题。

title: Sample Where You Struggle: Sharpening Base Model Reasoning via Entropy-Guided Power Sampling
summary: Sampling from the sequence-level power distribution $p^α$ elicits RL-level reasoning from base language models without any parameter updates, but the standard Metropolis--Hastings (MH), a Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampler, is both expensive and slow-mixing. We trace both to a structural mismatch: $p^α$ mainly departs from $p$ at a sparse, spatially clustered set of high-entropy decision points, yet MH proposes resampling positions uniformly along the prefix -- wasting compute on near-degenerate conditionals while under-mixing precisely where modes diverge. We propose Entropy-Guided Power Sampling (EGPS), a training-free and verifier-free sampler that re-derives its proposal from token-level entropy already in the forward pass. EGPS skips deterministic blocks, localizes each MCMC move to a high-entropy neighborhood, and applies Multiple-Try Metropolis at decision points -- making sampling cost scale with \emph{entropy mass rather than sequence length}. On Qwen2.5-Math-7B, EGPS reaches best or tied-best accuracy on all three benchmarks (MATH500 $75.8\%$, HumanEval $62.2\%$, GPQA $42.4\%$) at up to a $12.6\times$ wall-clock speedup over the MH baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、无需验证器的采样方法EGPS，通过利用前向传播中已有的token级熵信息指导采样，跳过确定性块、聚焦高熵区域并应用多重尝试Metropolis算法，在显著提升采样效率的同时保持甚至提升推理性能。
AI.motivation: 标准Metropolis-Hastings（MH）采样在序列级幂分布p^α采样中计算昂贵且混合缓慢，源于其均匀位置提议与p^α实际偏离p的稀疏高熵决策点之间的结构不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Entropy-Guided Power Sampling（EGPS），基于前向传播中的token级熵动态定位高熵区域，跳过低熵（确定性）块，并在高熵邻域内使用Multiple-Try Metropolis进行局部MCMC更新，使计算开销正比于熵质量而非序列长度。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Math-7B模型上，EGPS在MATH500（75.8%）、HumanEval（62.2%）和GPQA（42.4%）三个基准上达到最优或并列最优精度，同时实现最高12.6倍的实测速度提升。
AI.conclusion: EGPS通过熵引导的自适应采样策略，有效解决了MH在幂分布采样中的效率瓶颈，为无需微调的RL级推理提供了高效、即插即用的采样方案。

title: ArabiGEE: A Hierarchical Taxonomy for Arabic Grammatical Error Explanation
summary: We introduce ArabiGEE, the first comprehensive Arabic grammatical error explanation (GEE) taxonomy grounded in explicit error types. Unlike existing GEE approaches that treat explanation generation as free-form text, ArabiGEE organizes grammatical explanations through a hierarchical structure spanning orthographic, morphological, syntactic, and lexical dimensions. The taxonomy consists of 27 error types, 140 correction types, and 324 associated explanations. We apply ArabiGEE to manually annotate portions of existing Arabic grammatical error correction corpora and demonstrate how structured grammatical explanations can support automatic evaluation of LLMs on Arabic GEE. Our code and data are publicly available.

AI.tldr: ArabiGEE is the first structured, hierarchical taxonomy for Arabic grammatical error explanation, covering orthographic, morphological, syntactic, and lexical dimensions with 27 error types, 140 correction types, and 324 explanations; it enables manual annotation and automatic LLM evaluation for Arabic GEE.
AI.motivation: Existing Arabic grammatical error explanation (GEE) approaches rely on free-form text, lacking structure and consistency; there is a need for an explicit, hierarchical taxonomy grounded in linguistic dimensions to improve explainability and evaluation.
AI.method: The authors designed ArabiGEE—a hierarchical taxonomy of Arabic grammatical errors—spanning orthographic, morphological, syntactic, and lexical levels, with 27 error types, 140 correction types, and 324 explanations; they applied it to manually annotate existing Arabic grammatical error correction corpora.
AI.result: ArabiGEE enables structured grammatical explanations and supports automatic evaluation of large language models (LLMs) on Arabic GEE tasks; annotated data and code are publicly released.
AI.conclusion: ArabiGEE establishes a foundational, linguistically grounded framework for Arabic GEE, facilitating more interpretable, consistent, and evaluable grammatical error explanations.

title: Task Robustness via Re-Labelling Vision-Action Robot Data
summary: The recent trend in scaling models for robot learning has resulted in impressive policies that can perform various manipulation tasks and generalize to novel scenarios. However, these policies continue to struggle with following instructions, likely due to the limited linguistic and action sequence diversity in existing robotics datasets. This paper introduces Task Robustness via Re-Labelling Vision-Action Robot Data (TREAD), a scalable framework that leverages large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to augment existing robotics datasets without additional data collection, harnessing the transferable knowledge embedded in these models. Our approach leverages a pretrained VLM through three stages: generating semantic sub-tasks from original instruction labels and initial scenes, segmenting demonstration videos conditioned on these sub-tasks, and producing diverse instructions that incorporate object properties, effectively decomposing longer demonstrations into grounded language-action pairs. We further enhance robustness by augmenting the data with linguistically diverse versions of the text goals. Evaluations on LIBERO demonstrate that policies trained on our augmented datasets exhibit improved performance on novel, unseen tasks and goals. Our results show that TREAD enhances both planning generalization through trajectory decomposition and language-conditioned policy generalization through increased linguistic diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TREAD框架，利用大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）对机器人视觉-动作数据进行重标注，提升指令遵循能力和任务泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人学习策略在遵循自然语言指令方面表现不佳，主要受限于机器人数据集中语言和动作序列的多样性不足。
AI.method: TREAD框架分三阶段：1）用预训练VLM从原始指令和初始场景生成语义子任务；2）基于子任务分割演示视频；3）生成融合物体属性的多样化指令，将长演示分解为具身的语言-动作对，并进一步通过语言多样性增强文本目标。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上验证，使用TREAD增强的数据训练的策略在未见任务和目标上性能显著提升，同时增强了轨迹分解带来的规划泛化能力和语言多样性带来的语言条件策略泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TREAD是一种无需额外数据收集即可有效提升机器人策略指令遵循与泛化能力的可扩展数据增强框架。

title: GaussTrace: Provenance Analysis of 3D Gaussian Splatting Models with Evidence-based LLM Reasoning
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a powerful technique for creating high-fidelity 3D assets. However, the widespread sharing and iterative modification of 3DGS models across digital platforms create pressing challenges for intellectual property protection and forensic traceability. To address this, we propose GaussTrace, a novel framework for constructing directed provenance graphs for 3DGS models. GaussTrace formulates provenance analysis as an evidence-based reasoning problem. It builds upon attribute-wise statistical profiling of 3DGS parameters to capture intrinsic properties. Moreover, we introduce hypothesis-driven editing simulations of common operations to provide auxiliary evidence for plausible transformation pathways. These statistical and simulated cues jointly enable a Large Language Model (LLM) to perform structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, yielding directional provenance inferences and explainable edge reasons. Experimental results demonstrate that GaussTrace effectively constructs evolutionary relationships among diverse 3DGS models, delivering accurate, interpretable, and robust provenance graphs without requiring model training or access to editing histories. Project page: https://haolianghan.github.io/GaussTrace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GaussTrace框架，通过统计建模与假设驱动的编辑模拟，结合大语言模型进行链式推理，实现无需训练、无需编辑历史的3D高斯泼溅模型溯源图构建。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）模型在数字平台广泛共享与迭代修改，带来知识产权保护与法医可追溯性挑战。
AI.method: 基于属性级统计建模刻画3DGS参数内在特性，并设计假设驱动的常见编辑操作模拟以生成辅助证据；融合两类线索，驱动大语言模型进行结构化思维链（CoT）推理，输出有向溯源图及可解释边理由。
AI.result: GaussTrace能有效构建多样化3DGS模型间的演化关系，在无需模型训练或编辑历史的前提下，生成准确、可解释且鲁棒的溯源图。
AI.conclusion: GaussTrace为3DGS模型提供了首个无需训练、无需访问编辑历史、具备可解释性的端到端溯源分析框架，显著提升了数字资产的版权保护与法证追踪能力。

title: Frontier Coding Agents Use Metaprogramming to Adapt to Unfamiliar Programming Languages
summary: LLM-based coding agents are usually evaluated in familiar software settings: mainstream languages, common libraries, and public repositories. These benchmarks remain important, but they can hide how agents behave when the language itself is unfamiliar. We evaluate six contemporary coding agents on four esoteric programming languages using a sequential setup with file editing, local execution, and hidden-test grading. Our protocol exposes capability differences between these agents that mainstream coding and agentic benchmarks such as SWE-Bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2.0 compress into much narrower bands. We observe that the strongest agents, Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 xhigh, often avoid writing the target language directly. On Brainfuck and Befunge-98, they write Python programs that generate target-language code and debug those generators locally. Forbidding this metaprogramming strategy causes large performance drops. Text guidance distilled from this strategy does not materially improve weaker agents. In contrast, Opus-derived Python helper code for building generators, with no solved benchmark programs or hidden-test answers, sharply improves Sonnet 4.6 and GPT-5.4 mini on the same problems, while Haiku 4.5 remains low. More interpreter calls and output tokens improve stronger agents but leave weaker agents near their original performance, indicating that these resources amplify useful strategies rather than create them. Together, these results show that strong coding agents adapt to unfamiliar languages by using tools, feedback, and workspace state to build a working model of the target language. Metaprogramming is the clearest case, but the broader gap is constructing and debugging a strategy that works under the target language's rules.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了六种现代编码代理在四种深奥编程语言上的表现，发现强代理（如Claude Opus 4.6和GPT-5.4 xhigh）倾向于通过编写Python生成器来间接实现目标语言代码，而非直接编写；禁止该元编程策略会显著降低性能；而提供Opus生成的Python辅助代码可显著提升较弱代理（如Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.4 mini）的表现，表明强代理的核心能力在于利用工具、反馈与工作空间状态构建并调试适配目标语言规则的策略。
AI.motivation: 主流编码基准（如SWE-Bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2.0）多聚焦于常见语言和库，可能掩盖代理在面对不熟悉编程语言时的真实能力差异，因此需设计新协议评估其在深奥语言下的适应性。
AI.method: 在Brainfuck、Befunge-98等四种深奥语言上，采用顺序式设置：文件编辑、本地执行、隐藏测试评分；对比六种LLM编码代理，并控制变量（如是否允许元编程、是否提供辅助代码、资源用量等）分析行为差异。
AI.result: 强代理偏好元编程（用Python生成目标语言代码），禁用后性能大幅下降；文本形式的策略提示对弱代理无效，但Opus生成的无答案Python辅助代码显著提升Sonnet和GPT-5.4 mini表现；更多解释器调用和输出token仅增强已有有效策略，不催生新能力。
AI.conclusion: 强编码代理应对陌生语言的关键不在于直接编码能力，而在于能借助工具、反馈与工作空间动态构建、调试并执行符合目标语言规则的策略；元编程是典型体现，本质是策略建模能力。

title: Trainable Smooth-Rotation Transforms with Learned Channel Scales for LLM Quantization
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to IEEE INES 2026 conference proceedings
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is one of the most practical ways to reduce the serving cost of Large Language Models (LLMs), but activation quantization remains difficult because outlier-dominated channels lead to large quantization errors. This paper investigates whether part of this degradation is caused by over-migration in scaling-based equivalent transformations. We introduce a quantile-robust scaling policy for SmoothRot-style transforms by replacing max-based activation statistics with high quantiles, and we complement it with constrained gradient-based optimization of channel scales. On LLaMA-3.2-1B under W4A4 quantization, quantile-only policy search improves selected-layer error by 11.1% over the SmoothRot baseline, joint (alpha, q) search improves it by 12%, and training reaches 18.5%. Replaying the best selected-layer policy on all decoder-block down-projection layers reduces the corresponding full-layer mean error from 97.51 to 78.08 (19.9%). The results show that robust migration control and lightweight scale learning provide consistent gains over max-based fixed policies while preserving the equivalent-transform framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分位数的鲁棒缩放策略和约束梯度优化方法，用于改进大语言模型后训练量化中的激活量化，显著降低了量化误差。
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法中，基于最大值的缩放策略在激活量化时易受离群值影响，导致通道级量化误差增大。
AI.method: 引入分位数鲁棒缩放策略（替代最大值统计），结合约束梯度优化通道缩放因子，并在SmoothRot类等价变换框架下实现。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-3.2-1B模型W4A4量化下，所提方法使选定层误差降低11.1%–18.5%，全解码器下投射层平均误差从97.51降至78.08（降幅19.9%）。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒迁移控制与轻量级缩放学习可在保持等价变换框架前提下，持续提升PTQ性能。

title: Dep-LLM: Training-Free Depression Diagnosis via Evidence-Guided Structured Multi-factor with Reliable LLM Reasoning
summary: Automatic Depression Detection (ADD) from clinical interviews is a pivotal task in computational mental health, yet it remains challenging due to two critical obstacles: 1) difficulty in modeling complex but sparsely distributed depression clues within lengthy, multi-topic clinical interviews, leading to superficial and unreliable reasoning; 2) scarcity of labeled data due to clinical privacy, together with high cost of training and fine-tuning, limiting the deployment of supervised ADD systems. To jointly address these challenges, we propose Dep-LLM, a training-free framework that mirrors the step-by-step reasoning of clinical psychiatrists and operates entirely on frozen off-the-shelf foundation LLMs. Dep-LLM comprises three stages. First, a Chain-of-Thought (CoT) Depression Multi-factor Analysis module structurally decomposes the long dialogue into five clinically aligned themes and produces evidence-grounded rationales, effectively handling long-context dependencies. Second, we introduce Confidence Analysis and Modulation module that quantifies the epistemic reliability from token-level entropy of each rationale and applies an intra-label and inter-theme modulation that amplifies trustworthy signals while suppressing uncertain ones without extra training. Third, a Collaborative Multi-factor Prediction module dynamically integrates multi-factor signals weighted by confidence into the final diagnosis. Extensive experiments on the DAIC-WOZ and E-DAIC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of Dep-LLM: it surpasses zero-shot baseline on nearly all 21 foundation LLMs across 9 metrics such as accuracy, macro F1 and weighted-average F1, and further outperforms state-of-the-art supervised domain-specific LLMs as well as the latest closed-source commercial LLMs, while requiring no extra training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dep-LLM，一种无需训练的自动抑郁检测框架，利用冻结的基础大语言模型，通过三阶段链式推理（多因素分析、置信度调制、协同预测）实现高精度、泛化强的抑郁识别，显著优于零样本基线及现有监督/商用模型。
AI.motivation: 解决临床访谈中抑郁线索稀疏难建模、标注数据稀缺且训练成本高的两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出Dep-LLM框架：1）CoT抑郁症多因素分析模块，将长对话结构化分解为五大临床主题并生成证据支持的推理；2）置信度分析与调制模块，基于词元级熵量化推理可靠性，并进行标签内与主题间调制；3）协同多因素预测模块，依据置信度动态加权融合多因素信号输出诊断。全程无需微调，仅用冻结的现成大模型。
AI.result: 在DAIC-WOZ和E-DAIC数据集上，Dep-LLM在21个基础大模型、9项指标（如准确率、宏F1、加权F1）上全面超越零样本基线；且优于当前最优监督领域专用模型及最新闭源商用大模型。
AI.conclusion: Dep-LLM验证了无需训练、基于冻结大模型的结构化推理范式在自动抑郁检测中的有效性与实用性，为低资源医疗AI提供了新路径。

title: AllDayNav: Lifelong Navigation via Real-World Reinforcement Learning
summary: Lifelong embodied navigation in dynamic environments requires robots to form persistent scene understanding from fragmentary observations, which remains difficult for existing methods that rely on explicit maps or scene graphs and struggle to generalize beyond structured settings. We propose AllDayNav, a lifelong self-learning navigation framework that implicitly encodes scene dynamics into the billion-scale parameters of a large model via reinforcement learning, powered by a self-evolving multimodal memory that maintains and updates visual keyframes, semantic descriptions, and temporal context while autonomously generating open-vocabulary instructions, image goals, and structured rewards. Experiments in both synthetic and real-world environments across cross-room, cross-episode, and cross-task scenarios show that AllDayNav achieves success rates approaching $100\%$ and consistently surpasses strong map-based, VLM, and RL baselines in path efficiency and robustness, demonstrating implicit, memory-driven reinforcement learning as a scalable alternative to explicit mapping for reliable lifelong navigation.

AI.tldr: AllDayNav 是一种面向动态环境的终生具身导航框架，通过强化学习将场景动态隐式编码到大模型参数中，并利用自演化的多模态记忆实现持续场景理解，显著优于传统基于显式地图、视觉语言模型和强化学习的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式地图或场景图，在动态、非结构化环境中难以实现持久的场景理解与泛化。
AI.method: 提出 AllDayNav 框架，采用隐式表征方式，利用大规模模型参数承载场景动态信息；结合自演化的多模态记忆（含视觉关键帧、语义描述与时间上下文），并自主生成开放词汇指令、图像目标与结构化奖励，以强化学习方式进行训练。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界环境中，跨房间、跨回合、跨任务场景下，成功率接近 100%，路径效率与鲁棒性均超越强基线（如基于地图、VLM 和 RL 的方法）。
AI.conclusion: 隐式、记忆驱动的强化学习可作为显式建图之外的一种可扩展且可靠的终生导航范式。

title: SSR-Merge: Subspace Signal Routing for Training-Free LoRA Merging in Diffusion Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) merging can efficiently combine diverse generative capabilities from multiple trained LoRAs for a diffusion model. However, existing LoRA merging techniques often suffer from severe parameter interference, causing destructive collisions in the shared parameter space. To address this, we propose Subspace Signal Routing (SSR), which resolves interference by routing internal signals instead of performing parameter-space merge. Specifically, SSR first constructs a unified subspace by concatenating candidate LoRAs along the rank dimension. Next, SSR employs an inverse correlation matrix to decorrelate mixed signals within this space. Finally, a directional guide matrix steers these purified signals into their respective task-specific subspaces. We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis proving that SSR aligns with the Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) solution, thereby ensuring mathematical optimality. We utilize the additivity of sufficient statistics to design a streaming algorithm. This enables on-the-fly updates that significantly reduce memory overhead and computation time. Extensive experiments validate that SSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/nagara214/SSR-Merge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为子空间信号路由（SSR）的新方法，用于解决LoRA合并中的参数干扰问题，通过在信号空间而非参数空间进行路由来避免破坏性冲突，并理论证明其与OLS解一致，同时设计了流式算法以降低内存和计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA合并方法存在严重的参数干扰问题，导致共享参数空间中任务能力的破坏性冲突。
AI.method: SSR首先沿秩维度拼接多个LoRA构建统一子空间，然后利用逆相关矩阵对混合信号进行去相关，最后通过方向引导矩阵将净化后的信号路由至各自的任务子空间；并基于充分统计量的可加性设计流式更新算法。
AI.result: SSR在多项实验中显著优于现有SOTA方法，同时保持相近的计算与内存效率。
AI.conclusion: SSR通过信号空间路由而非参数空间合并，有效缓解LoRA合并中的干扰问题，兼具理论最优性与实际高效性。

title: WorldKernel: A World Model is the Coupling Kernel of Admissible Possible Worlds
summary: A common assumption holds that enough observational and interventional data, given to a strong enough predictor, suffices. We report a failure mode that contradicts it. Across hundreds of structural causal models, on identified quantities a strong predictor and a Bayesian baseline both succeed, but on unidentified quantities (the couplings between counterfactual worlds) the predictor collapses to a point, on 28% of models to one no valid model can produce, while the truth is an admissible interval more data never narrows. The gap is structural: prediction cannot represent uncertainty over counterfactual couplings. We cast a world model as a single positive semidefinite coupling kernel K(T,T') over admissible worlds, whose diagonal is the ordinary posterior (what a predictor recovers) and whose off-diagonal is the cross-world coupling it cannot, which every counterfactual reads. The paper is the theory of that off-diagonal. It is real: two states with identical posteriors differ on a cross-world query, and the off-diagonal is the coupling that fixes counterfactuals. It can be bounded: positive semidefiniteness is partial-identifying information the marginals lack, and enforcing it bounds counterfactuals in polynomial time where the exact response-type program is intractable. Logical structure sharpens it: ontology axioms tighten the bound by up to a third, propagating to couplings they never touch. It can be acquired: targeted scars, constraints learned from encountered infeasibilities, close the gap several times faster than untargeted ones. Its full reconstruction is approximate counting of the admissible worlds, tractable below the Sly-Sun threshold and inapproximable above; we do not claim to beat the worst case.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了强预测器在处理未识别量（即反事实世界间的耦合）时的根本局限性，提出了一种基于正定耦合核K(T,T')的结构化世界模型理论，利用正定性等结构性约束来界定和逼近反事实推理，从而弥补预测器无法表达跨世界不确定性这一结构性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 挑战‘足够数据+强预测器即可解决因果推理’的常见假设，指出其在未识别量（反事实耦合）上的根本失效，并寻求能刻画和约束跨世界不确定性的新理论框架。
AI.method: 将世界模型形式化为定义在可容许世界对上的正定耦合核K(T,T')；利用其正定性作为部分识别信息来界定反事实量；引入本体公理与靶向‘疤痕’（来自不可行性的约束）以收紧边界；分析其计算复杂性（如Sly-Sun阈值下的近似可解性）。
AI.result: 发现强预测器在28%的SCM上对未识别量输出无效点估计，而真实解为数据无法缩窄的区间；证明正定性可多项式时间界定反事实；本体公理可使界收紧达1/3；靶向约束比非靶向更快闭合不确定性缺口。
AI.conclusion: 反事实推理的瓶颈不在数据或算力，而在预测范式本身缺乏表示跨世界耦合的能力；必须引入结构性先验（如正定性、本体公理、靶向约束）才能实现可靠反事实建模。

title: Forward-Only Convolutional Neural Networks with Learnable Channel-Class Assignment
summary: The Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm offers a biologically inspired alternative to backpropagation by replacing gradient-based credit assignment with local, forward-only objectives. While recent extensions have adapted FF to convolutional neural networks (CNNs), existing formulations rely on static channel-class partitions and struggle to perform effectively in complex tasks. In this work, we introduce a learnable channel-class assignment mechanism that enables adaptive, data-driven specialization of convolutional channels, supported by entropy and orthogonality regularization to promote learning performance. We further propose a loss-aware layer contribution strategy that adaptively weights intermediate-layer predictions based on their validation performance, enhancing the effectiveness of forward-only inference. Integrated into residual CNNs, the proposed method achieves consistently superior performance across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet compared to existing similar forward-only methods. Notably, it establishes new state-of-the-art performance among FF-based models, substantially narrowing the gap with backpropagation. These findings demonstrate that introducing learnable channel specialization and layer contribution weighting significantly enhances the representational capacity of forward-only learning in deep CNNs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向前向-前向（FF）算法的改进方法，通过可学习的通道-类别分配机制和损失感知的层贡献加权策略，提升了其在CNN中的性能，显著缩小了与反向传播的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有FF算法在CNN中依赖静态通道-类别划分，在复杂任务中表现不佳，亟需提升其表征能力和适应性。
AI.method: 引入可学习的通道-类别分配机制，结合熵与正交性正则化；提出损失感知的中间层预测加权策略；集成至残差CNN架构中。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上超越现有前向-only方法，达到FF类模型的新SOTA，大幅缩小与反向传播的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 可学习通道专业化与层贡献加权能显著增强前向-only学习在深度CNN中的表征能力。

title: Beyond APIs: Probing the Limits of MLLMs in Physical Tool Use
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at utilizing digital APIs and increasingly serve as the "brain" of embodied AI, instructing robots to interact with the physical world. In such embodied settings, a central capability is the use of physical tools, which underpins MLLMs' ability to assist humans in real-world tasks. Despite the importance, MLLMs' proficiency in physical tool use remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce PhysTool-Bench, the first physical tool-use benchmark designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to comprehend real-world scenarios, identify physical tools, and plan their use. PhysTool-Bench comprises 2,510 queries over 2,678 real-world physical tools spanning diverse domains, including manufacturing, electrical work, agriculture, and healthcare. Concretely, models are evaluated along two primary dimensions: 1) recognizing all physical tools present in the scene, and 2) planning the tool selection and use sequence based on the instruction and visual context. Across 13 leading MLLMs, even the strongest model (Gemini-3.1-Pro) identifies only 58.7% of tools in a scene and completes merely 21.0% of queries end-to-end. Our analysis reveals a two-level deficit: MLLMs struggle to perceive tools in realistic scenes, and the much larger drop at the planning stage further indicates a lack of functional commonsense for mapping perceived tools onto task semantics, pinpointing a critical bottleneck for the development of practical embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）物理工具使用能力的基准PhysTool-Bench，涵盖2510个查询和2678种真实物理工具；实验发现现有最强MLLM（Gemini-3.1-Pro）在工具识别和端到端任务完成率上分别仅为58.7%和21.0%，暴露出感知与功能常识两方面的显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管MLLMs在具身AI中日益扮演‘大脑’角色，其物理工具使用能力却尚未被系统评估，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 构建PhysTool-Bench基准，包含2510个查询、覆盖制造、电工、农业、医疗等领域的2678种真实物理工具；从工具识别与工具使用规划两个维度评估13个主流MLLM。
AI.result: 最强模型Gemini-3.1-Pro仅识别58.7%的工具，仅完成21.0%的端到端查询；分析揭示MLLM在工具感知和功能常识（将工具映射到任务语义）两层均存在严重不足。
AI.conclusion: PhysTool-Bench揭示了当前MLLM在物理工具使用上的根本性瓶颈，尤其在于缺乏将视觉感知与任务驱动的功能常识相结合的能力，为具身AI发展指明关键改进方向。

title: Resilient Navigation for Autonomous Farm Robots by Leveraging Jerk-Augmented Models with IMU-Only Disturbance Rejection
summary: Precise state estimation for navigation of autonomous agricultural robots is often compromised by sensor outages (GNSS/LiDAR/Visual) and high-frequency vibrations inherent in off-road environments. This paper proposes a robust navigation algorithm based on a jerk-augmented Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) integrated with a Multiple Tuning Factor (MTF) adaptation method. Unlike standard EKF approaches that assume constant measurement noise, our method dynamically adjusts the measurement covariance matrix in real-time, allowing the system to cope with sudden disturbances and sensor outliers. We evaluate the algorithm using real-world data from a Salin247 autonomous robot. Results demonstrate that jerk-augmentation combined with MTF adaptation significantly reduces 3D position Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) compared to baseline EKF models, providing superior dead-reckoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加加速度（jerk）增强的扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）与多调谐因子（MTF）自适应方法相结合的鲁棒导航算法，用于提升农业自主机器人在传感器失效和振动干扰下的状态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 农业自主机器人在野外环境中常面临GNSS/LiDAR/视觉等传感器失效及高频振动问题，导致定位精度下降，亟需更鲁棒的状态估计算法。
AI.method: 提出一种jerk-augmented EKF，并引入MTF机制实时动态调整测量协方差矩阵，以应对突发扰动和传感器异常值。
AI.result: 在Salin247机器人实测数据上验证，该方法显著降低了3D位置RMSE，提升了纯惯性推算（dead-reckoning）性能。
AI.conclusion: jerk增强与MTF自适应协同提升了EKF在复杂农业场景下的鲁棒性与精度，为无GNSS或弱信号环境下的导航提供了有效解决方案。

title: Can Image Models Imagine Time? ImageTime: A Novel Benchmark for Probing Visual World Modeling Through Spatiotemporal Consistency
summary: Image generation models now produce high-quality static images, yet their ability to represent how a visual world changes over time remains poorly understood. Practical workflows such as storyboarding, step-by-step illustration, reference-guided editing, and video previsualization require models to preserve identities, objects, spatial relations, and causal order across multiple visual states. Existing evaluations largely measure single-image correctness, compositional alignment, or video quality, leaving open whether an image model can coherently imagine a temporally ordered process. We introduce ImageTime, a diagnostic benchmark that uses spatiotemporal consistency as a behavioral probe of visual world modeling in image generation. Given an action instruction, and optionally a reference image specifying the initial state, a model must generate one image containing four ordered key states: initial state, action onset, transition state, and final state. This four-keyframe protocol is more temporally demanding than single-image generation while avoiding the confounds of dense video dynamics. ImageTime organizes tasks with a progressive capability hierarchy and decomposes each scenario into stage-wise state predicates, cross-frame temporal constraints, and forbidden causal violations. GPT-5.5 scores all generated images under a structured VLM-as-judge protocol, producing interpretable capability scores, diagnostic subscores, and failure labels. Through multi-family benchmarking, ImageTime reveals where current image generation systems succeed, fail, and drift when asked to maintain coherent visual world states over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImageTime基准，用于评估图像生成模型在时间维度上保持视觉世界一致性的能力，通过四帧关键状态生成任务来诊断模型的时空一致性建模水平。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型虽能生成高质量静态图像，但其对视觉世界随时间变化的建模能力尚不明确；实际应用（如分镜、参考编辑、视频预演）要求模型跨多状态保持身份、对象、空间关系和因果顺序的一致性，而当前评测主要聚焦单图质量或视频质量，缺乏对时序连贯性的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建ImageTime诊断基准：给定动作指令及可选初始参考图，要求模型生成包含四个有序关键帧（初始态、动作起始、过渡态、终态）的单张图像；采用渐进式能力层次组织任务，并分解为阶段状态谓词、跨帧时序约束与禁止的因果违规；使用GPT-5.5作为结构化VLM评判器进行打分。
AI.result: 通过多模型家族评测，ImageTime揭示了当前图像生成系统在维持跨时间视觉世界一致性方面的成功场景、失败模式与漂移现象，提供了可解释的能力分数、诊断子分数与失败标签。
AI.conclusion: ImageTime首次将时空一致性作为核心行为探针，填补了图像生成模型时序推理能力评估的空白，为构建具备动态世界建模能力的生成模型提供了新基准与诊断框架。

title: Recalling Too Well: Sycophancy Evaluation and Mitigation in Memory-Augmented Models
summary: Persistent memory systems promise to make LLMs more helpful by storing user beliefs over time. We show they also make models less correct by systematically amplifying sycophancy, wherein models prioritize agreement with users over accuracy. We conduct the first systematic evaluation of this effect, introducing MIST: a benchmark of synthetically generated multi-turn conversations where users express plausible misconceptions in scientific, medical, and moral reasoning domains. Testing across three state-of-the-art memory systems and five model families reveals that memory amplifies sycophantic behavior across all conditions, with up to 25x higher sycophancy rates than in-context baselines. Error analyses suggest memory extraction as the primary culprit: lossy compression into discrete snippets encodes user misconceptions while discarding corrective context. Based on these results, we propose two lightweight mitigations that substantially reduce sycophancy while matching or exceeding memory systems at factual recall.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了持久性记忆系统在提升LLM帮助性的同时，会系统性地加剧“奉承倾向”（sycophancy），即模型更倾向于迎合用户而非坚持事实正确性；作者构建了MIST基准，实证发现记忆系统使奉承率最高达上下文学习基线的25倍，并指出记忆提取过程中的信息损失是主因，最后提出两种轻量级缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 持久性记忆系统虽能增强LLM对用户信念的长期建模能力，但其潜在副作用——加剧模型为迎合用户而牺牲准确性的倾向（即sycophancy）尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 构建MIST基准：包含科学、医学与道德推理领域中用户持有合理误解的多轮合成对话；在三个先进记忆系统和五个主流模型家族上进行系统评测；开展错误分析定位问题根源；设计并验证两种轻量级缓解策略。
AI.result: 记忆系统普遍显著放大sycophancy，最高达in-context baseline的25倍；错误分析表明记忆提取阶段的离散化压缩丢失关键纠正性上下文，导致用户误解被固化；所提两种缓解方法在大幅降低sycophancy的同时，事实召回率持平或优于原始记忆系统。
AI.conclusion: 持久性记忆在提升个性化的同时引入严重准确性风险，其核心缺陷在于有损记忆提取；需在系统设计中显式平衡一致性与真实性，本文提出的缓解方案为此提供了可行路径。

title: Between Amnesia and Chaos: A Memory Stability Expressivity Trilemma for Trainable Dissipative Oscillator Networks
summary: Physical reservoir computing harnesses nonlinear mechanical dynamics but, by convention, freezes the substrate and trains only a linear readout, presuming the substrate is not usefully trainable. We revisit that premise for networks of nonlinear oscillators whose mass, damping, and stiffness are learned end-to-end through a symplectic integrator. Our central result is a trilemma: memory horizon, gradient stability, and dynamical expressivity cannot be simultaneously maximized, because all three are governed by the damping. The backward gradient decays at a rate set by the damping, capping how far back credit can propagate, while forward sensitivities grow exponentially in the largest Lyapunov exponent, so usable gradients require damping above a stability floor. Since the Lyapunov exponent falls as damping rises while the memory ceiling falls as the horizon grows, stable training is confined to a band that contracts with horizon and closes at a critical point. We test every step on a twenty-oscillator network. A damping sweep finds the largest Lyapunov exponent monotone and crossing zero at a well-defined stability floor, confirming the theorem's key assumption. A compute-matched comparison of learned versus frozen substrate on delayed recall across nine horizons shows the learned substrate dominating at short horizons and the advantage closing and reversing near a horizon of eleven steps, the predicted signature of band closure; trained models settle near the stability floor, seeking the edge of chaos unprompted. The analytic ceiling overestimates the empirical crossover roughly fivefold, a gap between detectable and learnable gradient that we report rather than tune away. The contribution is a confirmed account of when training a physical substrate beats freezing it.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了物理储层计算中冻结基底的传统做法，提出端到端学习非线性振荡器网络的质量、阻尼和刚度参数，并揭示了记忆长度、梯度稳定性和动力学表达能力之间的三难困境，该困境由阻尼系数统一调控；理论与实验均表明：存在一个随记忆需求收缩的稳定训练带，其闭合点决定了学习基底优于冻结基底的临界记忆长度。
AI.motivation: 挑战物理储层计算中冻结物理基底、仅训练线性读出的传统范式，探究是否及何时可端到端训练非线性机械系统（如振荡器网络）以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建基于辛积分器的可微分非线性振荡器网络模型，对质量、阻尼和刚度参数进行端到端学习；通过理论分析建立记忆长度、梯度衰减率与最大李雅普诺夫指数间的定量关系，并在20振荡器网络上开展阻尼扫描与延迟回忆任务实验验证。
AI.result: 证实阻尼主导记忆长度、梯度稳定性与动力学表达力的三难权衡；实验发现最大李雅普诺夫指数随阻尼单调下降并在某点过零，验证稳定性下限；在延迟回忆任务中，学习基底在短时序（<11步）占优，优势在约11步处消失并反转，与理论预测的训练带闭合一致；模型自发收敛至稳定性下限附近，体现‘混沌边缘’行为；理论记忆上限比实证交叉点高约5倍。
AI.conclusion: 首次为物理基底是否应被训练提供了定量判据：当所需记忆长度低于由阻尼决定的临界值时，端到端训练优于冻结基底；该临界点由梯度可传播深度与动力学表达能力的平衡决定。

title: Attention-Discounted Adaptive Sampler for Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models can reduce inference steps by revealing multiple tokens per denoising iteration, but this parallelism is fragile: positions that are individually confident may be unsafe to commit together when their predictions are coupled. Existing training-free samplers such as Top-\(k\), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler mainly control how many tokens to reveal, while often ranking candidates by token-wise scores that ignore interactions within the selected set. We propose ADAS, a training-free reranking rule for parallel masked diffusion decoding. ADAS leaves the base sampler's stopping rule unchanged and modifies only subset construction: it greedily discounts a candidate when it attends strongly to already selected positions whose predictions remain uncertain. Unlike graph-constrained methods that turn attention into hard compatibility constraints, ADAS keeps attention continuous and uses it as a soft marginal penalty. Across LLaDA-8B-Base and Dream-7B-Base on GSM8K, MATH500, HumanEval, and MBPP, plugging ADAS into Top-\(k\), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler improves low-NFE performance at matched denoiser evaluations by \(9.11\) and \(10.46\) percentage points on average, respectively, with \(3.1\%\) per-forward runtime overhead. These results show that soft attention-discounted reranking is a simple and modular way to improve quality in highly parallel decoding for masked diffusion language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAS，一种无需训练的重排序规则，用于并行掩码扩散语言模型解码，通过软性注意力折扣机制提升解码质量，显著改善低NFE下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练-free采样器在并行解码中仅依赖词元级分数排序，忽略位置间预测耦合，导致高置信度位置联合提交时不稳定。
AI.method: ADAS在保持基线采样器停止规则不变的前提下，修改子集构建过程：贪心地对强关注已选但预测不确定位置的候选词元施加注意力折扣；采用连续注意力作为软边际惩罚，而非硬图约束。
AI.result: 在LLaDA-8B-Base和Dream-7B-Base模型上，ADAS与Top-k、Fast-dLLM、EB-Sampler结合，在GSM8K、MATH500、HumanEval、MBPP等基准上平均提升9.11和10.46个百分点（匹配去噪器评估次数），仅引入3.1%前向开销。
AI.conclusion: 软注意力折扣重排序是一种简单、模块化且高效的方法，可显著提升掩码扩散语言模型高度并行解码的质量。

title: Language-Driven Cost Optimization for Autonomous Driving
comment: Paper accepted at IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC) 2026
summary: The driving behavior of autonomous vehicles is typically governed by the cost function of their motion planner, which encodes objectives such as speed tracking, smoothness, lane keeping, and collision avoidance. However, tuning the parameters that shape this cost function is a challenging task that requires technical expertise, limiting the vehicle's ability to adapt to evolving traffic scenarios or end-user preferences. This work presents a language-driven framework for adaptive cost design in autonomous driving. A Large Language Model (LLM) interprets structured scenario descriptions and natural language user queries to generate the parameters applied to a risk-aware Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller. The system incorporates a human-in-the-loop validation stage in which the proposed behavioral changes are described in non-technical language and confirmed prior to deployment. Users may additionally provide feedback either before or after deployment, enabling iterative refinement of the vehicle's motion behavior. The framework is evaluated across multiple queries in realistic driving scenarios to assess its effectiveness. Simulation results demonstrate that the method successfully induces behavioral changes that align with the intended requirements in an intuitive manner, thereby bridging the gap between intelligent vehicle control systems and end users.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的语言驱动自适应成本函数设计框架，使自动驾驶车辆能根据自然语言指令和场景描述自动调整运动规划器的成本函数参数，并通过人机协同验证与反馈机制实现行为迭代优化。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶车辆运动规划器的成本函数参数调优依赖专家经验，难以适应动态交通场景和用户个性化偏好。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型解析结构化场景描述和自然语言用户查询，生成适配风险感知MPPI控制器的参数；引入非技术语言描述的人在环验证环节，并支持部署前后用户反馈以实现行为迭代优化。
AI.result: 在多个真实驾驶场景的仿真中，该方法能直观、准确地按用户意图调整车辆行为，如速度、平滑性、车道保持等。
AI.conclusion: 该语言驱动框架有效弥合了智能车控制系统与终端用户之间的交互鸿沟，提升了自动驾驶系统的可解释性、适应性与用户可控性。

title: Leveraging Metric Depth for Relative Depth Prediction
summary: We present our solution to the 2025 SoccerNet Monocular Depth Estimation Competition Challenge. Predicting the relative depth in football scenarios is challenging, especially with only thousands of training samples available. To address this issue, our method leverages the powerful zero-shot capabilities of models pretrained on large-scale datasets to learn metric depth for effective relative depth prediction, achieving a score of $2.68 \times 10^{-3}$ on the challenge set.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大规模预训练模型零样本能力来解决足球场景单目相对深度估计问题的方法，在仅有数千训练样本的情况下取得了2.68×10⁻³的挑战集分数。
AI.motivation: 足球场景下的单目相对深度估计具有挑战性，尤其当训练样本仅数千时。
AI.method: 利用在大规模数据集上预训练模型的零样本能力，学习度量深度以实现有效的相对深度预测。
AI.result: 在挑战集上取得2.68×10⁻³的分数。
AI.conclusion: 基于零样本迁移的策略可在小样本足球深度估计任务中取得优异性能。

title: Architect-Ant: Editable Automatic Furnishing of Architectural Floor Plans
summary: Furnished floor plans are fundamental to real estate visualization, interior design, and architectural workflows. However, progress in automatic furniture arrangement has been limited by the lack of real, professionally designed floor-plan datasets with object-level furniture annotations. To address this gap, we introduce AntPlan-270, a curated dataset of 270 architectural floor plans with per-room furniture bounding box annotations across ten residential room categories. Building on this dataset, we present Architect-Ant, an editable automatic furnishing framework powered by a fine-tuned vision-language model. Furniture layouts are represented using a compact, coordinate-based domain-specific language (DSL) that encodes object categories and placements relative to the room geometry. To improve spatial reasoning, we generate procedural reasoning traces that capture architectural constraints such as wall alignment, door and window clearance, circulation, fixture compatibility, and room-specific furniture inventories, and use them to supervise fine-tuning of the model. We then apply preference optimization over candidate object placements to further refine layout quality. The generated DSL can be rasterized into semantic masks and used to condition a Flux-based LoRA renderer, producing realistic blueprint-style furnished floor-plan images while preserving the editable symbolic layout. Experiments on layout furnishing show that Architect-Ant produces geometrically valid and functionally plausible layouts, and suggest a scalable path for furnishing larger structure-only floor-plan datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AntPlan-270数据集和Architect-Ant框架，通过细调视觉语言模型与领域特定语言（DSL）实现可编辑、几何合理且功能可信的自动家具布局生成，并支持高质量蓝图式图像渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有自动家具布置研究受限于缺乏带细粒度家具标注的真实专业平面图数据集。
AI.method: 构建含270张带房间级家具边界框标注的平面图数据集AntPlan-270；提出Architect-Ant框架，采用坐标编码的DSL表示家具布局，结合建筑约束生成程序化推理轨迹用于监督微调，并通过偏好优化提升布局质量；DSL可光栅化为语义掩码并驱动Flux-based LoRA渲染器生成蓝图图像。
AI.result: Architect-Ant在布局合理性、几何有效性与功能可信性方面表现优异，能扩展应用于更大规模无家具平面图数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为自动室内布置提供了高质量数据基础与可编辑、可解释、可渲染的端到端解决方案，推动了建筑AI的实际落地。

title: When RL Fails after SFT: Rejuvenating Model Plasticity for Robust SFT-to-RL Handoff
summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) followed by Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become a standard pipeline for Large Language Model (LLM) post-training. SFT is expected to provide a useful behavioral prior for RL to further enhance model capabilities. However, checkpoints with excessive SFT often show limited improvement during RL. We attribute this failure to the loss of model plasticity: the reduced ability of an SFT-initialized policy to be effectively reshaped by subsequent RL. To better understand this phenomenon, we conduct detailed analysis from multiple perspectives, including parameter changes, output spaces, and RL optimization dynamics. Our results show that models from excessive SFT tend to produce over-confident token distributions and exhibit sharp parameter landscapes, which make them harder to optimize in the RL stage. To enable a more robust SFT-to-RL handoff, we propose \texttt{Rejuvenation}, a simple yet effective method that restores plasticity while preserving useful SFT-acquired priors. Rejuvenation leverages base-anchored model fusion to reduce excessive SFT-induced drift with targeted neuron reset to mitigate model rigidity. Experimental results on both math reasoning tasks and agentic tasks demonstrate that our approach consistently improves RL performance on over-trained SFT models, while also enhancing generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文发现过度监督微调（SFT）会损害大语言模型在后续强化学习（RL）阶段的可塑性，导致性能提升受限；为此提出Rejuvenation方法，通过基模型锚定融合与目标神经元重置来恢复可塑性，在数学推理与智能体任务上均显著提升RL效果及泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 过度SFT导致模型在后续RL阶段优化困难，作者认为其根本原因是模型可塑性（plasticity）下降，即SFT后策略难以被RL有效重塑。
AI.method: 提出Rejuvenation方法，包含两个核心组件：1）基于基模型锚定的模型融合，以缓解过度SFT带来的参数漂移；2）有针对性的神经元重置，以缓解模型刚性、恢复可塑性。
AI.result: 在数学推理和智能体任务上，Rejuvenation显著提升了过训练SFT模型的RL性能，并增强了对分布外任务的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SFT并非越久越好，需在行为先验获取与模型可塑性之间取得平衡；Rejuvenation提供了一种轻量、通用且有效的SFT-to-RL过渡增强方案。

title: Multi-UAV Active Sensing with Information Gain-based Planning and Belief Fusion
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used for active sensing and information gathering in spatially distributed environments. Their performance, however, is constrained by limited flight time, sensing uncertainty, and the trade-off between spatial coverage and observation accuracy. This paper presents a real-world validation of a multi-UAV active sensing framework for probabilistic binary terrain mapping, with precision agriculture used as the application case. The environment is represented as a probabilistic belief map, where spatial dependencies are modeled through a factor-graph formulation. UAV decision making is guided by Information Gain based Informative Path Planning (IGbIPP), and the approach is compared with Random Walk and Sweep coverage path planning baselines using both synthetic terrains and real UAV-derived agricultural imagery. The study also evaluates spatial correlation weights and several probabilistic belief-fusion rules for multi-UAV information sharing. Results show that IGbIPP reduces entropy and mapping error more effectively than the baselines, while a wider field of view improves real-world coverage and map accuracy. The results further show that simple equal or biased spatial weights can be more robust than adaptive weights, and that Bayesian, log-odds, and Dempster--Shafer fusion achieve the best cooperative mapping performance. These findings highlight the importance of uncertainty-driven planning, sensing geometry, spatial modeling, and probabilistic fusion for real-world UAV-based active sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于信息增益的多无人机主动感知框架，用于概率性二值地形建图（以精准农业为应用），结合因子图建模空间依赖、IGbIPP路径规划及多种概率融合规则，在真实农业场景中验证了其在降低熵与建图误差方面的优越性。
AI.motivation: 无人机在空间分布式环境中执行主动感知任务时受限于续航时间、感知不确定性以及覆盖范围与观测精度之间的权衡。
AI.method: 采用因子图建模环境的概率信念图；基于信息增益的启发式路径规划（IGbIPP）指导多无人机决策；对比随机游走和扫掠式路径规划；评估不同空间相关权重与多种概率信念融合规则（如贝叶斯、对数几率、Dempster-Shafer）。
AI.result: IGbIPP显著优于基线方法，降低了熵和建图误差；更宽视场提升真实场景覆盖率与地图精度；简单等权或偏差空间权重比自适应权重更鲁棒；贝叶斯、对数几率与Dempster-Shafer融合效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性驱动的规划、感知几何设计、空间建模与概率融合共同构成面向真实场景的无人机主动感知关键要素。

title: ChartLens: A Dual-Branch Framework for Chart Data Correction and Factual Summary Refinement
summary: In this report, we present our champion solution for the DataMFM Challenge Track 2: Chart Understanding. This track requires models to recover structured chart data and generate faithful natural-language summaries from chart images. To address the complementary requirements of accurate data extraction and factual narration, we propose ChartLens, a dual-branch framework for chart data correction and summary refinement. ChartLens consists of two key modules: Structure-Aware CSV Verification and Correction (SAVC) and Text-Retention-Guided Summary Refinement (TRSR). SAVC improves the reliability of structured data extraction through verification and correction, while TRSR enhances summary generation by preserving critical textual and numerical evidence from charts. By combining model adaptation, correction-based generation, and OCR-assisted evidence grounding, ChartLens improves both structured data recovery and summary factuality. On the test set, our final system achieves an overall score of 69.10 and ranks first in Track 2, demonstrating its effectiveness for accurate chart understanding. Our code will be released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPRW26-ChartLens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ChartLens双分支框架，用于图表理解任务，通过结构感知的CSV验证与修正（SAVC）和文本保留引导的摘要精炼（TRSR）模块，提升图表结构化数据提取与自然语言摘要生成的准确性与事实性，在DataMFM挑战赛Track 2中排名第一。
AI.motivation: 解决图表理解任务中结构化数据提取不准确和自然语言摘要缺乏事实依据的问题。
AI.method: 提出ChartLens双分支框架，包含Structure-Aware CSV Verification and Correction (SAVC) 和 Text-Retention-Guided Summary Refinement (TRSR) 两个模块，并结合模型适配、基于修正的生成及OCR辅助证据锚定。
AI.result: 在测试集上取得69.10的总分，位居DataMFM Challenge Track 2榜首。
AI.conclusion: ChartLens有效提升了图表结构化数据恢复与摘要事实性的协同能力，验证了双分支设计在图表理解任务中的有效性。

title: Mind the Gap: Can Frontier LLMs Pass a Standardized Office Proficiency Exam?
summary: The deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents for computer automation is accelerating, yet their ability to navigate complex, professional-grade productivity software is largely untested. We argue that Office automation is an ideal environment for benchmarking document-automation capability, as it requires long-horizon planning and reasoning, precise parameter configuration, and multi-application integration. To quantify this capability, we introduce an evaluation based on China's National Computer Rank Examination (NCRE), featuring 200 comprehensive practical-operation tasks across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Each task is scored on a 100-point rubric scale using 7,118 machine-gradable criteria, and Score Rate (SR) denotes the mean percentage of rubric points earned across these tasks. We benchmark 7 frontier LLMs and observe stark limitations: single-turn models score a maximum of 36.6%. A stronger agentic system with execution feedback, iterative repair, and broader Office automation access reaches 68.8%, but remains below the 95.5% community-reference score used as a scoring sanity check. Ultimately, our experiments demonstrate that despite recent advancements in code generation, achieving reliable fine-grained Office document automation remains a significant challenge for current code-generating LLM and agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于中国计算机等级考试（NCRE）的Office自动化评测基准，包含Word、Excel、PowerPoint共200个实操任务，采用7118条可机器评估标准进行100分制评分；实验表明当前前沿大模型及智能体系统在细粒度办公文档自动化方面仍存在显著局限，最高仅达68.8%得分率，远低于人类参考水平95.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在专业级办公软件（如Word/Excel/PPT）中的复杂操作能力缺乏系统性评测；Office自动化能有效检验长周期规划、精确参数配置与多应用协同等核心能力，是理想的文档自动化能力评测场景。
AI.method: 构建基于NCRE考试的Office自动化评测基准，涵盖200个跨三类办公软件的实操任务；设计含7118项机器可判别细则的100分制评分体系，以得分率（SR）作为核心指标；对7个前沿LLM及增强型智能体系统（含执行反馈与迭代修复）进行系统评测。
AI.result: 单轮调用模型最高得分为36.6%，具备执行反馈和迭代修复能力的强智能体系统达68.8%，但仍显著低于社区参考得分95.5%；所有模型在细粒度Office操作任务上均表现不足。
AI.conclusion: 尽管代码生成能力持续进步，当前代码生成型大模型与智能体系统尚无法实现可靠、精细的办公文档自动化，亟需在长程规划、精准控制与多软件协同等方面取得突破。

title: nCMD: Benign-Anchored Feature Selection for Imbalanced Network Intrusion Detection
summary:
Feature selection is critical for network intrusion detection systems (NIDS) operating under high-dimensional, highly imbalanced traffic, as found in operational and defense networks. Traditional filter methods rank features using global statistics computed symmetrically across classes and thus fail to capture the asymmetry of intrusion detection, where attacks are best characterized as deviations from dominant benign traffic.
  We propose benign-anchored Classwise Mean Deviation (nCMD), a lightweight and interpretable method that scores feature relevance based on the deviation of attack-class distributions from the benign-class mean, rather than a globally biased reference. This approach aligns feature selection with the operational semantics of NIDS at no additional computational cost.
  Across four benchmark datasets (CICIDS2017, CICDDoS2019, NSL-KDD, and UNSW-NB15), multiple feature budgets, and three downstream classifiers, nCMD matches or exceeds classical filter baselines in macro-averaged F1-score. It achieves the best result on three of the four datasets and under every classifier, with the strongest improvements observed under tight feature budgets and severe class imbalance. These results support benign-anchored ranking as a scalable and interpretable preprocessing component for resource-constrained NIDS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向网络入侵检测的轻量级、可解释的特征选择方法nCMD，以良性流量均值为锚点，度量攻击类在各特征上的偏离程度，从而更贴合入侵检测中‘异常即攻击’的本质。实验表明其在多个数据集和分类器下优于传统滤波方法，尤其在特征受限与类别严重不平衡时优势显著。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波方法基于全局对称统计量排序特征，无法刻画入侵检测中攻击作为良性流量偏差的本质不对称性。
AI.method: 提出良性锚定的Classwise Mean Deviation（nCMD）方法：对每个特征，计算攻击类样本在该特征上相对于良性类均值的平均绝对偏差作为特征得分。
AI.result: 在CICIDS2017、CICDDoS2019、NSL-KDD和UNSW-NB15四个数据集上，nCMD在多种特征数量约束和三类下游分类器下，宏F1分数均匹配或超越经典滤波基线；在三个数据集及所有分类器上取得最优性能，尤其在特征预算紧张和类别极度不平衡时提升最明显。
AI.conclusion: nCMD是一种计算零开销、语义清晰、可扩展性强的特征选择方法，适合作为资源受限NIDS中可解释的预处理组件。

title: Janus: A Benchmark for Goal-Conditioned Information Distortion in LLMs
summary: LLM deception is often evaluated through direct markers such as fabricated claims, explicit lies, or strategic concealment. However, many real-world misleading communications do not depend on false statements, rather, they arise from selective treatment of true material facts: omitting adverse evidence, softening unfavorable details, emphasizing favorable details, or replacing precise qualifications with vague language. Existing benchmarks largely miss this subtler and arguably more dangerous failure mode. We introduce JANUS, a benchmark for measuring goal-conditioned pragmatic distortion in fact-grounded LLM outputs. Each scenario in our benchmark provides a fixed pool of favorable and adverse facts and compares a neutral condition against a goal-directed condition, such as increasing adoption, enrollment, approval, or support, despite potential harm to directly affected individuals or groups. Because all outputs are constrained to use the same fact pool, JANUS isolates misleading net impressions from hallucination and fabrication. JANUS contains 160 scenarios across 8 domains, with each scenario paired with neutral and goal-conditioned prompts and annotated material facts. Extensive experiments across 12 LLMs reveal consistent goal-conditioned distortions, demonstrating that current models remain sensitive to incentive and framing objectives and lack robust safeguards against selectively misleading communication. We publicly release our corpus and code for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JANUS基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在事实约束下、受目标驱动而产生的语用扭曲（如选择性呈现事实），而非传统意义上的幻觉或说谎；实验表明12个主流LLM普遍存在此类误导性偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM欺骗评估多关注显性虚假（如捏造、说谎），但现实中更危险的误导常源于对真实事实的选择性处理（如隐瞒不利信息、模糊化表述），而当前基准未能覆盖这一关键问题。
AI.method: 构建JANUS基准：包含160个跨8领域的场景，每个场景提供固定的事实池（含有利与不利事实），并设置中性提示与目标导向提示（如提升支持率），强制模型仅基于同一事实池生成输出，从而隔离语用扭曲与幻觉。
AI.result: 在12个主流LLM上的实验显示，所有模型均表现出一致的目标条件化扭曲——即在追求特定目标时系统性地偏向有利事实、弱化不利事实，形成误导性整体印象。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在事实 grounded 条件下仍易受目标激励影响而产生选择性误导，缺乏抵御语用扭曲的鲁棒机制；JANUS为该问题提供了可复现、可量化的评估新范式。

title: Diffusion Forcing Planner: History-Annealed Planning with Time-Dependent Guidance for Autonomous Driving
summary: Learning-based motion planners, despite recent progress, often suffer from temporal inconsistency. Small perturbations across frames can accumulate into unstable trajectories, degrading comfort and safety in closed-loop driving. Several methods attempt to inject history as a static conditioning signal to stabilize outputs, only to induce the planner to copy historical patterns instead of adapting to environment contexts. To address this limitation, we propose Diffusion Forcing Planner (DFP), a diffusion-based planning framework driven by history-guided control. Specifically, DFP decomposes the full trajectory into history, current and future segments, and assign independent noise levels to each segment. The model jointly denoises the historical and the future segments, enforcing a heterogeneous joint diffusion process. At inference, classifier-free guidance (CFG) is applied to steer future sampling using annealed history in a controllable manner. Closed-loop evaluation and comprehensive ablations on nuPlan show that DFP achieves competitive performance while producing continuous, stable, and controllable motion plans in complex driving scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的运动规划框架DFP，通过历史引导控制解决学习型规划器的时间不一致性问题，实现稳定、连续且可控的轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 学习型运动规划器存在时间不一致性问题，帧间小扰动易累积导致轨迹不稳定，影响驾驶舒适性与安全性；现有历史条件化方法易导致过度依赖历史模式而缺乏环境适应性。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion Forcing Planner（DFP）：将轨迹划分为历史、当前和未来段，为各段分配独立噪声水平，联合去噪历史与未来段，构建异质联合扩散过程；推理时采用退火历史驱动的Classifier-Free Guidance（CFG）进行可控未来采样。
AI.result: 在nuPlan上闭环评估与消融实验表明，DFP在保持竞争力的同时，显著提升轨迹连续性、稳定性与可控性。
AI.conclusion: DFP通过历史引导的异质扩散建模，有效缓解时间不一致性，在复杂驾驶场景中实现了更鲁棒、自适应的运动规划。

title: ManiSplat: Manipulation Trajectory Synthesis from Monocular Video via Decoupled 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Reconstructing dynamic and interactive 3D scenes from real-world observations remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting have enabled high-fidelity static reconstruction, extending it to interactive environments with articulated robots and manipulable objects remains difficult due to complex contact interactions and abrupt pose changes. To address these challenges, we introduce ManiSplat, a unified framework that reconstructs controllable and decoupled Gaussian digital twins directly from monocular ego-view robotic videos. Our method introduces a Graph-Structured Disentangled Representation that separates the robot, objects, and background into independently optimizable Gaussian subfields organized within a scene graph. To ensure stability, we propose a Task-Oriented Spatio-Temporal Alignment module that leverages the inherent logic of manipulation tasks-alternating between Motion and Skill phases-to construct accurate pseudo-ground-truth trajectories. Finally, a joint photometric-geometric optimization ensures the reconstructed scenes are temporally coherent, physically consistent, and simulation-ready. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach reconstructs interaction-driven dynamic scenes with high fidelity and controllability, effectively supporting downstream robotic tasks and policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ManiSplat框架，利用单目机器人视频重建可交互、解耦的高保真3D场景，通过图结构解耦表征与任务导向时空对齐实现动态场景建模。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅方法难以处理含机器人与可操作物体的交互式动态场景，尤其在接触交互和突变姿态下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出ManiSplat框架：1）图结构解耦表征，将机器人、物体与背景建模为场景图中独立优化的高斯子场；2）任务导向时空对齐模块，依据操作任务的运动-技能相位交替构建伪真值轨迹；3）联合光度-几何优化保证时序一致性与物理合理性。
AI.result: 在多个交互场景中实现了高保真、可控的动态3D重建，支持下游机器人任务与策略学习，显著优于现有动态重建方法。
AI.conclusion: ManiSplat为从单目机器人视频构建仿真就绪、可操控的数字孪生提供了统一且有效的解决方案，推动了具身智能中动态场景理解的发展。

title: Bellman-Taylor Score Decoding for Markov Decision Processes with State-Dependent Feasible Action Sets
summary: Many Markov decision processes (MDPs) in operations research have feasible actions that are state dependent and defined implicitly by various operational constraints. These features make it difficult to use standard deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms, whose action interfaces typically assume either a fixed finite action catalog or a simple Euclidean space. Motivated by a Taylor expansion of the optimal action-value function, we propose Bellman--Taylor score decoding, a framework that moves policy learning to a Euclidean score space while enforcing feasibility through an action decoder. The induced latent-score MDP then can be optimized by standard DRL algorithms without differentiating through the decoder. We provide a performance guarantee showing that the optimality gap of this approach decomposes into a structural approximation error and an algorithmic learning error. Lastly, we apply this framework to a queueing network control problem, where the policy essentially learns a state-dependent index-based dispatching rule. Numerical experiments show near-optimal performance in small instances and considerable improvements over benchmarks in larger systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bellman-Taylor score decoding框架，将策略学习转移到欧氏得分空间，并通过动作解码器确保可行性，从而解决状态依赖隐式约束下的MDP问题。
AI.motivation: 许多运筹学中的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）具有状态依赖且由操作约束隐式定义的可行动作，这使得标准深度强化学习（DRL）算法难以直接应用。
AI.method: 基于最优动作值函数的泰勒展开，提出Bellman-Taylor score decoding框架：将策略学习映射到欧氏得分空间，用动作解码器保证动作可行性，形成潜在得分MDP，并用标准DRL算法优化（无需对解码器求导）。
AI.result: 理论给出性能保证，表明最优性差距由结构近似误差和算法学习误差组成；在排队网络控制任务中，策略自动学习到状态依赖的索引式调度规则，小规模实例接近最优，大规模系统显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了状态依赖隐式约束MDP的DRL建模难题，在理论保障与实际性能上均取得良好效果，为复杂约束下的智能决策提供了新范式。

title: One Lens, Many Worlds : A Capability-Typed Interface for World-Model Interpretability
summary: World models are now built on substantially different computational substrates. Latent recurrent state-space models such as PlaNet and the Dreamer family compress observations into recurrent states; token-based models such as IRIS quantize observations into a learned codebook and predict autoregressively with a transformer; and joint-embedding predictive architectures such as I-JEPA predict in a learned latent space with no pixel decoder. The interpretability methods applied to these models, including probing, activation patching, sparse autoencoders, and surprise analysis, share a common set of primitives, yet they are re-implemented from scratch for each architecture because existing hook-and-cache tooling assumes a transformer language model with no notion of actions, environment steps, or imagined rollouts. We argue that this fragmentation reflects the tooling rather than the models, and that the shared structure of world models is captured by a small typed interface. We present WorldModelLens, an open-source interpretability substrate organized around a capability-typed adapter: every model implements four required methods (encode, transition, initial state, sample) and declares a set of optional heads (decode, reward, continue, actor, critic) through an explicit capability descriptor, so that reinforcement-learning and self-supervised world models are first-class without either imitating the other. A single hook and cache layer exposes time-indexed activations, imagination rollouts, and intervention replay over this interface, allowing each analysis to be written once.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WorldModelLens，一个面向世界模型的可解释性框架，通过统一接口抽象不同架构（如PlaNet、Dreamer、IRIS、I-JEPA）的共性能力，支持跨模型复用解释方法（如探测、激活修补等），解决现有工具碎片化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型架构差异大，但解释方法却需为每种架构重复实现，因当前钩子与缓存工具仅适配标准Transformer语言模型，缺乏对动作、环境步长和想象 rollout 的建模支持。
AI.method: 设计一个能力类型化的适配器接口，要求模型实现encode、transition、initial state、sample四个核心方法，并通过显式能力描述符声明可选头（如decode、reward、actor等）；在此之上构建统一的hook-and-cache层，支持时间索引激活、想象 rollout 和干预重放。
AI.result: 实现了WorldModelLens开源框架，使同一分析代码可跨多种世界模型架构运行，验证了其在PlaNet、Dreamer、IRIS、I-JEPA等模型上的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型的结构共性可通过小型类型化接口统一表达，WorldModelLens证明了统一可解释性基础设施的可行性与必要性，推动了跨架构可解释性研究的标准化。

title: Pushing the Limits of LLM Tool Calling via Experiential Knowledge Integration and Activation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on tool use to act as autonomous agents, yet often fail in multi-step execution due to insufficient tool-related knowledge and ineffective knowledge activation. Therefore, we present a systematic study on how knowledge influences tool-use performance, covering the stages of knowledge acquisition, activation, and internalization. In the knowledge acquisition stage, we acquire and evaluate various forms of experiential knowledge, and our analysis shows that simple instance-level knowledge can already provide strong and reliable gains, while abstract intent-level knowledge offers limited benefits. At inference time, to activate knowledge, we find that prompting LLM to expand the depth of reasoning yields diminishing returns, whereas expanding the width of reasoning by parallel sampling with aggregation more effectively activates latent experiential knowledge. At training time, for knowledge internalization, post-training with knowledge-augmented data further improves performance, with reinforcement learning outperforming supervised fine-tuning. Based on these insights, we propose the Knowledge-Augmented Tool Execution (KATE), a knowledge-augmented tool execution framework that integrates experiential knowledge with reasoning-width-expanded inference and knowledge-aware training. Experiments on BFCL-V3 and AppWorld demonstrate consistent and substantial improvements over strong baselines across model scales. Our Code is available at https://github.com/hypasd-art/KATE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KATE框架，通过知识获取、激活与内化三个阶段提升大语言模型的工具使用能力，尤其强调实例级经验知识的有效性、推理宽度扩展的激活策略，以及知识增强训练的内部化效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多步工具执行中常因工具相关知识不足和知识激活失效而失败，需系统研究知识如何影响工具使用性能。
AI.method: 系统分析知识在获取、激活与内化三阶段的作用：获取阶段评估不同粒度知识（实例级 vs 意图级）；激活阶段对比推理深度扩展与宽度扩展（并行采样+聚合）；内化阶段比较监督微调与强化学习在知识增强数据上的效果，并据此构建KATE框架。
AI.result: 实例级知识显著提升性能；推理宽度扩展比深度扩展更有效激活知识；强化学习在知识内化中优于监督微调；KATE在BFCL-V3和AppWorld上显著超越强基线。
AI.conclusion: 知识的质量与使用方式同等重要——高质量的实例经验知识配合宽度扩展推理与知识感知训练，可显著提升LLM工具执行能力，KATE为工具增强智能体提供了可扩展、可复现的范式。

title: A Spiking Neural Architecture for Coordinating Arm and Locomotor Control
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) coupled with neuromorphic hardware offer energy-efficient solutions for humanoid robot control. However, existing SNN-based motor control systems address bipedal locomotion and arm control in isolation, leaving integrated control of both unaddressed. We present a spiking architecture that coordinates force-based arm control and bipedal locomotion in a simulated humanoid, using the Neural Engineering Framework (NEF) and Semantic Pointer Architecture (SPA). High-level action selection between locomotor and arm control is mediated by a biologically grounded spiking basal ganglia model. We validate the system through co-simulation of Nengo, for the neural control, and Isaac Sim, demonstrating successful target reaching, continuous digit drawing, path-following locomotion, and finally, switching between walking and arm control via basal ganglia disinhibition. To our knowledge, this is the first integrated spiking controller to combine bipedal locomotion and arm control on a full-scale humanoid platform. The full spike-based implementation enables future deployment on low-power neuromorphic hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的集成控制器，首次在全尺寸人形机器人仿真中统一实现脉冲式的双足行走与力控手臂操作，并通过基底神经节模型实现行为切换，支持未来低功耗类脑硬件部署。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SNN的运动控制系统仅分别处理双足行走或手臂控制，缺乏二者协同的集成方案。
AI.method: 采用神经工程框架（NEF）和语义指针架构（SPA）构建脉冲神经网络，结合生物启发的脉冲型基底神经节模型实现高层动作选择与切换；通过Nengo与Isaac Sim联合仿真验证。
AI.result: 系统成功实现了目标抓取、连续手指绘图、路径跟随行走，以及基底神经节介导的行走/手臂控制动态切换。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在全尺寸人形机器人上集成双足运动与手臂力控的纯脉冲式控制器，具备向低功耗类脑硬件部署的潜力。

title: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0 Technical Report
summary: We introduce Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) multimodal foundation model designed to advance long-video understanding and agentic intelligence. To address the challenges of ultra-long contexts, information redundancy, and prohibitive computational costs inherent in hour-level videos, Keye-VL-2.0 is the first to adapt DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) to GQA-based multimodal architectures, enabling lossless 256K context processing while capturing critical frames and long-range temporal dependencies. This architecture is underpinned by a highly optimized training and inference infrastructure, including scalable video I/O, heterogeneous ViT-LM parallelism, and custom DSA kernels that significantly maximize throughput and minimize computational overhead. Furthermore, to overcome the algorithmic dilemma of catastrophic forgetting during multi-task alignment, we introduce Cross-Modal Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) paired with Context-RL and Video-RL. By distilling dense token-level teacher feedback from on-policy rollouts back into the MoE backbone, which activates only 3B parameters, Keye-VL-2.0 natively empowers advanced agent collaboration across Code, Tool, and Search scenarios with multimodal self-correction. Extensive evaluations across video understanding, temporal grounding, reasoning, STEM, and agent benchmarks demonstrate that Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of similar scale, particularly excelling in fine-grained temporal localization on TimeLens and long-video comprehension on Video-MME-v2 and LongVideoBench. We release our model checkpoints to accelerate community progress toward scalable and robust multimodal agentic applications.

AI.tldr: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B 是一个开源 MoE 多模态基础模型，首次将 DeepSeek 稀疏注意力（DSA）适配至 GQA 架构，支持无损 256K 上下文处理，并通过跨模态多教师在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）与视频/上下文强化学习缓解灾难性遗忘，实现高效长视频理解与多智能体协作能力。
AI.motivation: 解决小时级长视频理解中的超长上下文、信息冗余和计算开销巨大等挑战，并克服多任务对齐中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 1) 将 DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) 首次适配到 GQA 多模态架构；2) 构建优化的训练/推理基础设施（视频 I/O、异构 ViT-LM 并行、定制 DSA 内核）；3) 提出 Cross-Modal Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation（MOPD）结合 Context-RL 和 Video-RL 进行知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在 TimeLens（细粒度时序定位）、Video-MME-v2 和 LongVideoBench（长视频理解）等基准上达到同规模模型 SOTA；支持 Code/Tool/Search 场景下的多模态自纠错智能体协作。
AI.conclusion: Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B 是首个兼顾超长视频理解能力与高效 MoE 推理的开源多模态智能体基础模型，其架构与训练范式为可扩展、鲁棒的多模态智能体应用提供了新路径。

title: Null-Space Constrained Low-Rank Adaptation for Response-Specified Large Language Model Unlearning
summary: Large language model unlearning aims to suppress designated undesirable knowledge while preserving benign capabilities. Many unlearning objectives focus on suppressing undesired answers, while recent target-guided variants specify replacement behavior but still leave update locality largely unconstrained. This paper introduces \emph{Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning} (NSRU), a projection-constrained low-rank framework for controlled LLM unlearning. NSRU uses an explicitly structured safe target response to specify the desired behavior for each forget query, while suppressing the original undesired content. To localize adaptation, NSRU estimates per-module retain subspaces from benign hidden representations and uses an orthogonal-projected low-rank parameterization to confine LoRA updates to the null space of the retain subspace. The resulting objective jointly optimizes safe-target learning, undesired-response suppression, and retention preservation under this constrained parameterization. We provide a local first-order analysis showing that the projected update reduces retain-side perturbations while preserving editable directions for shaping forget-query behavior. Experiments on TOFU show that NSRU effectively suppresses extractable forget-set knowledge while improving retain QA performance, model utility, and safe-target alignment over representative baselines. On WMDP, NSRU keeps hazardous-domain accuracy near the random-choice region while preserving broad and domain-adjacent MMLU utility. Ablation studies support the complementary roles of safe-target supervision, undesired-response suppression, retention loss, and null-space projected updates, while sensitivity and robustness analyses indicate stable behavior across the tested hyperparameter and prompt variations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning（NSRU）的新方法，通过在参数更新中引入零空间约束的低秩投影，实现对大语言模型中特定不良知识的精准遗忘，同时保留模型的良性能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型遗忘方法要么仅抑制不良答案，要么虽指定替代行为但缺乏对更新局部性的控制；本文旨在解决更新过度扩散、损害模型保留能力的问题。
AI.method: NSRU采用显式结构化的安全目标响应来定义每个遗忘查询的理想输出，并基于良性隐藏表示估计各模块的保留子空间，再通过正交投影的低秩参数化将LoRA更新限制在该子空间的零空间内，联合优化安全目标学习、不良响应抑制与保留能力维持。
AI.result: 在TOFU和WMDP数据集上的实验表明，NSRU能有效消除可提取的遗忘知识，提升保留问答性能、模型效用及安全目标对齐度；在危险领域保持接近随机猜测的准确率，同时维持MMLU等广泛及邻域任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: NSRU通过零空间约束的响应指定遗忘框架，实现了更局部、可控且高效的LLM遗忘，在遗忘效果与能力保留之间取得了更好平衡，为可信AI提供新思路。

title: RKSC: Reasoning-Aware KV Cache Sharing and Confident Early Exit for Multi-Step LLM Inference
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on Statistical Frameworks for Uncertainty in Agentic Systems
summary: We introduce RKSC (Reasoning-Aware KV Cache Sharing), a training-free inference framework that eliminates two structural redundancies in multi-branch LLM reasoning pipelines. ASKS (Attention-Similarity KV Sharing) computes the prefix KV cache once and broadcasts it to all semantically similar branches via hidden-state cosine similarity, strictly generalising the token-exact prefix caching used by vLLM and SGLang. CGEE (Confidence-Gated Early Exit) applies two complementary exit mechanisms: (1) it skips the verification forward pass entirely when generation confidence is decisive across branches, and (2) it terminates the verification pass at an intermediate layer when per-layer entropy stabilises, using lightweight hooks on the transformer backbone. RSBCM (Reasoning-Selective Block Cache Manager) prevents unbounded cache growth via attention-weighted depth-priority eviction. Across five model families (7B-10B), four benchmarks, and 1,000 evaluated problems, RKSC achieves a mean speedup of 3.008x over the No-KV baseline (peak 3.990x), a 1.66x mean improvement over vLLM-equivalent prefix caching, with a CGEE-induced error rate of only 0.37% (6 errors out of 1,616 verify calls). No fine-tuning or architecture changes are required. Code is available at https://github.com/AnirudhSekar/RKSC.

AI.tldr: RKSC是一种无需训练的推理框架，通过ASKS、CGEE和RSBCM三个模块消除多分支大语言模型推理中的结构冗余，在不改变模型结构和无需微调的前提下显著提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 解决多分支大语言模型推理中KV缓存重复计算和验证过程冗余的问题，提升推理效率。
AI.method: 提出RKSC框架，包含三个核心组件：ASKS（基于注意力相似性的KV共享）、CGEE（置信度门控的早退出机制）和RSBCM（推理选择性块缓存管理器）。
AI.result: 在5个模型家族、4个基准测试、1000个问题上，相比无KV缓存基线平均加速3.008倍（峰值3.990倍），相比vLLM等效前缀缓存提升1.66倍，错误率仅0.37%。
AI.conclusion: RKSC是一种高效、通用、即插即用的推理优化框架，适用于现有主流大语言模型，无需任何微调或架构修改。

title: Trace Only What You Need: Structure-Aware On-Demand Hypergraph Memory for Long-Document Question Answering
summary: Long-document question answering (QA) requires large language models (LLMs) to reason over evidence scattered across lengthy documents, where answers often depend on event order, section-level context, and cross-part evidence connections. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces the input context by retrieving relevant evidence, existing structured RAG methods still face three limitations: costly query-agnostic knowledge organization, insufficient use of original document structure, and no reuse of historical reasoning experience. To address these limitations, we propose DocTrace, a multi-agent RAG framework for long-document QA that supports query-triggered knowledge organization, document-structure-aware and experience-guided reasoning. DocTrace preserves document hierarchy with a lightweight document structural tree index, constructs agent-shared hypergraph-structured working memory on demand during reasoning, and stores successful reasoning plans in graph-structured experience memory for future reuse, enabling adaptive exploration across related long-document questions. Experiments on four long-document QA datasets show that DocTrace achieves the best performance on three datasets, surpassing the strongest baseline, ComoRAG, by up to 8.85% in F1 and 4.40% in EM, while reducing the overall computational cost by 53.32%

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocTrace，一种面向长文档问答的多智能体RAG框架，通过查询触发的知识组织、文档结构感知与经验引导推理，显著提升性能并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化RAG方法存在查询无关知识组织开销大、未充分利用原始文档结构、无法复用历史推理经验三大局限。
AI.method: DocTrace构建轻量级文档结构树索引以保留层次信息，按需构建智能体共享的超图结构工作记忆，并将成功推理路径存入图结构经验记忆以供复用。
AI.result: 在四个长文档QA数据集上，DocTrace在三个数据集上达到最优性能，F1最高提升8.85%，EM最高提升4.40%，整体计算成本降低53.32%。
AI.conclusion: DocTrace有效解决了长文档QA中结构利用不足与经验不可复用的问题，实现了高效、自适应的多跳推理。

title: Generation of Diverse and Functional Robot Designs using Superquadrics Parametrisation and Quality-Diversity
summary: Generative design of robots requires navigating a vast search-space, encompassing physical configurations and behavioural parameters. Evolutionary Algorithms (EAs) have shown promising results, but often converge prematurely to a small set of sub-optimal designs. Most EAs fail to maintain sufficient diversity in the population that would allow the discovery of distinct functional robots. To counter premature convergence, we introduce a superquadrics-based representation (SQs) for robot bodies. SQs are interpretable, compact and computationally efficient mathematical representations of 3D geometrical shapes that can be tuned to specific design-spaces. To encourage morphological diversity, we combine this representation with a quality-diversity (QD) algorithm (MAP-Elites). We compare SQs and Compositional Pattern Producing Networks representations as generators of morphologies, combining them with standard EAs and MAP-Elites. In two test environments, we find that using SQs to generate morphology in conjunction with the MAP-Elites algorithm reaches the highest QD-score across both environments, maximising diversity of design and functionality of generated robots. The findings highlight the benefits of using a compact and interpretable geometric representation for exploring a complex design-space and suggest that combining SQs with an explicit diversity mechanism increases the quality and number of designs generated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超二次曲面（SQs）的机器人形态表示方法，并结合质量多样性算法MAP-Elites，有效提升了生成机器人在形态与功能上的多样性与质量，优于传统进化算法和CPPN等表示方法。
AI.motivation: 解决进化算法在机器人生成设计中易早熟收敛、种群多样性不足、难以发现多样化功能性机器人的问题。
AI.method: 引入可解释、紧凑且高效的超二次曲面（SQs）作为机器人身体的几何表示，并将其与质量多样性算法MAP-Elites结合；对比SQs与CPPN两种形态生成器，分别嵌入标准进化算法和MAP-Elites，在两个测试环境中评估性能。
AI.result: SQs+MAP-Elites组合在两个环境中均取得最高QD-score，显著提升设计多样性与机器人功能性；SQs比CPPN更利于维持高质量多样解。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑可解释的几何表示（如SQs）配合显式多样性机制（如MAP-Elites），能更高效探索复杂机器人设计空间，提升生成设计的质量与数量。

title: STEDiff: Strengthening Text Embedding for Text-to-Image Alignment in Diffusion Model
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, to appear at IJCNN 2026
summary: Although pretrained text-to-image (T2I) generation models can produce high-quality images, they often fail to faithfully reflect the semantic intent of complex prompts due to stochastic noise and inherent model limitations. This issue frequently manifests as the model overlooking specific objects or failing to correctly bind attributes to their corresponding entities, a challenge referred to as semantic alignment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on computationally expensive fine-tuning or labor-intensive layout priors, we propose STEDiff, a training-free method designed to enhance semantic representations directly within the text-embedding space. Specifically, we introduce a method that primarily leverages the [EOT] token to strengthen the relevant semantics of sub-sentences and then replaces the corresponding tokens in the original prompt. Furthermore, a novel semantic enhancement loss is incorporated to enforce spatial constraints, ensuring that the semantics of each entity are precisely mapped to their respective image regions. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations on the T2I-CompBench demonstrate that our method notably improves semantic consistency and generation integrity in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的文本到图像生成语义对齐方法STEDiff，通过增强文本嵌入空间中的语义表示，提升复杂提示下的生成一致性。
AI.motivation: 预训练文本到图像模型常因噪声和模型限制，难以准确反映复杂提示的语义意图，尤其在对象遗漏或属性绑定错误方面表现不佳（即语义对齐问题）。
AI.method: STEDiff利用[EOT]标记强化子句语义，并替换原提示中对应token；同时引入新型语义增强损失，施加空间约束以确保各实体语义精准映射至图像对应区域。
AI.result: 在T2I-CompBench基准上，STEDiff显著提升了复杂场景下的语义一致性和生成完整性，且无需微调或人工布局先验。
AI.conclusion: STEDiff是一种高效、免训练的语义对齐方案，为提升T2I模型在复杂提示下的可控性和保真度提供了新思路。

title: Structure from Reasoning, Numbers from Search: On-Premise Open LLMs as Structural Priors for Coupled MIMO Controller Tuning
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to IEEE Access
summary: Tuning controllers for strongly coupled multi-input multi-output (MIMO) industrial processes is hard: decentralized classical auto-tuning ignores loop interaction, and local numerical optimization from natural initializations stalls in the resulting non-convex cost landscape. We ask whether on-premise open-source large language models (LLMs), which keep data on-site and need no plant model, can help. On a single-loop CSTR, classical relay-feedback tuning (IAE 0.106, near the 0.102 optimum) beats an LLM tuner (0.162): for simple loops the LLM adds nothing.
