AI.method: 基于Kullback-Leibler散度分析扩散路径测度下的潜在空间结构，并评估最优训练扩散模型对正确token的预测精度；结合理论推导与数值实验，对比不同tokenization方案（尤其是FSQ）在文本到语音扩散模型中的表现。
AI.result: FSQ tokenization在潜在空间结构上最适配连续扩散模型；基于FSQ的TTS扩散模型性能超越强LLM基线，同时模型更小、推理更快。
AI.conclusion: FSQ是连续扩散用于分类数据的理想tokenization方案，为高效、高性能的非自回归生成建模提供了新路径。

title: VISTA: A Versatile Interactive User Simulation Toolkit for Agent Evaluation
summary: Evaluation remains a critical bottleneck for interactive agent development. Existing evaluation methods often rely on static benchmarks, which fail to capture the dynamic, multi-step nature of agentic behavior and struggle to expose meaningful failure modes. While user-simulation-based evaluation offers a promising alternative, existing simulation frameworks suffer from two major limitations. First, they provide limited mechanisms for evaluating the quality and comprehensiveness of simulated interactions, making it difficult to assess whether a simulator sufficiently explores an agent's capabilities and failure modes. Second, most frameworks are restricted to either UI-only actions or API-only actions, limiting their ability to model the full range of realistic user behaviors. To address these limitations, we propose VISTA, a Versatile Interactive user Simulation Toolkit for Agent evaluation. Our toolkit includes a suite of six metrics for measuring the realism, capability coverage, and interaction effectiveness of simulated interactions. In addition, we develop a hybrid user simulator that integrates both UI-based interactions and API-based interactions, enabling more realistic and comprehensive evaluation across diverse interactive environments. We evaluate VISTA in e-commerce shopping and education customer service settings and demonstrate that it produces more realistic and comprehensive evaluations than existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISTA，一个用于评估交互式智能体的多功能用户模拟工具包，通过六种指标衡量模拟交互的真实性、能力覆盖度和交互有效性，并开发了一个结合UI和API操作的混合用户模拟器，以实现更真实和全面的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法依赖静态基准，无法捕捉智能体的动态多步行为，且难以暴露有意义的失败模式；用户模拟评估框架存在评估质量机制不足和仅支持UI或API单一操作的局限性。
AI.method: 提出VISTA工具包，包含六种评估指标，并构建融合UI与API操作的混合用户模拟器。
AI.result: 在电商购物与教育客服场景中验证了VISTA能比现有方法提供更真实、更全面的评估结果。
AI.conclusion: VISTA有效克服了当前交互式智能体评估中模拟真实性与行为多样性不足的问题，提升了评估的可靠性与实用性。

title: SHAPO: Sharpness-Aware Policy Optimization for Safe Exploration
summary: Safe exploration is a prerequisite for deploying reinforcement learning (RL) agents in safety-critical domains. In this paper, we approach safe exploration through the lens of epistemic uncertainty, where the actor's sensitivity to parameter perturbations serves as a practical proxy for regions of high uncertainty. We propose Sharpness-Aware Policy Optimization (SHAPO), a sharpness-aware policy update rule that evaluates gradients at perturbed parameters, making policy updates pessimistic with respect to the actor's epistemic uncertainty. Analytically we show that this adjustment implicitly reweighs policy gradients, amplifying the influence of rare unsafe actions while tempering contributions from already safe ones, thereby biasing learning toward conservative behavior in under-explored regions. Across several continuous-control tasks, our method consistently improves both safety and task performance over existing baselines, significantly expanding their Pareto frontiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sharpness-Aware Policy Optimization (SHAPO) 的新方法，通过利用策略对参数扰动的敏感性来建模认知不确定性，从而实现更安全的强化学习探索。
AI.motivation: 安全探索是将强化学习智能体部署到安全关键领域的重要前提，而现有方法在平衡安全性与任务性能方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出SHAPO算法，其核心是在扰动参数处评估梯度，使策略更新对认知不确定性保持悲观，从而隐式重加权策略梯度，增强罕见不安全动作的影响并抑制已安全动作的贡献。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制任务中，SHAPO显著提升了安全性与任务性能，扩展了现有基线方法的Pareto前沿。
AI.conclusion: 基于认知不确定性的sharpness-aware策略优化是一种有效提升RL安全探索能力的新范式。

title: ZODS-RS -- Zero-training Oriented Detection & Segmentation for Remote Sensing
summary: Remote-sensing and UAV applications need models that generalize across platforms and viewpoints without task-specific training. Yet training-free pipelines often falter on oriented geometry, scale/rotation variation, and crowded ports or airfields, and rarely unify detection and segmentation. We introduce ZODS-RS, a training-free, closed-form pipeline that outputs horizontal boxes (HBB) and instance masks. Built on DINOv3 dense features and SAM-style proposals, ZODS-RS chains: PP (prototype purification via Tyler covariance), R-SEM (rotation-scale equivariant matching with separable kernels and global Hungarian assignment), and UAM (uncertainty-aware pixelwise merging with adaptive priors and optional negative prototypes). A lightweight CWLA fuses multiple DINOv3 layers. On FAIR1M (HBB) we obtain $\mathrm{mAP}_{0.50:0.95}=\mathbf{13.06}$ and $\mathrm{AP}_S=\mathbf{2.93}$ \emph{(class-averaged over ship/airplane)}; on xView (HBB) we report $\mathrm{mAP}=\mathbf{16.69}$. On our UAV dataset, ZODS-RS achieves mask $\mathrm{mIoU}=\mathbf{31.10}$ and improves small-object AP by $\mathbf{+30.70}$ over Grounded-SAM on a single 5090. This work offers a unified, \emph{no-training} solution for horizontal-box detection plus instance segmentation in aerial imagery; provides explicit closed-form formulations for PP/R-SEM/UAM tightly coupled with DINOv3; and demonstrates \emph{consistent} gains on small and crowded targets and under cross-domain shifts while keeping deployment simple.

AI.tldr: ZODS-RS是一种无需训练、基于闭式解的遥感与无人机图像分析方法，统一实现水平框检测与实例分割，利用DINOv3特征和SAM式提议，通过原型净化（PP）、旋转-尺度等变匹配（R-SEM）和不确定性感知像素融合（UAM）提升小目标与密集场景性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练遥感/UAV分析方法在朝向几何、尺度/旋转变化及港口/机场等密集场景下表现不佳，且难以统一检测与分割任务。
AI.method: 提出ZODS-RS：基于DINOv3稠密特征与SAM式提议，集成三阶段模块——PP（Tyler协方差原型净化）、R-SEM（分离核+全局匈牙利匹配的旋转-尺度等变匹配）、UAM（含自适应先验与可选负原型的不确定性感知像素融合），并采用轻量CWLA融合多层DINOv3特征。
AI.result: 在FAIR1M上mAP_{0.50:0.95}=13.06，AP_S=2.93；xView上mAP=16.69；自建UAV数据集上mask mIoU=31.10，小目标AP较Grounded-SAM提升+30.70（单卡5090）。
AI.conclusion: ZODS-RS提供了首个统一、无训练、闭式可解释的水平框检测+实例分割方案，在小目标、密集场景和跨域迁移中保持鲁棒性与部署简易性。

title: The Role of Feedback Alignment in Self-Distillation
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on RL from World Feedback (RLxF)
summary:
Conditioning a language model on additional context, such as feedback on a previous attempt, typically improves its response. Self-distillation trains the model to retain this improvement when the context is not present. The method works by matching the model's output distribution under two settings: a student that sees only the question, and a self-teacher that also sees the context. What the model learns therefore depends on what context the self-teacher receives, yet the design of this context remains largely unexplored.
  We study context design for self-distillation by training a solver on feedback from a frozen critic. We compare three conditions: (i) a binary reward (GRPO), (ii) the reference solution, and (iii) a step-by-step critique aligned to the solver's reasoning trace.
  Step-aligned critique yields the largest gains, outperforming GRPO by 16.11 points and reference-solution-conditioned self-distillation by 5.27 points (Avg@12). Per-token advantage analysis reveals why: step-aligned feedback targets only the tokens where reasoning fails, leaving correct behavior intact. Conditioning on the reference solution, by contrast, pressures the model to change its behavior at every token (even correct steps) because an alternative derivation inevitably differs in phrasing and approach. This suggests that structural alignment between feedback and the solver's reasoning is a key driver of self-distillation effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自蒸馏中上下文设计的影响，发现与求解器推理轨迹对齐的逐步批评反馈比二元奖励或参考答案更能提升模型性能，因为前者只针对推理错误的token进行修正，而后者则可能干扰正确步骤。
AI.motivation: 自蒸馏方法中，自教师所接收的上下文设计尚未被充分探索，而该设计直接影响模型学习效果。
AI.method: 在冻结的批评者提供的反馈基础上训练求解器，对比三种条件：(i) 二元奖励（GRPO），(ii) 参考答案，(iii) 与求解器推理轨迹对齐的逐步批评。
AI.result: 步骤对齐的批评反馈带来最大增益，在Avg@12上分别比GRPO高16.11分、比参考答案条件高5.27分；逐token分析表明其优势源于仅修正错误token，保留正确行为。
AI.conclusion: 反馈与求解器推理过程的结构对齐是提升自蒸馏有效性的关键因素。

title: Interpreting and Steering a Text-to-Speech Language Model with Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Language models increasingly serve as the backbone of text-to-speech (TTS) systems, yet we understand little about the representations they build when text and generated speech tokens share a single residual stream. We train BatchTopK sparse autoencoders on the LM backbone of CosyVoice3 and introduce a modality-aware auto-interp pipeline that labels each feature from where it fires-text-prefix context, 1-second speech clips, or both. The recovered features are interpretable, spanning phonemes, laughter, accent prompts and speaker gender. Steering through the SAE latent space shows these features are causal rather than merely descriptive: targeted interventions raise laughter probability from 0.02 to 0.79, flip perceived speaker gender, and control speech rate while preserving spoken content. SAE features thus serve both as interpretability objects and as control directions for TTS synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在CosyVoice3语言模型骨干上训练BatchTopK稀疏自编码器，并提出模态感知的自动解释流程，揭示了文本与语音共享残差流中的可解释特征，并验证其在TTS合成中具有因果控制能力。
AI.motivation: 语言模型日益成为TTS系统的核心，但尚不清楚当文本与生成语音token共享单一残差流时，模型构建了何种表征。
AI.method: 在CosyVoice3的LM骨干上训练BatchTopK稀疏自编码器（SAE），并设计模态感知的auto-interp流程，对每个特征按其激活来源（文本前缀、1秒语音片段或两者）进行标注。
AI.result: 恢复的特征高度可解释，涵盖音素、笑声、口音提示和说话人性别；在SAE隐空间中定向干预可显著提升笑声概率（0.02→0.79）、翻转感知性别、调控语速，同时保持内容不变。
AI.conclusion: SAE提取的特征既是可解释性对象，也是TTS合成中有效的因果控制方向。

title: The Shibboleth Effect: Auditing the Cross-Lingual Distributional Skew of Large Language Models
summary: This study investigates cross-lingual distributional skew (the Shibboleth Effect) in frontier large language models (LLMs) subjected to sustained adversarial conditions. We develop a multi-agent geopolitical wargame, the Cerulean Sea Crisis, a synthetic maritime territorial dispute designed to mirror the structural dynamics of Eastern Mediterranean conflicts. Six frontier models (GPT-4o, Llama-4, Mistral-Large, Gemini-3.1-Pro, Qwen3.6-Plus, and DeepSeek-R1) participate in a between-groups experiment (N = 10 games per arm, K = 5 rounds per game) in which the sole manipulation is the language of play (English versus Turkish), producing 586 validated statements. A zero-shot classifier assesses behavioral dispositions along two continuous dimensions: Concession Rate and Coercive Rhetoric. The results are heterogeneous. Llama-4 shows a substantial, Holm-corrected increase in coercive rhetoric under Turkish (delta = +0.800, p = .002), whereas Gemini-3.1-Pro displays an equally large decrease (delta = -0.750, p = .005). DeepSeek-R1 exhibits a similar negative shift (delta = -0.860, p = .006) and provides chain-of-thought evidence consistent with a buffering mechanism. GPT-4o shows no detectable effect (delta = +0.130, p = .614). These findings indicate that cross-lingual behavioral skew is contingent on model architecture and training regime rather than a universal property of Western-origin LLMs. We identify two distinct buffering mechanisms, chain-of-thought institutional anchoring and multilingual RLHF alignment, and discuss their implications for integrating LLMs safely into diplomatic and crisis-management settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过设计名为'蔚蓝海危机'的地缘政治多智能体博弈，探究前沿大语言模型在英语与土耳其语环境下的跨语言行为偏移（Shibboleth效应），发现不同模型在语言切换时表现出显著异质性：Llama-4在土耳其语下更激进，Gemini-3.1-Pro和DeepSeek-R1则更让步，GPT-4o无显著变化；结果表明该偏移取决于模型架构与训练方式，而非西方模型的共性，并识别出两种缓冲机制。
AI.motivation: 探究前沿大语言模型在不同语言输入下是否表现出系统性行为偏移（即Shibboleth效应），尤其在高风险地缘政治模拟中，以评估其在外交与危机管理场景中的可靠性与安全性。
AI.method: 构建名为'Cerulean Sea Crisis'的合成海上领土争端多智能体地缘政治博弈；6个前沿模型（GPT-4o、Llama-4、Mistral-Large、Gemini-3.1-Pro、Qwen3.6-Plus、DeepSeek-R1）参与双组实验（每组10局，每局5轮），唯一变量为使用英语或土耳其语；共生成586条经验证陈述；采用零样本分类器沿'让步率'与'强制性修辞'两连续维度评估行为倾向。
AI.result: Llama-4在土耳其语下强制性修辞显著上升（δ=+0.800, p=.002）；Gemini-3.1-Pro（δ=-0.750, p=.005）与DeepSeek-R1（δ=-0.860, p=.006）则显著下降，后者提供链式思维证据支持其缓冲机制；GPT-4o无显著变化（δ=+0.130, p=.614）。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言行为偏移并非所有西方起源大模型的普遍特性，而是高度依赖具体模型架构与训练范式；研究识别出两类缓冲机制——链式思维制度锚定与多语言RLHF对齐，为LLM在敏感外交场景中的安全部署提供关键启示。

title: Baseline-Free Policy Optimization for Neural Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) trains autoregressive policies to solve routing problems. The standard training algorithm, REINFORCE with a rollout baseline, requires maintaining and periodically updating a frozen copy of the policy for variance reduction. This baseline introduces a structural vulnerability: on harder instances, a poor baseline produces noisy gradient estimates that can destabilize training. We evaluate Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), an algorithm from large language model alignment that eliminates the baseline entirely by normalizing advantages within groups of sampled trajectories. In a controlled comparison of five RL algorithms on TSP and CVRP benchmarks within the RL4CO framework, we find that: (i) GRPO avoids the training collapse observed with REINFORCE on TSP-100, where performance degrades from cost 9.8 to 52.1 immediately after the warmup phase and does not recover under extended training; (ii) at matched gradient updates, GRPO achieves solution quality within 2% of POMO, a strong AM-based multi-start baseline, while requiring no external baseline; and (iii) P3O, a pairwise preference algorithm also from the alignment literature, is competitive on TSP but shows higher variability on CVRP. These results identify GRPO as a promising baseline-free alternative for NCO, particularly in settings where baseline-dependent training becomes fragile.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用GRPO算法替代传统REINFORCE算法训练神经组合优化模型，避免因基线质量差导致的训练崩溃，在TSP和CVRP任务上表现稳健且接近SOTA。
AI.motivation: 传统REINFORCE算法依赖冻结策略作为rollout基线，但在困难实例上基线性能差会导致梯度噪声大、训练不稳定甚至崩溃。
AI.method: 采用无基线的Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）算法，通过在采样轨迹组内归一化优势函数来消除对冻结基线的依赖；同时对比了包括POMO、P3O在内的五种强化学习算法。
AI.result: GRPO在TSP-100上避免了REINFORCE的训练崩溃（成本从9.8骤升至52.1）；在相同梯度更新下解质量比POMO差<2%，且无需外部基线；P3O在TSP上具竞争力但在CVRP上方差更高。
AI.conclusion: GRPO是一种有前景的、不依赖基线的NCO训练方法，尤其适用于基线敏感或脆弱的场景。

title: Spatially Selective Self-Training for Unsupervised Building Change Detection
summary:
Unsupervised building change detection aims to learn building-change masks from unlabeled bi-temporal remote sensing images. Existing label-free methods often follow a discrepancy-to-mask paradigm, directly using temporal differences, frozen foundation-model responses, prompt-based outputs, or post-processing results as final change maps. Although these strategies provide annotation-free cues, they do not learn a task-specific building-change detector and remain vulnerable to the gap between generic temporal discrepancies and building-defined structural changes. In practice, such discrepancies are often noisy and task-irrelevant, as appearance shifts, registration errors, and non-building modifications can produce strong but misleading responses. To address this problem, we propose SST-CD, a spatially selective self-training framework that reformulates fully label-free building change detection as end-to-end detector learning under noisy pseudo supervision.
  SST-CD uses temporal discrepancies as candidate pseudo labels and trains the detector only on spatially reliable pixels, whose reliability is estimated by a local consistency criterion that filters inconsistent regions from supervision. To further stabilize noisy self-training, a lightweight feature adapter recalibrates bi-temporal features, while a prototype-based decoder produces compact change and no-change representations. Experiments on LEVIR-CD, WHU-CD, and DSIFN-CD show that SST-CD achieves F1 scores of 83.08\%, 91.69\%, and 86.60\%, respectively, outperforming existing unsupervised and label-free baselines. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SST-CD框架，通过空间选择性自训练，在无标签遥感图像上实现端到端的建筑物变化检测，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督建筑物变化检测方法依赖通用时序差异作为伪标签，易受外观变化、配准误差和非建筑物干扰影响，缺乏任务特定检测器学习能力。
AI.method: SST-CD将时序差异作为候选伪标签，结合局部一致性准则筛选空间可靠像素用于监督；引入轻量特征适配器校准双时相特征，并采用原型解码器生成紧凑的变化/不变表征。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD、WHU-CD和DSIFN-CD数据集上F1分数分别达83.08%、91.69%和86.60%，优于现有无监督及无标签基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SST-CD有效缓解了伪标签噪声问题，实现了真正端到端、任务驱动的无监督建筑物变化检测。

title: Bittensor Agent Arenas as a Trajectory Primitive: Distilling a Shopping Agent from ShoppingBench Subnet Traces
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, Data and Models available at: https://huggingface.co/collections/oro-ai/shoppingbench-sn15-trajectory-primitive
summary: Small-model agentic post-training is bottlenecked less by the algorithm than by the trajectory substrate it consumes. Leading recipes (RLVR, group-relative RL, rejection-sampled re-SFT) all need multi-turn traces carrying per-trajectory supervision, and the two existing sources fall short: frontier-synthesised data inherits the synthesizer's biases and collapses the long tail, while unfiltered production logs are unjudged and contaminated by shortcut behaviour. We argue that an incentive-aligned agent arena can be engineered to manufacture such trajectories, and demonstrate this on ORO Subnet 15 (SN15), a Bittensor deployment of the ShoppingBench agentic-commerce benchmark. SN15's race mechanism, LLM reasoning judge, and rotating leak-cluster-guarded problem suite yield a corpus with three properties: incentive-aligned diversity, per-trajectory judging, and anti-memorised held-out evaluation. We introduce a structural-quality filter that converts the raw firehose into a trainable corpus by keeping agentic trajectories (the model itself emits the tool calls) and rejecting sub-task trajectories (the model only classifies or narrates over a deterministic search loop), then post-train Qwen3-4B with a recipe matched to the published ShoppingBench SFT-then-GRPO pipeline. On a leak-cluster-guarded held-out partition scored production-strict, the model lifts from the published Qwen3-4B base of 18.0% ASR to 42.7%, within single-problem noise of the synthetic-data SFT-only baseline (43.6%), while training on a fraction of a single day of subnet output. The supervised stack leaves a large pass@8 to pass@1 gap (53.3% vs 34.8%); a per-step teacher-grounded Dr. GRPO reward converts that headroom into process improvement, and we identify the sub-task firehose as the primary lever for closing the gap to the 48.7% SFT+GRPO bar. We release the filter, the corpus splits, and the arena mechanics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于激励对齐的代理竞技场（agent arena）来生成高质量多轮代理轨迹，用于小模型的后训练；在ShoppingBench基准（ORO Subnet 15）上验证，Qwen3-4B经该方法后ASR从18.0%提升至42.7%，接近合成数据SFT基线（43.6%），且仅需不到一天的子网输出数据。
AI.motivation: 现有小模型代理后训练受限于轨迹数据质量：前沿合成数据存在偏差与长尾坍缩，生产日志则未经评判且含捷径行为；亟需一种能生成激励对齐、每轨迹可评判、抗记忆的高质量多轮轨迹的新数据源。
AI.method: 构建ORO Subnet 15（SN15）代理竞技场，集成竞速机制、LLM推理裁判和轮换式防泄露问题集；设计结构质量过滤器，保留模型自主调用工具的代理轨迹，剔除仅分类或叙述的子任务轨迹；采用匹配ShoppingBench SFT-then-GRPO流程的后训练方案。
AI.result: Qwen3-4B在防泄露测试集上ASR达42.7%，显著超越基线18.0%，逼近合成数据SFT基线43.6%；Dr. GRPO奖励将pass@8与pass@1差距（53.3%→34.8%）转化为过程改进；子任务轨迹火流被识别为提升至SFT+GRPO标杆（48.7%）的关键杠杆。
AI.conclusion: 激励对齐的代理竞技场可高效生成高质量训练轨迹，大幅降低小模型代理后训练对数据规模的依赖，并为可扩展、可评判、抗偏置的代理学习提供新范式；代码、语料划分与竞技场机制已开源。

title: PhantomBench: Benchmarking the Non-existential Threat of Language Models
summary: Hallucinations, where language models (LMs) generate factually ungrounded responses, pose serious risks, as users tend to blindly rely on them. This is particularly concerning in high-stakes domains, where consequences of such model behavior can lead to significant harms. Despite notable progress in understanding hallucinations, it remains unclear how reliably these models can recognize the limits of their knowledge. We introduce PhantomBench, the first large-scale benchmark of its kind, comprising more than 60K non-existent terms and entities derived from real concepts across diverse domains. Using our benchmark, we evaluate a total of 21 models of various types and sizes. We show staggering hallucination rates across the board (with average rates as high as 86.7% in some cases), and note that even frontier models surprisingly fail to abstain on non-existent concepts, especially when the input presumes their existence. We then show that PhantomBench can serve as a proxy for studying model behavior on rare concepts for which models are more prone to hallucinate. We also provide a pipeline to construct PhantomBench, enabling scalable generation of non-existent concepts tailored to the specific needs of researchers and practitioners.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhantomBench——首个大规模幻觉基准测试，包含60K+虚构术语/实体，用于评估语言模型识别知识边界的可靠性；实验发现主流模型（含前沿模型）在面对虚构概念时幻觉率高达86.7%，且难以主动拒答；该基准还可代理研究稀有概念下的幻觉行为，并提供可扩展的构造流程。
AI.motivation: 语言模型常产生事实性错误（幻觉），尤其在高风险领域危害严重；现有研究尚未清晰揭示模型能否可靠识别自身知识边界。
AI.method: 构建PhantomBench基准：基于真实概念生成超6万非存在术语与实体；评估21种不同架构与规模的语言模型在该基准上的幻觉率与拒答能力；分析其对虚构概念及稀有概念的响应行为；提供可复现、可定制的基准构造流水线。
AI.result: 所有被测模型均表现出极高幻觉率（最高达86.7%）；前沿模型亦难以在输入预设概念存在时主动 abstain；PhantomBench能有效代理稀有概念场景下的幻觉研究。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言模型普遍缺乏对知识边界的认知与拒答能力；PhantomBench为系统性评估和缓解幻觉提供了新工具与实证基础。

title: From Patches to Patients: A study of the tile-to-slide performance transferability in Digital Pathology
summary: Foundation Models (FMs) have recently redefined the state-of-the-art in histopathology by providing robust representations for whole-slide image (WSI) analysis. However, selecting the optimal foundation model (FM) for a specific clinical cohort currently requires multiple preprocessing steps, followed by computationally expensive feature extraction and the training of a Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) aggregator for every model. In this work, we investigate whether efficient tile-level linear probing can serve as a reliable proxy for slide-level performance, reducing the need to run full slide-level pipelines for every candidate encoder. We benchmark 19 state-of-the-art FMs on 42 slide-level and 16 tile-level tasks, comparing tile probing metrics against slide-level outcomes using ABMIL and Mean Pooling aggregations. We observe a high correlation between tile and slide performance across varying task difficulties, indicating that encoder representation quality is the primary determinant of WSI success. Sensitivity analyses show that transferability is stable across models and is more influenced by cohort sizes and numbers of tiles per slide than by average task difficulty. We also measure the agreement in best performing models between tile and slide-level tasks, showing tile benchmarks reliably shortlist strong candidates. Overall, our study indicates that tile-level benchmarking provides an efficient and practical first step for narrowing down candidate models, while slide-level evaluation remains essential for final validation on clinical tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在组织病理学中，是否可以使用高效的瓦片级线性探测（tile-level linear probing）作为全切片图像（WSI）级性能的可靠代理，以避免为每个候选基础模型（FM）运行完整的计算密集型滑动窗口分析流程。研究对19个前沿FM在42个滑动窗口级和16个瓦片级任务上进行基准测试，发现瓦片级与滑动窗口级性能高度相关，表明编码器表征质量是WSI分析成功的关键；瓦片级评估可高效筛选优质模型，但最终临床任务验证仍需滑动窗口级评估。
AI.motivation: 当前为特定临床队列选择最优基础模型（FM）需大量预处理、昂贵的特征提取及为每个模型训练MIL聚合器，流程低效且计算开销大。
AI.method: 在42个滑动窗口级任务和16个瓦片级任务上对19个前沿基础模型进行基准测试，比较瓦片级线性探测指标与滑动窗口级结果（使用ABMIL和均值池化聚合），并开展敏感性分析与最佳模型一致性评估。
AI.result: 瓦片级与滑动窗口级性能呈高度相关；编码器表征质量是WSI性能的主要决定因素；模型迁移能力更受队列规模和每张切片瓦片数影响，而非任务平均难度；瓦片级基准能可靠筛选出滑动窗口级表现优异的候选模型。
AI.conclusion: 瓦片级基准测试是一种高效实用的初步筛选手段，可大幅缩小候选模型范围；但临床任务的最终验证仍必须依赖滑动窗口级评估。

title: Importance-Aware Scheduling for High-Dimensional Hyperparameter Optimization
summary: Hyperparameter Optimization (HPO) is essential for building high-performing ML/DL models, yet conventional optimizers often struggle in high-dimensional spaces where evaluations are costly and progress is diluted across many low-impact variables. We propose Greedy Importance First (GIF), an importance-aware scheduling strategy that uses a small-sample warm start to estimate hyperparameter importance, forms importance-based groups, allocates trials proportionally, and retains a full-space fallback. We evaluate GIF under fixed evaluation budgets on five anisotropic analytic functions, Bayesmark, and NAS-Bench-301. On the higher-dimensional benchmarks, GIF reaches better incumbents with faster convergence than TPE, BOHB, Random Search, and Sequential Grouping. On Bayesmark, where the effective dimensionality is smaller, GIF remains competitive but the margins are smaller. Ablation studies show that importance estimation, proportional allocation, and the fallback step all contribute to the gains. We also verify that the HIA component recovers the intended anisotropy on the analytic benchmarks. These results suggest that GIF is a simple and plug-compatible way to improve sample efficiency in high-dimensional HPO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种重要性感知的超参数优化调度策略GIF，通过小样本预热估计超参重要性、分组并按重要性比例分配试验，并保留全空间回退机制，在高维昂贵评估场景下显著提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数优化方法在高维空间中因评估代价高、进展被大量低影响变量稀释而表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Greedy Importance First（GIF）策略：先用小样本暖启估计各超参重要性；据此分组；按重要性比例分配试验资源；并保留全空间优化作为回退机制。
AI.result: 在多个高维基准（如NAS-Bench-301、各向异性解析函数）上，GIF相比TPE、BOHB、随机搜索和Sequential Grouping更快收敛且达到更优解；在低效维数较小的Bayesmark上仍具竞争力；消融实验证明各组件均有贡献；HIA模块成功恢复了各向异性。
AI.conclusion: GIF是一种简单、即插即用的方法，能有效提升高维超参数优化的样本效率。

title: Provenance-Grounded Gating and Adaptive Recovery in Synthetic Post-Training Data Curation
summary: Synthetic post-training pipelines commonly filter generated samples with reward models or holistic LLM judges, yet two practices remain rarely examined together: whether the filtering signal is grounded in the source evidence that induced each generation, and whether rejected samples can be systematically recovered rather than permanently discarded. We present a controlled study of both questions across gate configurations, recovery strategies, and generator scales, using adversarially injected corpora to provide ground-truth failure labels. We find that exact source provenance improves faithfulness gating for stronger judges, that hallucination and reward gates reject largely disjoint sample populations making both necessary, and that an adaptive recovery pipeline combining failure diagnosis with targeted regeneration achieves higher yield, recovery rate, and injection recall than naive resampling. Downstream fine-tuning quality is driven primarily by generator scale, with filtration and recovery conditions contributing meaningfully but secondarily.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了合成后训练管道中过滤生成样本的两种实践：基于源证据的过滤信号是否可靠，以及被拒绝样本能否系统性恢复。通过对抗注入语料库进行控制实验，发现精确的源出处能提升强判断器的保真度门控效果；幻觉门与奖励门拒绝的样本群体基本不重叠，二者均有必要；自适应恢复流程（结合失败诊断与定向再生）在产量、恢复率和注入召回率上优于简单重采样；下游微调质量主要取决于生成器规模，过滤与恢复条件则起次要但显著作用。
AI.motivation: 当前合成后训练管道中，过滤生成样本常依赖奖励模型或大语言模型评判，但两个关键问题未被充分研究：过滤信号是否基于生成所依据的源证据，以及被拒绝样本能否被系统性恢复而非直接丢弃。
AI.method: 通过对抗性注入语料库构建具有真实失败标签的数据集，在不同门控配置、恢复策略和生成器规模下开展控制实验，评估源出处对门控效果的影响、不同门控机制的互补性，以及自适应恢复流程（融合失败诊断与定向再生）的有效性。
AI.result: 1）精确源出处可提升强评判器的保真度门控效果；2）幻觉门与奖励门拒绝样本高度不重叠，二者需协同使用；3）自适应恢复流程在产量、恢复率和注入召回率上显著优于朴素重采样；4）下游微调质量主要由生成器规模决定，过滤与恢复条件起次要但可衡量的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 过滤信号应尽可能锚定于源证据，且多种门控机制具备互补性；被拒绝样本可通过结构化诊断与定向再生实现高效恢复；生成器能力仍是下游性能的主导因素，但精心设计的过滤与恢复策略可带来实质性增益。

title: A Multimodal RGB and Events Dataset for Hand Detection in First-Person View
summary: Existing hand detection algorithms work on images and the detection rate is restricted by the frame rate of the camera. In hand detection applications for moving robotic systems, conventional cameras cause motion blur, especially in darker lighting conditions. We can leverage the use of event-based cameras which possess a high dynamic range, high temporal resolution, and low power consumption. Recent work has shown that using a stereo setup of an event-based and a frame-based camera improves detection accuracy and the bandwidth-latency tradeoff. The main bottleneck in using event-based cameras in object detection and recognition tasks is a relatively low amount of training data. In this work, we propose a methodology and an exemplary synthetic event-based hand dataset from an egocentric, first-person view perspective. The data is synthesized from the existing RGB Egohands dataset with the v2e toolbox. Parameters of the v2e toolbox are varied to provide versions of the dataset with different lighting conditions and scales. Ground truth detections are generated with a fine-tuned YOLOv8 model which is applied to the RGB images in the Egohands dataset and interpolated on the high-temporal resolution events. We use the multi-modal dataset to perform hand detection with existing object detection algorithms which use a multi-modal setup of event and RGB cameras and demonstrate performance comparable to the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从RGB Egohands数据集合成事件相机手部数据集的方法，通过v2e工具模拟不同光照与尺度条件，并用微调的YOLOv8生成高时序精度真值，验证了多模态（事件+RGB）手部检测的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于帧的相机在移动机器人手部检测中易受运动模糊和低照度影响；事件相机虽具高动态范围与时间分辨率优势，但缺乏足够标注训练数据。
AI.method: 利用v2e工具将Egohands RGB数据集合成为多条件（光照、尺度）的合成事件数据集；用微调YOLOv8在原始RGB图像上生成检测框，并插值到事件流以生成高时间分辨率真值；结合事件与RGB模态进行手部检测实验。
AI.result: 所构建的合成事件手部数据集支持多模态检测模型训练；在多模态检测任务中达到与当前最优方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 合成高质量事件数据是缓解事件相机训练数据稀缺问题的有效途径；本工作为基于事件相机的实时、鲁棒手部检测提供了可行的数据与方法基础。

title: Spatiotemporal Seismic Hazard Assessment Using VQ-VAE and Seismic Statistical Features
summary: In this paper we build upon a previous study in which we demonstrated, using XGBoost and earthquake catalogue data from Japan and Chile, that a set of 60 seismic statistical features (SSFs) had much greater predictive value than a set of 428 generic time series features from the tsfresh package. We here extend this previous work in two key ways, focusing on data from Japan as a large dataset is necessary in order to allow for the training of a deep learning (autoencoder) model. First, we move from whole-region prediction (considering, for each candidate event, the likelihood of an event M $\geq$ 5.0 anywhere in the region in the next 15 days) to localised predictions in which both the region of feature computation and the region of prediction are restricted to a circle of radius 24 km around the candidate event, and we show that performance remains excellent, similar to our previous whole-region study for the same area. Second, we here couple this proven set of SSFs, based on one-dimensional (catalogue) data, with a novel feature based on two-dimensional seismic maps, obtained by training a VQ-VAE model to reproduce such maps as output and identifying a measure of its error in doing so with a localised build-up of crustal stress. We show that while localised prediction based on SSFs can be effective alone, with test AUC values as high as those obtained in the case of Japan in our previous whole-region study, the inclusion of the new natively-spatial VQ-VAE-derived feature, top-ranked by SHAP analysis, can enhance performance and additionally appears to near-wholly replace the traditionally-computed $b$-value in terms of feature usage.

AI.tldr: 本文在先前研究基础上，利用日本地震目录数据，将预测范围从全区域缩小至半径24公里的局部区域，并引入基于VQ-VAE生成的二维地震图新特征，显著提升预测性能，且该新特征几乎完全替代传统b值。
AI.motivation: 提升地震短期预测的局部化精度，并融合空间信息以增强传统一维统计特征的表现力。
AI.method: 采用XGBoost与VQ-VAE结合的方法：基于60个地震统计特征（SSFs）进行局部化预测；训练VQ-VAE模型重建地震空间分布图，以其重构误差作为表征局部应力累积的新空间特征；通过SHAP分析评估特征重要性。
AI.result: 局部预测性能与先前全区域预测相当（AUC相近）；新增VQ-VAE特征被SHAP评为最重要特征，且可近乎完全替代传统b值。
AI.conclusion: 局部化预测可行且有效；融合原生空间特征（VQ-VAE误差）能显著提升模型性能，并推动地震预测从纯统计建模迈向时空联合建模。

title: Multi-Faceted Interactivity Alignment in Full-Duplex Speech Models
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models can listen and speak simultaneously, making them a promising architecture for natural conversation. However, current models are trained solely with supervised learning through token-level likelihood maximization, which does not directly optimize interaction-level behaviors, causing interactivity issues such as excessive silence and ill-timed turn-taking. Recent work has applied reinforcement learning (RL) to improve interactivity, but existing methods address only a limited set of interactive behaviors in their rewards. In this work, we propose a post-training alignment method that comprehensively improves the interactivity of full-duplex spoken dialogue models through RL. We address the four canonical axes of interactivity: pause handling, turn-taking, backchanneling, and user interruption. For each axis, we extract short audio segments from human conversation corpora and optimize the model with axis-specific reward functions. An extra LLM-based reward for response quality prevents semantic degradation. We apply our method to two open-source models, Moshi and PersonaPlex, demonstrating consistent improvements in interactivity on both offline evaluation with pre-recorded audio and real-time multi-turn dialogue evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的后训练对齐方法，全面优化全双工语音对话模型在停顿处理、换轮、反馈语和用户打断四个交互维度上的表现，并结合LLM奖励防止语义退化，显著提升了模型交互性。
AI.motivation: 现有全双工语音对话模型仅依赖监督学习，难以直接优化交互行为，导致沉默过多、换轮时机不当等问题；已有RL方法奖励设计片面，覆盖交互维度有限。
AI.method: 提出面向四大交互轴（停顿处理、换轮、反馈语、用户打断）的强化学习后训练对齐方法，每轴使用真实人类对话音频片段构建专用奖励函数，并引入LLM评估响应质量以保障语义一致性。
AI.result: 在Moshi和PersonaPlex两个开源模型上验证，该方法在离线音频评估与实时多轮对话评估中均一致提升交互性指标。
AI.conclusion: 全面覆盖关键交互行为的细粒度RL对齐策略，能有效提升全双工语音对话模型的自然交互能力，且不损害语义质量。

title: SCAIL-2: Unifying Controlled Character Animation with End-to-end In-Context Conditioning
summary: Controlled character animation requires transferring motion from a driving sequence to a reference character. Prior works heavily rely on intermediate representations, including pose skeletons to represent motion or masked background to represent environment, which inevitably leads to information loss. To address this, we present SCAIL-2, an framework that bypasses those intermediates and achieves \textbf{end-to-end} character animation. By directly concatenating driving videos to the sequence, the model can obtain all the required visual information from the input video. To address lack of end-to-end data, we unify sub-tasks of character animation with decoupled conditions and then curate a pipeline to synthesize MotionPair-60K, an end-to-end motion transfer dataset containing heterogeneous tasks of character animation. To archive the unification, we utilize in-context mask conditioning and mode-specific RoPE as soft guidance beyond textual instructions and raw visual information. To address synthetic discrepancy in detailed regions, we propose Bias-Aware DPO to construct preference items to mitigate the errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches in various character animation tasks. A large subset of synthetic data as well as model weights will be released at our project page: https://teal024.github.io/SCAIL-2/.

AI.tldr: SCAIL-2提出端到端可控角色动画框架，跳过中间表示（如骨骼或掩码背景），直接利用驱动视频与参考角色进行动画迁移；通过构建MotionPair-60K合成数据集、引入上下文掩码条件与模式特异性RoPE，并设计Bias-Aware DPO缓解合成误差，显著超越现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖中间表示（如姿态骨架或掩码背景），导致信息损失；缺乏高质量端到端训练数据；合成细节存在偏差。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架SCAIL-2；构建统一多任务合成数据集MotionPair-60K；采用上下文掩码条件和模式特异性RoPE作为软引导；设计Bias-Aware DPO优化偏好学习。
AI.result: 在多种角色动画任务上显著优于现有SOTA方法；发布大规模合成子集与模型权重。
AI.conclusion: 端到端建模结合合成数据构造与偏好优化，可有效提升可控角色动画质量与泛化性。

title: Temporal Sheaf Neural Networks with Dynamic Orthogonal Transport
summary: We introduce Temporal Sheaf Neural Networks (TSNN), a temporal link prediction framework that equips each node with a time-varying orthogonal frame and compares node states only after explicit transport between local coordinate systems. In contrast to existing continuous-time graph models that operate in a shared global embedding space, TSNN models node-specific and evolving interaction semantics through dynamic local frames. The model parameterizes per-node frames via efficient low-rank Householder products, preserves stored hidden states exactly under frame updates, and uses a geometric-residual decoder that anchors predictions on transported distances while learning residual corrections. All computations are strictly causal and use only the pre-event history. We show that the symmetric degree-normalized sheaf Laplacian is orthogonally similar to the symmetric normalized graph Laplacian, with the random-walk normalized form similar in the corresponding degree metric; the full-active, feature-scaled diffusion used by TSNN is exactly a metric-gradient step on the combinatorial sheaf Dirichlet energy, with a degree-free monotone-descent and non-expansiveness guarantee. Frame drift perturbs updates only linearly. Across TGB v2 link-prediction and temporal-heterogeneous leaderboards, together with the DGB benchmark suite, TSNN matches or surpasses the strongest prior methods on most benchmarks, with the largest improvements on graphs exhibiting strong node-role heterogeneity. Ablations confirm the distinct benefit of dynamic frames, orthogonal transport, and geometric-residual decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了时间层神经网络（TSNN），一种用于时间链接预测的新框架，通过为每个节点配备随时间变化的正交坐标系，并在显式坐标变换后比较节点状态，从而建模节点特定且动态演化的交互语义。
AI.motivation: 现有连续时间图模型通常在共享全局嵌入空间中操作，难以刻画节点角色异质性和动态交互语义；本文旨在通过局部、时变、几何一致的建模方式提升时间链接预测性能。
AI.method: TSNN为每个节点参数化一个时间变化的正交坐标系（采用低秩Householder积实现），在不同节点坐标系间进行正交传输以比较状态，并使用基于传输距离的几何-残差解码器进行因果预测；所有计算严格依赖事件前历史，理论分析关联其更新与层上狄利克雷能量的度量梯度下降。
AI.result: TSNN在TGB v2、DGB等主流时间图基准上达到或超越当前最优方法，尤其在节点角色异质性强的图上提升显著；消融实验证实动态坐标系、正交传输和几何-残差解码各自具有独立贡献。
AI.conclusion: TSNN通过引入时变局部几何结构，为时间图建模提供了新的理论视角与实用框架，验证了显式坐标对齐与几何先验对动态关系预测的重要性。

title: Deep learning for echo sounder data
summary: There is no doubt that over the last decade, techniques from the field of machine learning have revolutionized how we process and interpret data, especially images and text. For underwater observations acoustics is a primary source of information, and naturally, deep learning methods have been applied to echograms and other acoustics data, but so far with rather modest results. Here, we argue that due to intrinsic properties of acoustic data, substantial advances will likely require research into deep learning methods beyond mere recycling of models and techniques from image processing. Currently, the potential for breakthroughs in method development is hindered by the lack of standard data formats and organization, and even more by the lack of readily available, high quality data sets with established performance goals. To advance the field, these shortcomings should be remedied

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将深度学习应用于水下声学数据（如回声图）所面临的挑战，指出当前方法效果有限，主要受限于缺乏标准化数据格式和高质量、带明确性能目标的公开数据集，呼吁发展专为声学数据设计的新深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 由于水下观测主要依赖声学数据，而现有深度学习方法在该领域效果不佳，亟需针对声学数据固有特性开展专门的方法研究。
AI.method: 本文未提出具体新算法，而是从数据基础和方法适配性角度进行分析与倡议，强调需构建标准数据格式和高质量基准数据集，并发展适配声学特性的深度学习模型。
AI.result: 指出现有深度学习在水下声学分析中成效有限，核心瓶颈在于数据基础薄弱（缺乏标准格式与高质量公开数据集）及方法迁移不当。
AI.conclusion: 要实现在水下声学数据分析中的实质性突破，必须超越简单复用图像处理模型，着力解决数据标准化与可获取性问题，并推动面向声学特性的深度学习方法创新。

title: VFUSE: Virulent Feature Understanding with Sparse autoEncoders
summary: Generative models have shown remarkable progress in a variety of domains such as protein design, but such power enables the opaque generation of hazardous proteins. In this work, we introduce VFUSE (Virulent Feature Understanding with Sparse autoEncoders), a mechanistic interpretability approach that trains SAEs on diffusion-transformer activations to audit protein models for hazard-aware features. We apply VFUSE to RoseTTAFold3 and RFDiffusion3, popular open-weight models for protein folding and synthesis. We find that for certain blocks, linear probes detect hazardous designs significantly better when fit in the SAE latent space over the original model's representations: improving interpretability without sacrificing model performance. Furthermore, we identify monosemantic features from the SAE that fire only on hazardous designs at up to AUROC $0.84$ ($q < 10^{-13}$). To our knowledge this is the first SAE trained on an all-atom diffusion model and the first feature-level virulence audit of a protein design model, paving the way towards safe and interpretable protein design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VFUSE方法，利用稀疏自编码器（SAE）对蛋白质生成模型（如RoseTTAFold3和RFDiffusion3）进行机制可解释性分析，识别出与有害蛋白设计高度相关的单义特征，实现了首个针对全原子扩散模型的SAE训练及首个蛋白质设计模型的特征级毒性审计。
AI.motivation: 生成模型（如蛋白质设计模型）虽能力强，但可能隐式生成有害蛋白，亟需可解释、可审计的安全机制。
AI.method: 提出VFUSE框架，训练稀疏自编码器（SAE）于扩散-Transformer激活值上，结合线性探针和统计检验，在SAE隐空间中识别危害相关特征。
AI.result: 在RoseTTAFold3和RFDiffusion3上验证：部分模块中，SAE隐空间上线性探针对有害设计的检测能力显著优于原始表征；发现多个单义毒性特征，最高AUROC达0.84（p < 10⁻¹³）。
AI.conclusion: VFUSE是首个应用于全原子扩散模型的SAE方法，也是首个实现蛋白质设计模型特征级毒性审计的工作，为安全、可解释的蛋白质设计提供了新路径。

title: Earth-OneVision: Extending Remote Sensing Multimodal Large Language Models to More Sensor Modalities and Tasks
summary: RS-MLLMs enable natural-language understanding and spatial reasoning over earth observation imagery. However, existing models support only a narrow range of sensor types and tasks, yielding a fragmented view of the earth and leaving cross-modal geoscientific knowledge largely unexploited. This work presents Earth-OneVision, a 2B RS-MLLM that unifies six sensor modalities (i.e., optical, SAR, infrared, multispectral, temporal, and video) and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories within a single autoregressive framework. Three dedicated mechanisms address three bottlenecks. Full-Granularity Vision-Language Alignment (FGVLA) aligns multi-level visual features with the multi-dimensional language space. Spatial-Linguistic Isomorphic Serialization (SLIS) unifies heterogeneous spatial outputs as autoregressive tokens. Progressive Cross-Modality Adaptation (PCMA) decomposes the compound domain gap into sequential stages, tackling the viewpoint and imaging physics gaps in turn. To support joint training, MMRS-OneVision is constructed with ~34M QA pairs spanning all six sensor modalities and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories, substantially exceeding existing RS multimodal instruction datasets. With only 2B parameters, Earth-OneVision achieves competitive or state-of-the-art results across extensive benchmarks, consistently matching or outperforming 4B-72B RS-MLLMs. It achieves 87.52% P@0.5 on the OPT-RSVG testset for optical visual grounding and 80.68% on the SAR VQA benchmark SARLANG-Bench, exceeding 7B models by over 7%. It further achieves 75.74% recall on the BigEarthNet-MS testset for multispectral classification, and 81.94% MCQ accuracy on EarthMind-Bench for cross-modality reasoning.

AI.tldr: Earth-OneVision is a 2B-parameter RS-MLLM that unifies six remote sensing modalities and nine tasks in one autoregressive framework, using three novel mechanisms (FGVLA, SLIS, PCMA) to overcome alignment, serialization, and domain-gap bottlenecks; it achieves SOTA or competitive performance across diverse benchmarks despite its relatively small size.
AI.motivation: Existing RS-MLLMs are limited to narrow sensor types and tasks, leading to fragmented earth observation and underutilized cross-modal geoscientific knowledge.
AI.method: Introduces Earth-OneVision—a 2B-parameter autoregressive RS-MLLM—with three core mechanisms: Full-Granularity Vision-Language Alignment (FGVLA), Spatial-Linguistic Isomorphic Serialization (SLIS), and Progressive Cross-Modality Adaptation (PCMA); trained on MMRS-OneVision dataset (~34M QA pairs covering six modalities and nine tasks).
AI.result: Achieves 87.52% P@0.5 on OPT-RSVG (optical grounding), 80.68% on SARLANG-Bench (SAR VQA), 75.74% recall on BigEarthNet-MS (multispectral classification), and 81.94% MCQ accuracy on EarthMind-Bench (cross-modality reasoning), outperforming larger (4B–72B) models.
AI.conclusion: Earth-OneVision demonstrates that a compact, unified, multimodal RS-MLLM—designed with modality-agnostic alignment, serialization, and adaptation strategies—can effectively exploit cross-sensor geoscientific knowledge and surpass larger, specialized models.

title: Divide-and-Conquer Modeling for the CTF-4-Science Lorenz Benchmark
summary: This work presents a divide-and-conquer modeling strategy for the CTF-4-Science Lorenz benchmark, which evaluates chaotic-system prediction across twelve hidden scores and five scenario families: clean forecasting, noisy reconstruction, noisy-input forecasting, few-shot learning, and parametric generalization. Rather than forcing one model class to handle all regimes, the final system matched each prediction block to the evaluation behavior of its task group. The main contributions are: smoothing-based reconstruction for noisy full-trajectory denoising; NG-RC/NVAR models tuned for noisy long-time attractor forecasting; a fitted Lorenz transition correction restricted to the sensitive clean short-time prefix; and a parametric prefix blend for the interpolation task. The resulting system with final public score of 79.63 shows that bounded, scenario-specific updates can outperform broad model replacement on mixed chaotic forecasting benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分而治之的建模策略，针对CTF-4-Science Lorenz基准测试中的多场景混沌系统预测任务，通过为不同任务类型匹配专用子模型，在混合混沌预测基准上取得了79.63的公开得分。
AI.motivation: 单一模型难以在混沌系统预测的多种复杂场景（如噪声重建、少样本学习、参数泛化等）中均表现优异，需针对不同任务特性设计专用模块。
AI.method: 采用分而治之策略：1）基于平滑的噪声轨迹重建；2）调优NG-RC/NVAR模型用于噪声下的长时间吸引子预测；3）在敏感的清洁短时前缀上应用拟合的Lorenz状态转移校正；4）为插值任务设计参数化前缀融合机制。
AI.result: 最终系统在CTF-4-Science Lorenz基准上取得79.63的公开得分，验证了受限、场景特异的模块更新优于全局模型替换。
AI.conclusion: 针对混沌预测的多场景混合基准，任务驱动的模块化建模策略比统一模型更有效，强调‘适配’而非‘替代’的设计哲学。

title: HarmoView: Harmonizing Multi-View Constraints for Identity-Consistent Video Generation
summary: Current identity-consistent video generation methods struggle to preserve appearance fidelity under large viewpoint changes. While introducing multi-view reference input offers a natural solution, progress remains constrained by the lack of effective frameworks for multi-view inputs and the scarcity of multi-view data. We address these challenges by proposing HarmoView, a robust framework for identity-consistent video generation that effectively integrates multi-view cues through three architectural refinements complemented by a staged training curriculum. Specifically, we first introduce Multi-level Feature Injection to anchor identity fidelity; by injecting raw ViT features from frontal references alongside text tokens via cross-attention, MFI provides persistent low-level appearance anchors that complement the high-level identity features within DiT blocks, leading to enhanced identity preservation. Then, we employ learnable proxy tokens to unify heterogeneous reference layouts across single-/multi-view settings while simultaneously resolving the reference-view mismatch problem. Jump-RoPE is further developed for identity-wise feature isolation to reduce identity crosstalk. To activate these structural capabilities while preserving the original generative priors, we propose the Progressive View Curriculum. This four-stage training strategy employs view dropout to facilitate a stable transition from vanilla T2V generation to high-fidelity, identity-persistent spatial reasoning. Furthermore, we construct a large-scale multi-view dataset to address the issue of data scarcity. Extensive evaluation on our multi-view benchmark, comprising 100 manually-curated cases spanning 52 unique identities, demonstrates that HarmoView significantly outperforms open-source baselines and matches leading closed-source engines, achieving state-of-the-art performance in identity-consistent video generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HarmoView框架，通过多视角参考输入和三重架构改进（多层次特征注入、可学习代理标记、Jump-RoPE）结合渐进式视角训练课程，在身份一致的视频生成中显著提升大视角变化下的外观保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有身份一致视频生成方法在大视角变化下难以保持外观保真度；多视角输入虽是自然解法，但受限于缺乏有效多视角处理框架及多视角数据稀缺。
AI.method: 提出HarmoView框架：1）多层次特征注入（MFI），将ViT前端参考特征与文本token通过交叉注意力注入；2）可学习代理token统一单/多视角参考布局并解决视角错配；3）Jump-RoPE实现身份级特征隔离以减少身份串扰；辅以四阶段渐进式视角训练课程（含视角dropout）；并构建大规模多视角数据集。
AI.result: 在包含100个手工标注样本、覆盖52个唯一身份的多视角基准上，HarmoView显著超越开源基线，性能媲美主流闭源引擎，达身份一致视频生成SOTA。
AI.conclusion: HarmoView通过结构创新与数据构建，有效解决了多视角下身份一致性与外观保真度的协同难题，为可控视频生成提供了新范式。

title: Structured Adaptive Tensor Prediction for Streaming Data
summary: Matrix-valued time series arise in a wide range of applications, such as spatio-temporal data from medical imaging and geophysics. Existing methods are mainly designed for static settings and lack adaptability to streaming and time-varying environments. Adaptive filtering techniques have also been largely limited to data with scalar or vector values, leaving adaptive forecasting for matrix-valued time series inadequately understood. To bridge these gaps, we develop an adaptive tensor regression framework that includes Matrix-on-Matrix (MoM) and Tensor-on-Matrix (ToM) formulations for streaming matrix-valued prediction. The two formulations differ in whether to directly model matrix-valued outputs or to exploit temporal structure via higher-order tensor representations. For the proposed tensor regression framework, we develop stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithms for online learning. We show that stacking multiple responses across time into higher-order tensors improves performance; in particular, the ToM achieves lower steady-state error and stronger denoising capability than MoM, motivating our focus on the ToM model. We further characterize the tracking behavior of SGD under time-varying dynamics. From a statistical perspective, we establish fixed-time recovery guarantees for ToM under general low-dimensional structures, including sparsity, low-rankness, and their joint sparselow-rank models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应张量回归框架，用于流式矩阵值时间序列预测，包含Matrix-on-Matrix（MoM）和Tensor-on-Matrix（ToM）两种建模方式，并设计了在线随机梯度下降算法，理论分析了其跟踪性能与固定时刻恢复保证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以适应流式和时变环境，且缺乏对矩阵值时间序列的自适应预测能力。
AI.method: 提出MoM和ToM两种张量回归建模范式，设计适用于流式数据的随机梯度下降（SGD）在线学习算法，并从统计角度建立ToM在稀疏、低秩等低维结构下的固定时刻恢复理论保证。
AI.result: ToM模型相比MoM具有更低的稳态误差和更强的去噪能力；SGD算法具备良好的时变动态跟踪性能；ToM在多种低维结构下具有理论恢复保证。
AI.conclusion: 所提自适应张量回归框架有效提升了矩阵值时间序列在动态环境下的预测性能与鲁棒性，ToM建模方式更具优势。

title: LIBERO-Occ: Evaluating and Improving Vision-Language-Action Models under Scene-Induced Occlusion via Viewpoint Imagination
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong performance on standard manipulation benchmarks, but most evaluations assume that task-relevant objects are fully visible. This assumption often fails in realistic settings, where occlusion makes manipulation partially observable. In this paper, we study \textit{scene-induced occlusion} as a fundamental challenge for VLA models and introduce \textbf{LIBERO-Occ}, an occlusion-oriented extension of LIBERO. Experiments show that state-of-the-art VLAs suffer substantial performance degradation under occlusion. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Viewpoint Imagination (VIM)}, which generates a complementary view from an occluded primary observation and conditions action prediction on both observed and imagined evidence. VIM improves robustness across task suites, occlusion types, and severity levels without requiring additional cameras at deployment time, suggesting that viewpoint imagination is an promising mechanism for perception completion in partially observable manipulation. Our benchmark and corresponding code are available at: \href{https://github.com/litsh/Libero-Occ}{https://github.com/litsh/Libero-Occ}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIBERO-Occ基准和Viewpoint Imagination（VIM）方法，以应对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在场景遮挡下的性能下降问题，通过生成互补视角提升部分可观测操作任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在标准基准上表现良好，但其评估通常假设任务相关物体完全可见；而现实场景中普遍存在遮挡导致的部分可观测问题，亟需针对性研究与评测。
AI.method: 构建面向遮挡的基准LIBERO-Occ，并提出Viewpoint Imagination（VIM）方法：从被遮挡的主视角生成互补视角，并联合原始观测与想象视图进行动作预测。
AI.result: 实验表明SOTA VLA模型在遮挡下性能显著下降；VIM在多种任务、遮挡类型与严重程度下均提升鲁棒性，且部署时无需额外摄像头。
AI.conclusion: Viewpoint Imagination是一种有效的感知补全机制，可增强VLA模型在部分可观测操作任务中的泛化能力与实用性。

title: A Theory on Flow Matching with Neural Networks
summary: In this work, we develop theoretical foundation for flow matching with neural-network-parameterized conditional velocity fields. We establish convergence guarantees for gradient descent in the over-parameterized 2-layered ReLU neural network regime. We derive generalization bounds for the conditional velocity-field matching objective. Building on these results, we provide Wasserstein-distance guarantees for the samples generated by the induced flow. Our analysis is based on generalization bound for multi-task representation learning with unbounded losses, which may be of independent interest beyond flow-based generative modeling. These theoretical results are validated through extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world image benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文为基于神经网络参数化条件速度场的流匹配方法建立了理论基础，提供了梯度下降收敛性、泛化误差界及生成样本Wasserstein距离保证。
AI.motivation: 为流匹配方法提供坚实的理论基础，特别是针对神经网络参数化的条件速度场，解决其收敛性、泛化性和生成质量的理论保障问题。
AI.method: 在过参数化两层ReLU神经网络框架下，分析梯度下降的收敛性；推导条件速度场匹配目标的泛化界；基于多任务表征学习的无界损失泛化理论，给出生成样本Wasserstein距离保证。
AI.result: 获得了梯度下降收敛保证、条件速度场匹配的泛化误差界，以及所诱导流生成样本到真实分布的Wasserstein距离上界；实验在合成数据和真实图像基准上验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统建立了流匹配中神经网络条件速度场的理论保证，涵盖优化、泛化与生成质量三方面，并拓展了多任务学习泛化理论的应用边界。

title: Schmidt Decomposition-Based Methods for Efficient Quantum Image Encoding
summary: In quantum image processing, a fundamental step is encoding classical image data into quantum states. This can be achieved using methods such as Flexible Representation of Quantum Images (FRQI), Quantum Probability Image Encoding (QPIE), and Novel Enhanced Quantum Representation (NEQR). However, on real quantum hardware, these encodings can quickly lead to circuits with many gates, large circuit depth, and high qubit usage, which is a problem for Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices. In this work, we investigate whether low-rank state approximation, formulated via Schmidt decomposition, can help reduce this complexity. The method keeps only the most significant parts of a quantum state's entanglement structure, making state preparation more efficient while preserving most of the image information. We compare the three encoding techniques in their original form and with low-rank approximation, evaluating metrics such as circuit depth, CNOT count, MSE, and visual quality of reconstructed images. The results reveal meaningful trade-offs between accuracy and resource efficiency, with the FRQI model achieving a 97 percent reduction in circuit depth while maintaining a near-perfect reconstruction (MSE of about 0.27). This demonstrates the potential of low-rank techniques for advancing practical quantum image processing on near-term hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在NISQ设备上实现量子图像处理时，如何通过低秩态近似（基于Schmidt分解）降低FRQI、QPIE和NEQR等量子图像编码方法的电路复杂度，并在保持图像信息的前提下显著减少电路深度和CNOT门数量。
AI.motivation: 现有量子图像编码方法在真实量子硬件上导致电路门数多、深度大、量子比特占用高，难以在NISQ设备上实用。
AI.method: 采用基于Schmidt分解的低秩态近似方法，对FRQI、QPIE和NEQR三种编码进行压缩，保留主要纠缠结构以提升制备效率。
AI.result: FRQI经低秩近似后电路深度降低97%，MSE约0.27，图像重建质量接近完美；其他编码也展现出精度与资源消耗间的有效权衡。
AI.conclusion: 低秩近似技术可显著提升量子图像编码在近期硬件上的可行性，为实用化量子图像处理提供新路径。

title: Decision-Making under Combinatorial Risk
summary: Decision-making under risk is typically studied through single-shot lottery choices. Yet many real decisions involve combinatorial risk, where risk arises from multiple risky components, so the lottery over outcomes is induced rather than given outright and can be costly to evaluate exactly. We introduce an investment-allocation task to study decision under combinatorial risk, where investing in a component raises its success probability and thereby reshapes the outcome distribution. Participants favor the option with the larger probability increment, and, when increments are equal, the option with the higher initial success probability. Revealing the induced probability mass function (PMF) substantially changes behavior, making participants less responsive to combinatorial-risk features and reducing choice variance. To explain these patterns, we move beyond standard benchmarks and hand-crafted hypotheses with symbolic regression to discover compact descriptive models. The discovered models rely mainly on combinatorial-risk features, such as the after-investment success probability, rather than exact evaluation of the full induced distribution. Behavior under the displayed PMF is then well explained by augmenting this model with a prospect-theoretic residual model. The results show that people navigate combinatorial risk primarily through its core features, shifting toward lottery valuation only when the induced PMF is displayed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在组合风险下的决策行为，引入了一种投资分配任务，发现参与者主要依据组合风险的核心特征（如投资后的成功概率）做决策，而非精确计算整个诱导分布；当显示诱导的概率质量函数（PMF）时，行为转向更接近彩票估值模式。
AI.motivation: 现实中的许多决策涉及组合风险（即风险来自多个相互作用的组件），而传统研究多基于单次彩票选择，无法刻画这种风险结构及其评估成本。
AI.method: 设计投资分配实验任务，结合行为实验与符号回归方法，自动发现简洁的行为描述模型，并对比有无显示诱导PMF条件下的决策差异。
AI.result: 参与者偏好带来更大概率增量的选项；当增量相等时偏好初始成功率更高的选项；显示PMF显著降低其对组合风险特征的敏感性并减少选择方差；符号回归发现的模型主要依赖组合风险特征，加入前景理论残差项后可很好解释PMF显示条件下的行为。
AI.conclusion: 人类在组合风险下主要依赖核心特征进行启发式决策，仅在提供完整分布信息（PMF）时才转向更精细的彩票估值方式。

title: Advancing Wood Identification in the Philippines: Utilizing the Xylorix Platform for Efficient AI Model Development and Deployment for Five Key Species
summary: Illegal logging and timber trade continue to pose significant challenges in the Philippines, where accurate wood species identification is essential for enforcement but limited by the need for specialised equipment and expertise. This study aims to evaluate whether AI models for macroscopic wood identification can be developed and deployed by wood scientists without programming expertise using the Xylorix platform, focusing on five Philippine hardwood species: Mangium (Acacia mangium Willd.), Rain Tree [Samanea saman (Jacq.) Merr.], Banuyo (Wallaceodendron celebicum Koord.), Tindalo [Afzelia rhomboidea (Blanco) Vidal], and Ipil [Intsia bijuga (Colebr.) O. Kuntze]. Binary classifiers were trained on 10,663 verified cross-section images from 260 specimens and evaluated using specimen-level mean scoring to mirror operational field conditions. Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) values ranged from 0.969 (Ipil) to 1.000 (Mangium), and Average Precision (AP) values ranged from 0.589 (Samanea) to 1.000 (Mangium). Four of five species achieved AA grade (AUC and AP both \geq 0.90); Rain Tree received AE (AUC \geq 0.90, AP < 0.60) due to AP compression from its small positive test set (3 specimens). All five classifiers rank their target specimens above non-target specimens with near-perfect fidelity. Specimen-level error analysis revealed 9 false negatives from Ipil, primarily stemming from localized image artifacts and 3 false positives for Rain Tree and 1 false positive for Tindalo caused by shared tribal-level anatomical traits. These findings demonstrate that Xylorix non-programmers can leverage the Xylorix platform to construct operationally reliable wood identification models suitable for field deployment at supply chain checkpoints.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了非编程专家（木材科学家）使用Xylorix平台构建用于菲律宾五种硬木宏观识别的AI模型的可行性与性能，结果表明模型在操作层面高度可靠，适合现场部署。
AI.motivation: 菲律宾非法采伐和木材贸易问题严峻，亟需准确的木材树种鉴定以加强执法；但传统方法依赖专业设备和专家知识，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于10,663张经验证的木材横切面图像（来自260个样本），为五种菲律宾硬木构建二元分类器；采用样本级平均评分评估模型，模拟实地作业条件；使用AUC和AP指标进行性能评价，并开展样本级错误分析。
AI.result: 五个物种的AUC为0.969–1.000，AP为0.589–1.000；其中四种达AA级（AUC≥0.90且AP≥0.90），Rain Tree因阳性测试样本少（仅3个）导致AP偏低（0.589）而为AE级；所有模型均能近乎完美地区分目标与非目标样本；错误主要源于图像伪影或近缘种解剖特征相似性。
AI.conclusion: 木材科学家无需编程能力即可利用Xylorix平台构建具备操作可靠性的木材识别模型，适用于供应链检查点等实地执法场景。

title: Unsupervised Style Representation Learning for AI-Text Detection via Paraphrase Inversion
summary: The rapid development of large language models (LLMs) has raised concerns about misuse such as plagiarism, misinformation, and automated influence operations, motivating the need for robust detectors. Recent work has shown that neural representations of writing style are effective for detection and, crucially, robust to adversarial attacks that defeat most existing detectors. However, current style-based detectors rely on authorship labels for training, and are limited to few-shot inference for detection, requiring in-distribution samples that may not always be available. We learn discriminative style features without authorship labels by training a style encoder to reconstruct human-authored text from its machine-generated paraphrase; freezing a semantic encoder during training biases the style encoder to capture only the non-semantic features needed for reconstruction. We evaluate the learned representations via two detection strategies: a few-shot detector and a zero-shot DeepSVDD-based detector. Across benchmarks, our method matches or outperforms all baselines in the few-shot setting and, in the zero-shot regime, is competitive with fully supervised classifiers on in-distribution test data while generalizing better to unseen LLMs. Beyond detection, the learned representations generalize to unseen tasks, achieving competitive performance on authorship verification and fine-grained style discrimination despite never being trained on either objective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需作者标签的风格特征学习方法，通过重建人类文本与其机器生成改写之间的非语义差异来提取鲁棒写作风格表示，并在零样本和少样本检测任务中均取得优异性能，同时具备跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于风格的检测器依赖作者标签进行训练，且仅支持少样本推理，实际应用受限；需构建不依赖作者标签、支持零样本检测且对未见大模型鲁棒的检测方法。
AI.method: 设计一个风格编码器，通过重建人类文本从其机器生成改写中学习非语义风格特征；冻结语义编码器以迫使风格编码器仅捕获非语义信息；采用少样本检测与零样本DeepSVDD检测两种策略评估。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，少样本设置下性能匹配或超越所有基线；零样本设置下，在分布内测试数据上媲美全监督分类器，并对未见过的大语言模型泛化更强；学到的表示还能迁移到作者验证和细粒度风格判别等新任务。
AI.conclusion: 无需作者标签即可学习鲁棒写作风格表征，显著提升检测器的实用性与泛化能力，为零样本AI生成文本检测提供了新范式。

title: Listen, Look, and Learn: Learning Without Forgetting through SAM-Audio
summary: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to continuously learn new classes without forgetting previously acquired knowledge. While recent CIL advances have spurred significant interest across various modalities, the audio-visual setting remains underexplored. Furthermore, although foundational multimodal models like SAM-Audio encapsulate rich static priors, our empirical analysis reveals that these representations struggle in incremental settings. This work bridges this gap by integrating SAM-Audio's audio-visual priors into the CIL setting. Specifically, we leverage its dense audio and visual representations and employ a novel guided attention strategy where the audio features contextually guide the visual representations. To further mitigate catastrophic forgetting, we introduce dual-level distillation objectives at both the feature and logit levels. Extensive evaluations on audio-visual CIL benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将SAM-Audio的音视频先验知识融入类增量学习（CIL）的新方法，通过音频引导视觉表征的注意力机制和双层次知识蒸馏，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，在音视频CIL基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 音视频类增量学习（CIL）研究尚不充分，且现有基础多模态模型（如SAM-Audio）在增量场景下表现不佳，亟需适配CIL的音视频联合学习框架。
AI.method: 利用SAM-Audio的密集音视频表征，设计音频特征引导视觉表征的新型注意力机制，并引入特征层与logit层的双层次知识蒸馏以缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在多个音视频CIL基准上显著优于当前最优方法，验证了所提方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将静态多模态先验（如SAM-Audio）适配至增量学习范式是可行且有效的，音频引导注意力与双层蒸馏协同提升了音视频CIL性能。

title: Nonlinear Estimator: Dual Bayesian Affine Estimators for Parameter Learning
summary: This paper presents a nonlinear parameter estimator for Wiener-type state-space models obtained as a fixed-point architecture that couples two affine minimum mean-squared error (MMSE) estimators: one for the unknown parameters and one for latent variables. The architecture retains the functional structure of the optimal affine MMSE parameter estimator while incorporating Dynamic Basis Statistics (DBS) estimates that summarize nonlinear basis-function evaluations. Two DBS construction strategies are developed, leading to two nonlinear estimator frameworks. The dual basis-parameter estimator combines an affine basis estimator with the affine parameter estimator, whereas the dual state-parameter estimator first computes affine state estimates and their covariances, then maps these state-estimate statistics through a Gaussian DBS operator to obtain DBS estimates. Both dual estimators admit fixed-point characterizations that alternate between estimating each component using the updated prior of the other, obtained from that component's plug-in estimate statistics from the previous iteration. The efficacy of the proposed methods is examined via extensive Monte Carlo experiments, showing that the dual basis-parameter estimator attains parameter mean-squared errors comparable to those of the purely affine parameter estimator, while the dual state-parameter estimator achieves the lowest parameter mean-squared error, outperforming both the dual basis-parameter and purely affine parameter estimators, as well as sequential Monte Carlo variants of classical Particle Gibbs and Expectation-Maximization schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对Wiener型状态空间模型的非线性参数估计器，通过耦合两个仿射最小均方误差（MMSE）估计器构建固定点架构，并引入动态基统计量（DBS）以建模非线性；提出了两种DBS构造策略——双基-参数与双状态-参数估计器，后者在蒙特卡洛实验中展现出最优参数估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有仿射MMSE参数估计器难以有效处理Wiener型状态空间模型中的非线性特性，需在保持仿射结构优势的同时提升非线性建模能力。
AI.method: 构建耦合两个仿射MMSE估计器（参数与隐变量）的固定点架构；引入动态基统计量（DBS）表征非线性基函数响应；发展两种DBS构造策略：双基-参数估计器（联合估计基与参数）和双状态-参数估计器（先估计状态及其协方差，再经高斯DBS算子映射为DBS估计）。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛实验表明：双基-参数估计器参数均方误差与纯仿射估计器相当；双状态-参数估计器参数均方误差最低，优于双基-参数、纯仿射估计器及粒子吉布斯和EM的序列蒙特卡洛变体。
AI.conclusion: 所提双状态-参数固定点估计器在保持结构可解性的同时显著提升了非线性系统参数估计精度，为Wiener型模型提供了一种高效、鲁棒的非线性参数估计新范式。

title: Improving Text-Instance Alignment Of Foreground Conditioned Out-Painting Via Customized Concept Embedding
summary: To showcase products, merchants often incur substantial costs creating high-quality display images. Foreground Conditioned Outpainting (FCO) meets this demand, allowing users to create desired backgrounds for foreground instances at a low cost by adjusting the text prompt. However, existing text-driven FCO methods exhibit critical flaws in their outputs, most notably the presence of artifacts, which refer to regions in the synthesized background that share the same semantics as the foreground instance. Such artifacts diminish the object's prominence and degrade image quality. We attribute the issue to the misalignment between the given instance and text-derived concept embeddings. To address this, we propose the Customized Concept Embedding Diffusion (CCE-Diffusion) framework. Its core is a CCE-Module to customize concept embeddings, bridging the gap between generic noun semantics and a specific visual instance. An Instance-Aware Loss guides the module's optimization, while a Semantic-Preserving Prompt Template prevents customized embeddings from distorting other words in the prompt. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that CCE-Diffusion significantly reduces artifacts in the outputs. As a plug-and-play component, the CCE-Module can integrate with various FCO methods, enhancing their performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CCE-Diffusion框架，通过定制化概念嵌入模块（CCE-Module）解决前景条件外绘（FCO）中因文本与实例语义不匹配导致的背景伪影问题，显著提升生成图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动的前景条件外绘（FCO）方法常在生成背景中产生与前景语义重复的伪影，削弱主体突出性并降低图像质量，根源在于给定前景实例与文本衍生概念嵌入之间的错位。
AI.method: 提出Customized Concept Embedding Diffusion（CCE-Diffusion）框架，核心是CCE-Module，用于将通用名词语义适配为特定视觉实例；引入Instance-Aware Loss优化该模块，并设计Semantic-Preserving Prompt Template以避免干扰提示词中其他词汇。
AI.result: 实验表明CCE-Diffusion显著减少生成背景中的伪影，且CCE-Module作为即插即用组件可兼容多种FCO方法并提升其性能。
AI.conclusion: CCE-Diffusion有效缓解了FCO中因语义错位引发的伪影问题，提升了生成图像的真实性与主体表现力，具备良好的通用性和实用性。

title: FedSteer: Taming Extreme Gradient Staleness in Federated Learning with Corrective Projections and Caching
summary: Federated learning (FL) is often subject to aggregation variance if clients do not consistently participate in training rounds. While reusing stale model updates from inactive clients is a common technique to reduce this variance, we find that with skewed client participation, the resulting update staleness can become severe enough to destabilize training. To remedy this, we propose FedSteer, a novel method that constructs a gradient subspace from a cache of recent client gradients to serve as a low-dimensional representation of the current optimization landscape. FedSteer projects an active client's true gradient onto this subspace to find a set of optimal coordinates. For an inactive client, FedSteer reuses these coordinates with the now-evolved subspace drifted by other active clients. This process effectively "steers" outdated gradients toward the current global objective. This is complemented by a selective caching strategy that identifies a representative client subset to form the subspace, reducing server memory. Experiments demonstrate that FedSteer significantly outperforms baselines, preventing performance collapse in challenging scenarios while delivering accuracy gains of over 7% in others.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSteer方法，通过构建梯度子空间并投影重用 stale 梯度，缓解联邦学习中因客户端参与不均衡导致的训练不稳定问题，显著提升模型准确率。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端参与不一致导致聚合方差增大，而重用过时梯度在参与严重倾斜时会因更新滞后而破坏训练稳定性。
AI.method: FedSteer构建一个由近期客户端梯度组成的缓存子空间，将活跃客户端的真实梯度投影到该子空间获取最优坐标；对非活跃客户端，则复用这些坐标并适配已漂移的更新后子空间，从而‘引导’过时梯度朝向当前全局目标；同时采用选择性缓存策略以降低服务器内存开销。
AI.result: 实验表明FedSteer显著优于基线方法，在困难场景下防止性能崩溃，并在其他场景下带来超7%的精度提升。
AI.conclusion: FedSteer通过子空间建模与坐标复用机制，有效缓解了客户端参与不均衡带来的梯度滞后问题，提升了联邦学习的鲁棒性与收敛性能。

title: The 1st PortraitCraft Challenge: A CVPR 2026 Workshop Competition on Portrait Composition Understanding and Generation
summary: This paper presents an overview of the inaugural PortraitCraft Challenge, held as one of the official competitions at CVPR 2026. The challenge focuses on portrait composition understanding and generation, aiming to advance AI research in portrait aesthetics analysis and controllable image synthesis. Unlike existing datasets and tasks that primarily focus on global aesthetic scoring, PortraitCraft introduces a unified evaluation framework comprising two complementary tracks. Track 1 requires models to perform structured portrait composition understanding, and Track 2 requires models to generate portrait images from structured composition descriptions under explicit compositional constraints. To support the challenge, we constructed and publicly released a large-scale portrait composition dataset consisting of approximately 50,000 curated real portrait images, providing multi-level supervision. This report describes the challenge setup, evaluation protocols, dataset composition, and final results, along with an analysis of the technical characteristics of the submitted solutions. The PortraitCraft Challenge provides a standardized and reproducible platform for research on portrait composition understanding and generation, and is expected to foster further progress in the fields of portrait aesthetics and controllable image generation.

AI.tldr: PortraitCraft Challenge 是 CVPR 2026 官方竞赛，聚焦人像构图理解与生成，提出双轨评估框架（构图理解 + 约束生成），并发布含5万张图像的大规模多级监督人像构图数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有工作多关注全局美学评分，缺乏对人像构图的细粒度理解与可控生成能力，亟需统一、结构化的评估基准。
AI.method: 设计双轨挑战：Track 1 基于结构化描述进行构图理解；Track 2 根据构图描述在显式约束下生成人像；构建并开源大规模、多级监督人像构图数据集（~50k图像）。
AI.result: 成功举办首届挑战赛，形成标准化评估平台；报告详述了设置、协议、数据集与参赛方案技术特征分析。
AI.conclusion: PortraitCraft Challenge 为人像构图理解与生成提供了可复现基准，有望推动人像美学分析与可控图像合成的研究进展。

title: Discovering Interpretable Multi-Parameter Control Policies for Evolutionary Algorithms Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2505.12982
summary: While deep Reinforcement Learning (deep-RL) has been increasingly applied to parameter control in evolutionary algorithms, rigorous theoretical analysis of parameter control remains largely restricted to single-parameter settings, owing to the difficulty of deriving effective, interpretable multi-parameter policies amenable to formal study. We demonstrate how deep-RL can be leveraged to overcome this barrier, using the (1+($λ$,$λ$))-genetic algorithm optimizing OneMax, one of the few problems where a super-constant speedup of dynamic control has been formally proven, as a representative case study. We first show that standard approaches struggle to converge in this multi-parameter setting, and introduce algorithm-agnostic enhancements targeting action-space decomposition, reward shifting, and long-horizon discounting. With these in place, we compare common deep-RL methods and find that Double Deep Q-Networks uniquely avoid the policy collapse observed in Proximal Policy Optimization, yielding trajectories suitable for downstream analysis. Crucially, we move beyond the ``black-box'' nature of neural networks by distilling the learned behaviors into a transparent, symbolic control policy. This resulting policy does not only offer interpretability for future theoretical analysis but also yields exceptional performance, consistently outperforming existing baselines across a wide range of problem sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度强化学习（deep-RL）解决进化算法中多参数控制的理论分析难题，以(1+(λ,λ))-GA在OneMax问题上的动态参数控制为案例，提出算法无关的训练增强方法，发现Double DQN可避免策略崩溃，并将神经网络策略蒸馏为可解释的符号化控制策略，兼具高性能与理论可分析性。
AI.motivation: 现有对进化算法参数控制的理论分析大多局限于单参数场景，难以在多参数下设计出既有效又可解释、适合形式化研究的策略。
AI.method: 以(1+(λ,λ))-GA优化OneMax为案例，针对标准deep-RL在多参数控制中收敛困难的问题，提出动作空间分解、奖励平移和长程折扣等算法无关增强；比较多种deep-RL算法，选用表现最优且稳定的Double DQN；最后将训练所得神经策略蒸馏为透明、符号化的控制规则。
AI.result: Double DQN成功学习到稳定、可分析的多参数控制策略，蒸馏出的符号策略不仅高度可解释、便于后续理论研究，而且在各类问题规模上持续优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: deep-RL（特别是Double DQN）结合策略蒸馏，可有效突破多参数控制的理论分析瓶颈，在保持高性能的同时提供可解释、可验证的控制策略，为进化算法参数自适应的严谨理论研究开辟新路径。

title: Pose-ICL: 3D-Aware In-Context Learning for Pose-Controllable Subject Customization
summary: Subject Customization is a foundational task in modern image generation. By providing a few reference images and a text prompt, users can generate images of a specific object in any desired scene. However, existing methods still struggle to achieve effective pose control for customized subjects. In practice, they often exhibit inaccurate poses or inconsistent cross-pose appearances. These limitations suggest that understanding objects in a volumetric manner remains a significant challenge for 2D-native backbones. To address this challenge, we propose Pose-ICL, a tuning-free framework that leverages 3D-aware In-Context Learning (ICL) to directly adapt to new subjects through multiple paired image-pose references. Its core mechanism,Surface-Anchored Position Embedding (SAPE), equips the model with explicit 3D awareness by anchoring image tokens to the surface coordinates of a volumetric bounding box. Dedicated refinements ensure its seamless compatibility with existing DiT models. Extensive evaluations on both 3D assets and real-world subjects demonstrate that Pose-ICL significantly outperforms current methods in both pose accuracy and identity consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pose-ICL框架，通过3D感知的上下文学习实现无需微调的主体姿态控制，利用Surface-Anchored Position Embedding（SAPE）赋予模型显式3D感知能力，在姿态准确性和身份一致性上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成中的主体定制方法难以有效控制定制主体的姿态，常出现姿态不准或跨姿态外观不一致问题，根源在于2D骨干网络缺乏对物体的体素化理解。
AI.method: 提出Pose-ICL——一种无需微调的框架，采用3D感知的In-Context Learning（ICL），以多组图像-姿态配对为参考；核心是Surface-Anchored Position Embedding（SAPE），将图像token锚定至体素包围盒表面坐标，并适配现有DiT模型。
AI.result: 在3D资产和真实世界主体上的大量实验表明，Pose-ICL在姿态精度与身份一致性方面显著超越当前方法。
AI.conclusion: Pose-ICL通过引入显式3D感知机制，有效解决了2D图像生成中主体姿态控制难题，为定制化生成提供了更鲁棒、可控的新范式。

title: Ambiguous Strategic Classification
summary: A common assumption in strategic classification is that the classifier is public knowledge. However, it remains unclear whether, and why, a system would choose to commit to full disclosure. We study a setting in which regulation requires the system to disclose some, but not all, of the information. This induces a learning task in which the learner must jointly optimize the classifier and the uncertainty surrounding it. To this end, we adopt from robust mechanism design the notion of ambiguity, which in our setting allows the learner to reveal a set or range of possible classifiers, while privately choosing which of them to ultimately realize. We investigate how ambiguity affects the learning task, develop efficient algorithms for computing best-responses and training, and empirically explore strategic learning and its outcomes in this novel setting and using our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在监管要求下系统仅部分披露分类器信息时的战略分类问题，引入模糊性（ambiguity）概念，允许学习者公开一组可能的分类器并在私有范围内选择最终实现的分类器，并提出高效算法进行最优响应计算与训练。
AI.motivation: 战略分类中通常假设分类器完全公开，但现实中监管常要求仅部分披露，系统为何及是否应承诺完全披露尚不明确。
AI.method: 借鉴鲁棒机制设计中的模糊性概念，建模为学习者同时优化分类器及其不确定性；设计高效算法求解最优响应和训练过程。
AI.result: 揭示了模糊性对学习任务的影响，提出了可高效计算最优响应和训练的算法，并通过实验验证了该框架下战略学习的行为与结果。
AI.conclusion: 部分披露下的模糊性建模不仅更贴近监管现实，还能提升系统鲁棒性和策略适应性，为战略分类提供了新范式。

title: A Continuous-Time Markov Chain Framework for Insertion Language Models
comment: Accepted at AISTATS 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/dhruvdcoder/ctmc_dilm
summary: Insertion Language Models (ILMs) offer several advantages over left-to-right generation and mask-based generation. However, existing formulations of insertion-based generation have largely been ad-hoc. In this paper, we derive a diffusion-style denoising objective for ILMs from first principles by formulating the noising process as a continuous-time Markov chain on the space of variable-length sequences. We show that previous formulations of ILMs can be viewed as special cases of this denoising framework. Through empirical evaluation on a synthetic planning task, we show that the proposed approach retains the benefits of insertion-based generation over left-to-right generation and masked diffusion models. In language modeling, our diffusion-based approach is competitive with left-to-right generation and masked diffusion models, while offering additional flexibility in sampling compared to existing insertion language models.

AI.tldr: 本文从第一性原理出发，推导出一种基于扩散的去噪目标用于插入式语言模型（ILMs），将加噪过程建模为变长序列空间上的连续时间马尔可夫链；新框架统一了已有ILM方法，并在合成规划任务和语言建模中展现出竞争力与采样灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有插入式语言模型（ILMs）的构建多为经验性、启发式，缺乏统一理论基础，亟需从原理出发建立严谨的生成框架。
AI.method: 将加噪过程建模为定义在变长序列空间上的连续时间马尔可夫链，由此导出扩散风格的去噪训练目标；将已有ILM视为该框架的特例。
AI.result: 在合成规划任务中，新方法保持插入式生成相对于自左向右及掩码扩散模型的优势；在语言建模中性能与主流方法相当，且采样更灵活。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为插入式语言建模提供了首个基于扩散原理的统一理论框架，兼具理论严谨性与实际有效性。

title: Beyond Model Size: Probing the Gaps in Visual in-Context Learning by Training a Tiny Model
summary: Visual in-Context Learning (VICL) aims at making progress towards adaptive vision models, that can -- based on a few examples -- adapt to a new task at test-time. With the history of in-context learning in natural language processing research, where large, parameter-heavy models are in use, one pathway that current VICL methods take is model- and data-scaling as key ingredients. Yet, it is not clear, whether these ingredients are the key for in-context learning to take shape in vision models. To stress-test such large models, we challenge them with an extreme counterexample: we train a tiny visual in-context model with merely $1$ million parameters and a modest amount of $70,000$ images. We compare the results of this severely capacity capped tiny model to $7,000\times$ larger VICL models in different adaptive settings, (1) on image data with small distribution shifts, (2) on unseen task encodings and (3) on a completely new task, i.e., the setting VICL envisions. With the chasm of training resources between the tiny- and large models, our experiments showcase a lack in how adaptive capabilities are measured, with respect to how tasks are encoded, which tasks were used in pre-training and the choice of metrics. These gaps in current VICL benchmarking underscore a need for innovation in evaluation of adaptive capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了视觉上下文学习（VICL）中依赖大规模模型和数据的主流范式，提出并验证了一个仅含100万参数、使用7万张图像训练的微型VICL模型，在多种适应性任务上与大模型（大7000倍）表现相当，揭示了当前VICL评估体系在任务编码、预训练任务覆盖和指标选择上的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 探究模型规模与数据量是否是视觉上下文学习（VICL）成功的关键因素，并质疑当前以大模型、大数据为前提的VICL研究范式。
AI.method: 设计并训练一个仅含100万参数、使用7万张图像的微型视觉上下文学习模型，并在三类适应性场景（小分布偏移、未见任务编码、全新任务）下，与7000倍参数量的大VICL模型进行系统对比实验。
AI.result: 该微型模型在多种适应性设置下表现可比甚至优于大型VICL模型，暴露出当前VICL评估方法在任务编码方式、预训练任务范围及评价指标上的严重不足。
AI.conclusion: 模型规模与数据量并非VICL成功的决定性因素；当前VICL评估体系存在根本性缺陷，亟需在任务定义、编码方式和评测指标等方面进行创新。

title: Compositional Generative Modeling from Decentralized Data
summary: Learning the compositional nature of the physical world requires joint observation of interacting factors. However, because practical data is often decentralized, these factors are fragmented across isolated silos. Existing decentralized generative approaches focus only on modeling the union of siloed data, overlooking novel combinations implied by the collective whole. To bridge this gap, we introduce Decentralized Compositional Flow Matching (DCFM), a framework that enforces structural constraints across the global set of generative factors, without exchanging any raw data. DCFM enables novel combinations to emerge through peer interactions, even when no single data source can independently support the composition. Empirically, DCFM substantially outperforms federated learning and mixture-of-experts baselines across conditional image generation, robotic spatial planning, and medical attribute co-occurrence modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出去中心化组合流匹配（DCFM）框架，通过跨数据孤岛施加结构约束，实现无需原始数据交换的新型组合生成，在图像生成、机器人规划和医疗属性建模中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的数据分散在多个孤岛中，而现有去中心化生成方法仅建模各孤岛数据的并集，忽略了全局数据隐含的新组合可能性。
AI.method: 提出Decentralized Compositional Flow Matching（DCFM），在不交换原始数据的前提下，对全局生成因子施加结构性约束，通过节点间协作激发新型组合。
AI.result: 在条件图像生成、机器人空间规划和医疗属性共现建模任务上，DCFM显著优于联邦学习和专家混合等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DCFM成功实现了去中心化环境下对物理世界组合性结构的学习，拓展了生成模型在多源异构数据下的建模能力。

title: PENet+: A Lightweight Residual Transformer Framework for Efficient Image Steganalysis
